I would love for you to take a few minutes and apply!| | | [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=d28fbf3d95b746919e3c1bf764500ef2&_e=JPHAaNqa78lkvo9s6VU90lboApcmkCOA7EwPk0utphWVyTHjOo4zXJ7Fudn-KcM8wnYjfvXKO-TdzTJ5_eBI5pH0pEDXNtxD9PXJrCqeNZ5lVd1dXOMP_bUXkyl_XkvJDwJH67Og-X0UfLGtbTQpKrih927qcn85XRVevTetBHuT4H4ebLHJ84RaErYstoyfA6qKgJ3b33f8QEF2WZkwWX0VNHgv6UiK6wyNbReUuSg%3D)

| | Peter, Thanks to your support, and the support of hundreds of thousands of others, we scored a huge win last Tuesday and are now in the middle of a transition as we prepare to take office in January. This means we are accepting applications to come work in my Administration, and I would love for you to take a few minutes and apply! name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879261:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879262:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879263:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879261:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879264:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Peter.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879261:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**_

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[CLAIM 13X-IMPACT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879260:6BOM5rGNA:m:1:3368395361:DBEA939A14B0E15119D01820D7D8053F:r)**

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8021?t=1011&akid=3738%2E5885482%2EkBlpRp ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The Georgia runoff is in 3 weeks, and the
stakes are high.

If we can help Senator Warnock win, we will significantly reduce the
influence of corporate Democrat Joe Manchin -- who made headlines last
week about his plan to use fear mongering about the national debt to
attack Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8021?t=1012&akid=3738%2E5885482%2EkBlpRp ]That's why we're doing everything we can to organize Georgia and raise
voter turnout. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help expand our
organizing campaign to overcome attack ads and voter suppression?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

We stood up to Manchin's Dirty Deal and defeated it in September, but
since he would profit as a coal owner, we have every expectation he will
try again.

This man is blocking so many popular bills, and anything we can do to
reduce his influence is worth it. The path toward accomplishing Bernie's
agenda goes directly through neutralizing the power of Joe Manchin and the
corporate donors he serves.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8021?t=1019&akid=3738%2E5885482%2EkBlpRp ]Senator Warnock will face the full force of the oligarchy, and we need
to counter their attack ads with the organizing we know that works. Pitch
in what you can here!

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

[ ]Senator Warnock will face the full force of the oligarchy, and we need to counter their attack ads with the organizing we know that works. Pitch in what you can here! # Why Democrats Won BIG
## New Video Released Today
**Tuesday, November 15th, 2022** Friend, Last week's election results could have been much different. Complete Democrat control of our state government was avoidable. But the Republican Establishment cared more about their control, than actually doing everything they could to win. On today's show we give a detailed breakdown of the tricks that were played and how the Republican Establishment ended up sinking the ship! **Please give it a watch:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfBR3bC5LBp-v53ipSVUzpeus8OejgB3Mso9Ng8N-xDWd_AT2wH5xiBYq8YsOWYWc-9UiZ-XwbNbQ6vsKrZKnMI8&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_video_why_democrat_won&n=2)

body:
The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 22, the 2022 midterm election recap, is out now!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/latinos/new-podcast-episode-22-thelatinovote-newsletter-5691064?e=5bd167f239)
https://latinos.vote/

** NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW
------------------------------------------------------------
Midterm Elections Recap

** In this episode of The Latino Vote podcast, Chuck and Mike recap the 2022 Midterm elections - state by state, district by district. Tune in to find out who won, who lost, and what we will learn over the coming weeks as election numbers continue to come in.
------------------------------------------------------------
Play Episode Now (https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-latino-vote-episode-22-2022-midterm-elections-recap/id1613279254?i=1000585866053)
Today's Headlines:

** Biden scrambles to shore up Latino support. Is it too late? (https://www.swoknews.com/coronavirus/biden-scrambles-to-shore-up-latino-support-is-it-too-late/article_75edb60d-d5ab-5147-af12-bf548845af85.html) – The Lawton Constitution
------------------------------------------------------------

** Donors Worry About a Cash Crunch for Voter Registration Groups (https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/20/us/politics/voter-registration-fundraising.html) – The New York Times
------------------------------------------------------------

** Will Cheri Beasley’s North Carolina Senate Race Break Democratic Hearts Again? (https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/20/us/politics/north-carolina-senate-cheri-beasley.html) – The New York Times
------------------------------------------------------------

** Op-Ed: Are Latino voters in Southern California being courted like kingmakers yet? (https://www.latimes.com/opinion/story/2022-09-21/op-ed-are-latino-voters-in-southern-california-being-courted-like-kingmakers-yet) – Los Angeles Times
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Dangers of Democrats’ Self-Deception (https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/the-dangers-of-democratsself-deception/2022/09/21/5477b1a2-39b2-11ed-b8af-0a04e5dc3db6_story.html) – The Washington Post
------------------------------------------------------------

** Drought in Western US heats up as a Senate campaign issue (https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/drought-in-western-us-heats-up-as-a-senate-campaign-issue/2022/09/20/73f5f676-3924-11ed-b8af-0a04e5dc3db6_story.html) – The Washington Post
------------------------------------------------------------

** Puerto Rico’s tragically foreseeable crisis (https://www.politico.com/newsletters/the-recast/2022/09/20/puerto-rico-hurricane-energy-crisis-00057731) – POLITICO
------------------------------------------------------------

** The six types of races that will decide control of the House in 2022 (https://www.vox.com/the-highlight/23323231/ruben-gallego-arizona-latino-voters) – NBC News
------------------------------------------------------------

** Latino voters explain why they shifted Republican (https://www.newsnationnow.com/politics/latino-voters-shifted-republican) – NewsNation Now
------------------------------------------------------------

** Democrats Republicans court Hispanic voters on National Voter Registration Day (https://www.ny1.com/nyc/all-boroughs/politics/2022/09/20/democrats--republicans-court-hispanics-on-national-voter-registration-day) – Spectrum News NY1
------------------------------------------------------------

** A Shrinking Margin (https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/21/briefing/poll-hispanic-voters-us-elections.html) – The New York Times
------------------------------------------------------------

[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Dr. Raul Ruiz so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UtUEfpxpRFiPOSJMuOc_izw712zDLrtY4gsLC5Yo4Uden5BnuSYEbdCBpqsR6VL5kZgeoNqiJNmVjC3slybZGWwsFejb7_CDmJKmo7HKpc3MyP1ICkKXdZzmp44eSe0ewVuf5pDwmCnvGvsRQ_jeIMbTQnYnI-JgIhKpcfZagw9x4IKfKgjMahD_COSw6yybv5PnJWkQgu8ghEKffMDz7CNmsQHCjevhxecmSQGG1Knu6tld2T6zweHgBamCKdvo3LHGRivb5Yj1Xxg2yhkJuEeFlV1-mUt7KdCdm-c6o3N7YzTb4EDmT5pcg3TbmfBjf6d9JGbAMyXbuzFRxxa-UOJ4RpltxnWwXOx9pp3g3vdYrm6W6FXN7PHqWnUKamBkn3lac8P_Si7nLGqYO3wfk2GY8EX0Cia0B_L-yA7XD5pp0Y4Tppq9vHpz90k2wMlrwD_pY97mfIG0sTHJyqyKj7w/3r7/8zXRH3p6QaS248atqd8SDA/h3/oyqBrPL_2HYMbjBTao2Pa0ch5IeEPClJKLphlTQ1OI0)

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.

[We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: FOR RELEASE: Wesley Hunt Endorsement of President Donald J. Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/b2dac4c6e6e3/for-release-wesley-hunt-endorsement-of-president-donald-j-trump?e=6b59dbf13a)

** For Immediate Release: November 15th, 2022
------------------------------------------------------------

** Contact: James Kyrkanides, Campaign Manager
------------------------------------------------------------

** Email: press@wesleyfortexas.com
------------------------------------------------------------

For Release: Wesley Hunt Endorsement of President Donald Trump

Houston, TX – This evening, Congressman-Elect Wesley Hunt congratulated President Donald Trump on his campaign announcement to become the 47^th President of the United States.

"Donald J. Trump is exactly the man America needs to save our nation from its rapid decline, courtesy of Joe Biden and the Democrat Party," said Wesley Hunt. "As President Trump campaigns for President of the United States, he will have my full support everywhere I go.

"Under President Trump, we had the best economy in the history of our country," said Hunt. "Unemployment was at an all-time low, black Americans were employed at the highest rate ever, our stock market was at a record high, and taxes for the middle class were cut tremendously.

"Under President Trump, we achieved American energy independence. Land leases were abundant, permits were issued rapidly, and his administration viewed the industry as a necessity for society, not as an existential threat. Because of President Trump’s leadership on energy, communities like Houston thrived and Americans across the nation enjoyed record-low prices at the pump and on their energy bills.

"Under President Trump, we had world peace. The United States Embassy in Israel was moved to Jerusalem, the Abraham Accords were ratified, Iran was not on a path to have a nuclear weapon, North Korea was in talks to denuclearize, Russia did not invade or annex a sovereign country, and China's invasion of Taiwan was not imminent.

"The difference between President Donald Trump and Joe Biden could not be more stark, which is why I look forward to enthusiastically supporting Donald Trump's bid for the White House."

###

Team – Donald Trump just formally announced that he is again running for President.

[I will tell you why this is so problematic, but if you’re already ready to take action, will you please chip in $3 or more to help make sure he never makes it back to the White House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665781/379250368/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2086-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU3NjdiMi01ODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rn-_e7MqVOoTXg_Qaz46XXPeZIE28sYo6HIeA7n7a-8=)

If elected, Donald Trump would likely:

>> sign a national abortion ban into law
>> roll back the fundamental rights guaranteed to LGBTQ+ Americans
>> support policies that accelerate climate change
>> give tax breaks to corporate billionaires at the expense of families

On top of all of this, Trump incited the unprecedented attacks on our nation’s capitol on January 6, 2021. He refused to intervene, threatening the very heart of democracy itself.

We CANNOT afford another four years of Donald Trump. I know we just came off an election season and that asking you for more help may feel like a lot, but there is too much at stake not to get involved.

**[Please: rush $3 or whatever you can to protect our democracy and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665782/379250369/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2086-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU3NjdiMi01ODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rn-_e7MqVOoTXg_Qaz46XXPeZIE28sYo6HIeA7n7a-8=)**

Maggie Hassan

body:
| | |

This is urgent, friend: **Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president in 2024.**
We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: [**So please, at this critical moment, will you rush $5 or more now to help Rev. Warnock keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665868/379250716/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4690-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWI2ODM2OC01OTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MAPCjZeC7rxmXMrf35TlyXFEUzvyB_zJMGXkLMTP2w=)
Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat.
**Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP****base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.**
**We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short.**

clean_body: | | | This is urgent, friend: Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president in 2024. We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: = Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat. Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOPbase, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red. We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up in this critical moment, Team Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Here’s what this means for YOU: | = 🚨🚨 BREAKING: Donald Trump launches 2024 presidential campaign 🚨🚨 = Peter, after four years of nearly destroying our democracy, two impeachments, and an insurrection, Donald Trump is coming back with a vengeance for the White House. Except this time, our country may not survive another presidency. Joe Biden entered his first 100 days in office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by the Trump administration’s extreme policies. But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back. Today, America is stronger. More hopeful. And President Biden is delivering on his bold agenda, including historic investments in infrastructure, our economy, and combatting climate change. Trump's re-election would undo all of Joe’s hard-fought progress and more. That’s why the 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be another election. It’s a historic fight for the soul of our nation. Abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for is on the line. In short: Our nation’s future hinges on what we do from this moment forward. Over 80 million voters unified behind President Biden to defeat Trump in 2020. We can do it again if Democrats start early and overpower Trump’s dangerous movement. = = In 2020, Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with award-winning digital and television content. Now, we need to do it again, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support. We can either sit back and let Trump pave his way back into the White House or we can stand with President Biden, usher in a historic surge of support, and help our President move our country forward! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **Trump’s presidency had a devastating impact on our democracy – and his next campaign could _do even more harm:_**
**In 2020,** Trump tried to use Republican state legislators to overturn election results in his favor.
**In 2022,** Trump rallied his right-wing supporters behind extremist candidates up and down the ballot – candidates that will try to use their power to push forward his agenda.

Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. clean_body: Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... Friend, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. Trump Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Herschel
subject: It all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Fellow American,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. **[Can you spare a few dollars to help me win this seat?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8bdcd2fa333140509f7b30496eff3888&_e=G1Yzpt0EridJxzB5Iczx2Xxb5-SjBWYyKnOP-DwDxgPKOnq63DWUaWAjkn4RBIcOCAtHVc0rpZ96LN-gQQ62cTHO1dDZRYsCF7bQaJsCS3ma4wK1EY0EpU95PQhY0HnIDc3YkfReXQRy_lwBnRJR_mxrVV1Ag9LN7zDdKBbMWaZdcTSY-FNGg_TUysd7fQG_C0XbBrEhtQsvjKiHo5UKwLys4prSzA49jHlqHYmsCQsgEMG-Aha9cr_zSNPJlX0Kd0b6iSOwXHh35YZhDt-WOlaBZNMNhrhXTK9XHIvWOWGni3PHANDwKo1I5Q5PFMNK1vnWIRtP_QTHn-SzrXFH8Pjh3KDpmWGCc2FiGg5McdqcHflDEw7YG0mPLGqTtDHmgHIOSt95nwE5VFsU0MvddxP-XV5G_lAxwfM_FSxyy2KmJkJWQas9XxtNU0UjTvQB)**

clean_body: The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. | Fellow American, If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing. Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th. I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess. Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate. The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: YIKES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is SERIOUS, Derek
#
**BREAKING NEWS**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221115-2?refcode=em20221115-8134&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)
**[This is SERIOUS, Derek. Can you rush a donation of $5 or more right now so we can fight back + save our democracy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221115-2?refcode=em20221115-8134&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)**
**[FIGHT BACK: RUSH $5 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221115-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221115-8134&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)**
* * *
Yikes, Derek.
**FIRST:** Donald Trump did everything he could to defeat John Fetterman in PA’s U.S. Senate race. His Super PAC spent MILLION$ to tear John down and he even came to rally with Dr. Oz in the final days of the 2022 election.
**THEN:** After voters cast their ballots and this race was decided, Trump tried to spread _even more_ conspiracy theories about our election in PA. He knew losing this seat meant losing critical support if he tried to challenge the 2024 election and he was all-in to try and save it.
**NOW:** We’re more than 700 days away from the 2024 election and Donald Trump just announced his decision to run for president again.
Let’s be clear: **Donald Trump is a major threat to our democracy.**
We already experienced four years under his leadership, so we know that we _really_ can’t afford another four. If we’re going to stand up and defeat Trump, we need to start preparing now. That’s why we’re asking:
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now? Your early support will give us the resources to fight back + save our democracy when it matters most.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221115-2?refcode=em20221115-8134&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)**
**[RUSH A DONATION NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221115-2?amount=5&refcode=em20221115-8134&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)**
Thanks so much for being part of this,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221115-8134-footer&t=1&refcode2=8134_434096_tAGYdA&akid=8134%2E434096%2EtAGYdA)**

Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Think of where we were two years ago. Millions of people were out of work. COVID was running rampant. The country seemed to be coming apart at the seams. _But you kept the faith._ You believed, like I did, that we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. That we needed to rebuild the backbone of this country: the middle class. That we needed to put unity over division. Truth over lies. Hope over fear. And thanks to you, _we did._ Today, we’ve created more jobs than any administration ever at this point in a presidency. Vaccines and tests are easily available for every American. We’ve worked with Republicans to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure. We’ve tackled the inflation crisis head-on by investing in our supply chain, and we’ve passed historic legislation to bring down costs for families. Millions of Americans will be relieved of crushing student debt. And we’ve made the single-biggest investment in climate in our nation’s history. Still, the battle for the soul of our nation was never going to be won in a single presidential election -- or a single midterm election. Just take a look at this last election: Our party’s work is about more than defeating Donald Trump. It’s about defeating Trumpism. It’s about being able to live in a country where neighbors aren’t pitted against each other. Where elected officials go to bat for the middle class. Where racism and violence are given no safe harbor. **[Make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC today to protect our democracy and elect Democrats nationwide. clean_body: Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president again. | | Tonight, Donald Trump announced he’s running again. I’m going to let you in on a secret, Derek: He will fail. Over the last few years, our democracy was put to the test. In the midterm elections, the American people voted to uphold our democracy. That fight isn’t over. This team defeated Donald Trump just over two years ago. It wasn’t a fluke. Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Just one week ago, you proved that together, we can defeat the extremism, divisiveness, and corruption that he and his party represent. Thanks to you, we protected the Senate and lost fewer seats in the House this year than in any Democratic president’s first elected midterm in the last 40 years. Now you’re probably asking yourself: “All right, Joe, what’s your plan?” And I promise you, I’ll have more to say on that soon. But, in the meantime, I’ll leave it at this: Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. You’re the reason Kamala and I are here. And your support of the Democratic Party is going to be the reason he will never be president again. We won in 2020 and 2022 because you donated your hard-earned time and money to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans. You haven’t donated to the DNC this year. With Trump running for president again, our party’s work is more important than ever. Derek: Will you make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC now? Think of where we were two years ago. Millions of people were out of work. COVID was running rampant. The country seemed to be coming apart at the seams. But you kept the faith. You believed, like I did, that we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. That we needed to rebuild the backbone of this country: the middle class. That we needed to put unity over division. Truth over lies. Hope over fear. And thanks to you, we did. Today, we’ve created more jobs than any administration ever at this point in a presidency. Vaccines and tests are easily available for every American. We’ve worked with Republicans to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure. We’ve tackled the inflation crisis head-on by investing in our supply chain, and we’ve passed historic legislation to bring down costs for families. Millions of Americans will be relieved of crushing student debt. And we’ve made the single-biggest investment in climate in our nation’s history. Still, the battle for the soul of our nation was never going to be won in a single presidential election -- or a single midterm election. Just take a look at this last election: Our party’s work is about more than defeating Donald Trump. It’s about defeating Trumpism. It’s about being able to live in a country where neighbors aren’t pitted against each other. Where elected officials go to bat for the middle class. Where racism and violence are given no safe harbor. Keep the faith -- and remember to spread it. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . name: Mike Pompeo
subject: We Must Follow Christ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878896:Jk07UrGBN:m:1:3331421248:B4F50AB0140CFE7FECD45B13874811B7:r)
---

As a true follower of Christ, your job and who you are in Christ are inseparable.

The author C. S. Lewis stated, "I believe in Christianity as I believe that the sun has risen: not only because I see it, but because by it I see everything else."

This is the truth we all know, for it is through our belief in Jesus Christ that we gain the strength to face what must be faced without resorting to falsehoods.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878896:Jk07UrGBN:m:1:3331421248:B4F50AB0140CFE7FECD45B13874811B7:r)
---

_**Our strength granted to us by God is our armor**_ , which permits us to meet the challenges of life and address the problems of our nation and the world.

The lack of faith-driven judgements in our nation's capital explains why the problems we face as a nation continue to pile up.

Our leaders in Washington are driven by self-interest and lack the moral clarity and courage to meet the challenges of the day.

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878896:Jk07UrGBN:m:1:3331421248:B4F50AB0140CFE7FECD45B13874811B7:r)
---

That's why I'm working overtime to restore faith-driven leadership to our politics. _**[If you'd like to join me in this endeavor, please make a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878896:Jk07UrGBN:m:1:3331421248:B4F50AB0140CFE7FECD45B13874811B7:r "If you'd like to join me in this endeavor, please make a donation today.")**_

**I know that with more true believers in government,_we will be able to bring America to salvation._**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878897:Jk07UrGBN:m:1:3331421248:B4F50AB0140CFE7FECD45B13874811B7:r)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Defense Department Records Reveal U.S. Funding of Anthrax Laboratory Activities in Ukraine
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 345 pages of records from the Defense Threat Reduction Agency (DTRA), a component of the U.S. Department of Defense, revealing that the United States funded anthrax laboratory activities in a Ukrainian biolab in 2018. Dozens of pages are completely redacted, and many others are heavily redacted.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 14, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61055&L=28452&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9kLXJlY29yZHMtYW50aHJheC1sYWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=) | **[Judicial Watch: Defense Department Records Reveal U.S. Funding of Anthrax Laboratory Activities in Ukraine](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61055&L=28452&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9kLXJlY29yZHMtYW50aHJheC1sYWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)** Judicial Watch announced recently it received 345 pages of records from the Defense Threat Reduction Agency (DTRA), a component of the U.S. Department of Defense, revealing that the United States funded anthrax laboratory activities in a Ukrainian biolab in 2018\. Dozens of pages are completely redacted, and many others are heavily redacted. The records show over $11 million in funding for the Ukraine biolabs program in 2019. ### [‘What about you, Joe?’ Conservative commentators slam Biden for trying to pressure DOJ into investigating Elon Musk’s ties with other countries (when president is embroiled in son Hunter’s dodgy dealings) ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61055&L=28453&F=H&) The Daily Mail President Joe Biden was slammed as a hypocrite Wednesday night after he suggested Elon Musk's Twitter acquisition should be investigated — while denying any wrongdoing with his son's foreign entanglements.

The president said at a news conference that the billionaire's acquisition of Twitter 'is worthy of being looked at' after he was asked whether the deal, which was partially funded by Saudi Arabia, constituted a national security threat. ### [Karine Jean-Pierre blasted for warning it may take ‘a few days’ to count votes: ‘This insanity has to stop’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61055&L=28454&F=H&) Fox News White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre was blasted Monday for saying that waiting a couple of days for results is how elections are “supposed to work.”

“We may not know all the winners of elections for a few days. It takes time to count all legitimate ballots in a legal and orderly manner,” Jean-Pierre told reporters at the White House press briefing. “That’s how this is supposed to work.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61055&L=28454&F=H&)

Though Solomon appeared to be the first to appeal to Musk, the new Twitter owner responded directly Sunday to a post on the matter by Tom Fitton, president of the conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch. Friend,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Friend, we did Make America Great Again. _Then Joe Biden ruined our Country faster than anyone could ever imagine. That 's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country.
_
Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we 've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: BREAKING: Trump announces presidential run.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
Help jump-start our campaign when it matters most. |
---

| BREAKING -- disgraced former President Donald Trump has just announced that he is running for president again.

**This is a perilous moment**. Trump is the most dangerous presidential candidate in history. Our democracy would not survive a second Trump term. Our _planet_ might never recover from it.

He'll enter the race with a massive cash advantage. We _can 't _let that go unanswered. [A group of donors have agreed to put up an emergency match fund to triple every contribution through this email.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-)

As president, Trump failed to meet the challenges our world faced in the most disastrous ways. His approach: denial of responsibility, denial of justice, and denial of reality.

Since then, he's worked to take the country down a calamitous path, spreading lies about our elections and encouraging political violence. Another Trump presidency would be catastrophic for our democracy and our planet -- we can't allow it to happen.

**The environmental movement and LCV Victory Fund have an urgent role to play in Trump 's defeat**. In 2020, LCV Victory Fund was instrumental in defeating Trump and electing Biden, starting with in-depth research we conducted with environmental swing voters in battleground states to identify and ultimately leverage Trump's weaknesses with key voting blocs.

And we _nailed_ it. Our research identified significant portions of swing voters who did not know about Trump's terrible environmental record, and when they learned about it, moved against him and toward Joe Biden in a major way.

**Our strategies of research and voter persuasion worked, ultimately helping to defeat Trump with key voter blocs.** But if we're going to win again and keep him out of the White House in 2024, we need to begin planning our efforts _now_. Despite his lies, greed and corruption, it is still the case that Trump has a path to victory -- and it relies on having a head start.

[Peter -- we need your help to reach as many people as possible. Can you chip in today to give us the edge? Even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-)

Make no mistake -- this will be a grueling road -- _no one_ is looking forward to thinking about the next election already. But we _cannot_ wait. **Right now, Trump 's PAC already has _nearly $70 million in cash on hand_.**

We are reaching out to you today because if that goes unanswered, Trump has a chance to build an early lead.

**The truth is, we 've _always_ been outspent by our opponents -- and we still win. That is because at LCV Victory Fund, we know how to plan strategically, invest resources wisely, and motivate the voters we need to deliver victory.**

We can -- we must -- elect leaders who will address the climate crisis and secure a just, equitable future for everyone, but we cannot do it alone.

[We need your help to pull it off. Please, donate today -- even $5 helps -- your contribution will be triple matched. ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-)

We can -- we must -- save our planet and secure a just, equitable future for everyone, but we cannot do it alone.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund
|
---
**[**STOP TRUMP
DONATE TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C3p-q3c_)**

_Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www.lcvvictoryfund.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate 's committee._

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8919922&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDM1MDA1NAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDM1MDA1NAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8919922&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDM1MDA1NAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDM1MDA1NAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://www.lcv.org/) |

subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61880579:JQ1lOrGNV:m:1:3374012347:0899A00FC9F03D16CA15D1203554BB77:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61880579:JQ1lOrGNV:m:1:3374012347:0899A00FC9F03D16CA15D1203554BB77:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_

clean_body: Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... Peter, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Peter. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. Donald Trump is running for president again, and President Biden emailed you. Here’s the deal, Derek. Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. Folks who chipped in back in 2020 are the reason we have control of the White House. **And your support of the Democratic Party will be why Trump will never be president again.**
[**Donate $7 to the DNC to become a Founding Donor in our fight against Trump and Republicans across the country.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJnRdmfClxWjkT03E0dp2ckIrTCi4f4c4EdtSs9p1KLd9Xyg_efUUu7RvCVcwX-z7rF57ZKHLFJ9dfOXJ-l2JxXkycOpIr1OGBXe9wugGpXYkNhKhYS4-hBvMG5pj67xlPm5_RcONaTykOIgbzHGc9TGIljj55WgDJW9emPhmC8KOI8OkHQ7Os9xqywAgq9rkung4XQo411rn9tAr9NPk26IqrV0NtlxhnnOgEBJeQzZCNZqm6TCAthQNBd9evoewe8AWkQxEFnPf5q49CuaVb_aJtTQNCH1qmK2cSvfrYS4X5qHtOU7kZvhWpzt1JGXjRaTbKzUDhx7coOL41MxTUa5_4xl_p72q5csvyJdt4MpJ23ExBbL_7UBezoV2uUtvwkP0-_oGpYvBd5G9reDYLSkKI0tIJXgTEeK79mOVgYpU/3r7/2nEfCh9DTx-kNtLmfhYi_A/h0/tHfJXL6S6tlv6qS0W7KbP22iRuGawo3DHaPaXyCEvr8) Thanks, The Democrats \-----Forwarded message-----
Sender: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
Date: Tue, Nov 15, 2022
Subject: Trump is running for president. You haven’t donated to support our party this year. Will you step up now?
**Tonight, Donald Trump announced he’s running again. I’m going to let you in on a secret, Derek: He will fail.[In a moment, I’m going to tell you why, but people like you stepping up will be a big part of how it’s done.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJnRdmfClxWjkT03E0dp2ckIrTCi4f4c4EdtSs9p1KLd9Xyg_efUUu7RvCVcwX-z7rF57ZKHLFJ9dfOXJ-l2JxXtD_DzfVWNHb_RPSxODPi15i3UvJkeDs-S6ZMNddUi4WuX_klM0SP34kNpZwnxij9n1ke596jxZG0-JX8ctkla2Dzv5fv66x-sDNjFdHkggc3oqzrrikxOhm6dDxNI1bFH7CrNKDChIZB6nVSXFUaAyW-vdtaOkwfJfy8fDpVZhinrbmpb1pBLsq-kO3IenAtZkAEKN4YBoQeMrr5pkZIY6VJ68moiAFIBqtWeMfD-huxgFWKPNG7mXG0YdYAT85Bw3P5P_U0d2jS0n6BSnQJyz5PptIzTwZ5TST4kPkJpErpaxgugEffSzI6JznS_E1Tvxkfy-j_GgUQ_Io5L7UJW4/3r7/2nEfCh9DTx-kNtLmfhYi_A/h1/o-J7DWC0r8cN3EhKd2GuWYqM--1sD2G0SpLj59PKFso)** Over the last few years, our democracy was put to the test. In the midterm elections, the American people voted to uphold our democracy. That fight isn’t over. This team defeated Donald Trump just over two years ago. It wasn’t a fluke. Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Just one week ago, you proved that together, we can defeat the extremism, divisiveness, and corruption that he and his party represent. Thanks to you, we protected the Senate and lost fewer seats in the House this year than in any Democratic president’s first elected midterm in the last 40 years. [**And if you step up now, our party will defeat MAGA Republicans again in 2024.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJnRdmfClxWjkT03E0dp2ckIrTCi4f4c4EdtSs9p1KLd9Xyg_efUUu7RvCVcwX-z7rF57ZKHLFJ9dfOXJ-l2JxXhB0gKlPdgaDM3Q4CzA46PPksJsbYQMemUnNhZfZKQ4JWx03UYmATQf6KLD0vhIDahbWVlm3EOjtRjiW6jvUlZOhz2Q1vGQ94IfVyFQQFE4YJzSy-_vsNo7fFy7ga3_WJocTGYjbpidcqPQEprD0o6oWEWxQY5MGQa3V3LdriNma-WBt9Ic8XKF99s2zgolaUQXUIUdVWSRYjWGQ12nBbvXFTuwBA-dybKFA9lE_PWSQzOdUtkWz-1qA2K6O0m_FE1CZHcnro4yR2aqoamK4A7vQxCZqHYO2bNns4JWqr1RogF_l6YITziIiUFKYSsWYQfSZOxCUCnNdRj7_Ku1sTmg/3r7/2nEfCh9DTx-kNtLmfhYi_A/h2/zg53oREOBJCo0aqY4_jo24cMkG1WK5eCDOzH3_VVXb0) **Now you’re probably asking yourself: “All right, Joe, what’s your plan?” And I promise you, I’ll have more to say on that soon. But, in the meantime, I’ll leave it at this: Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. You’re the reason Kamala and I are here. And your support of the Democratic Party is going to be the reason he will never be president again.** _We won in 2020 and 2022 because you donated your hard-earned time and money to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans._ You haven’t donated to the DNC this year. With Trump running for president again, our party’s work is more important than ever. **Derek: Will you make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC now?**

Think of where we were two years ago. Millions of people were out of work. COVID was running rampant. The country seemed to be coming apart at the seams. _But you kept the faith._ You believed, like I did, that we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. That we needed to rebuild the backbone of this country: the middle class. That we needed to put unity over division. Truth over lies. Hope over fear. And thanks to you, _we did._ Today, we’ve created more jobs than any administration ever at this point in a presidency. Vaccines and tests are easily available for every American. We’ve worked with Republicans to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure. We’ve tackled the inflation crisis head-on by investing in our supply chain, and we’ve passed historic legislation to bring down costs for families. Millions of Americans will be relieved of crushing student debt. And we’ve made the single-biggest investment in climate in our nation’s history. Still, the battle for the soul of our nation was never going to be won in a single presidential election -- or a single midterm election. Just take a look at this last election: Our party’s work is about more than defeating Donald Trump. It’s about defeating Trumpism. It’s about being able to live in a country where neighbors aren’t pitted against each other. Where elected officials go to bat for the middle class. Where racism and violence are given no safe harbor. **[Make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC today to protect our democracy and elect Democrats nationwide. clean_body: Donald Trump is running for president again, and President Biden emailed you. | | Donald Trump is running for president again, and President Biden emailed you. Here’s the deal, Derek. Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. Folks who chipped in back in 2020 are the reason we have control of the White House. And your support of the Democratic Party will be why Trump will never be president again. Thanks, The Democrats \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr. Date: Tue, Nov 15, 2022 Subject: Trump is running for president. You haven’t donated to support our party this year. Will you step up now? Tonight, Donald Trump announced he’s running again. I’m going to let you in on a secret, Derek: He will fail. Over the last few years, our democracy was put to the test. In the midterm elections, the American people voted to uphold our democracy. That fight isn’t over. This team defeated Donald Trump just over two years ago. It wasn’t a fluke. Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Just one week ago, you proved that together, we can defeat the extremism, divisiveness, and corruption that he and his party represent. Thanks to you, we protected the Senate and lost fewer seats in the House this year than in any Democratic president’s first elected midterm in the last 40 years. Now you’re probably asking yourself: “All right, Joe, what’s your plan?” And I promise you, I’ll have more to say on that soon. But, in the meantime, I’ll leave it at this: Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. You’re the reason Kamala and I are here. And your support of the Democratic Party is going to be the reason he will never be president again. We won in 2020 and 2022 because you donated your hard-earned time and money to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans. You haven’t donated to the DNC this year. With Trump running for president again, our party’s work is more important than ever. Derek: Will you make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC now? Think of where we were two years ago. Millions of people were out of work. COVID was running rampant. The country seemed to be coming apart at the seams. But you kept the faith. You believed, like I did, that we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. That we needed to rebuild the backbone of this country: the middle class. That we needed to put unity over division. Truth over lies. Hope over fear. And thanks to you, we did. Today, we’ve created more jobs than any administration ever at this point in a presidency. Vaccines and tests are easily available for every American. We’ve worked with Republicans to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure. We’ve tackled the inflation crisis head-on by investing in our supply chain, and we’ve passed historic legislation to bring down costs for families. Millions of Americans will be relieved of crushing student debt. And we’ve made the single-biggest investment in climate in our nation’s history. Still, the battle for the soul of our nation was never going to be won in a single presidential election -- or a single midterm election. Just take a look at this last election: Our party’s work is about more than defeating Donald Trump. It’s about defeating Trumpism. It’s about being able to live in a country where neighbors aren’t pitted against each other. Where elected officials go to bat for the middle class. Where racism and violence are given no safe harbor. Keep the faith -- and remember to spread it. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Recount Could Defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbq9hj6ddvhvgf1qpjb2aev6tc5075hnimuca2o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slieepj2c5h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5agslaeprq7an4l14ksmpjks3j8qlpfmb95aag8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slieepj2c5h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkf6a7kuqt42nrpviedb81kd797477k3ck9s09b8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slieepj2c5h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfi7ba6085v16mk39ilnkeltvc09vhvn0pvof578_rp22sh2s8i66or0slieepj2c5h2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: How you can stop radicals from taking over
body:
The Radical Left isn’t just taking over our schools with their woke, Marxist ideas.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd7pkf835gmgpm68avi684lhq3tt99t7iqej05mg_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)

Friend,

The Radical Left isn't just taking over our schools with their woke, Marxist ideas. They are taking hold of the media, corporations, Big Tech companies, and every other aspect of American life.

**So how can you stop them?**

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF).

**America 's Future is a counter-force to these young radical leftists. We are training our own liberty-loving activists to combat Antifa and BLM.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer the rising generations opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

**We recently graduated 6 activists through our GO Fellowship to counter woke leftists!** During this 12-week program, community organizers train young activists on how to win on the grassroots level.

They leave this change-making program with the skills, relationships, and strategic plans needed to launch their own organizing project and start making a difference in their town.

Friend, to help support our Go Fellowship, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of the month.

[_**I invite you to partner with America 's Future today. Your gift of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 will have a huge impact on the next generation. Click here to give >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjvuof5aoblhm2q4850nqth6lc7v7iatg95qnqdg_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists.**

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.**

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

**Friend, help us empowers liberty activists through our Go Fellowship program. **

Click below to help us raise $25,000 before the end of the month.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpbikb99cnfdjk9nqc1b063eikrqhm611icutcu0_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztkp3fpf8v7i4sfrot5ghddf6kp1cmuthcku3tn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4norje6h2fr3352o562inpp8m773006605qok6o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo5mhqluckpdrcrogqh61pcinc006elgpkbt5sm0_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8749p4ndbvl8basfgf2o39g3pbkjmmddfdhiio_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0u3odr32lb0mimcos96eukguku9uj9v5gp9vt70_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdghbo16jpeolk3crc3cv6kanaaool4eu8dl7ng_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmokp0f4a7adlpr9jrqr3c3gm5oro7r82kfhhc8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)

We're working toward a time in America where young people collaborate to drive change in their communities - change that equips the individual to build a free and happy life.

**Your support helps young professionals collaborate with like-minded individuals and apply their skills to drive change toward a freer society. **

AF has created a growing national network of young professionals who advocate for freedom, personal responsibility, and a bright future for all.

[_**Now I 'm asking you, Friend, to get involved. **__**All you have to do is give**_ _**$10, $25, $50, or any amount today to show your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbek4cbmmloio53ilsi4vpksb6pebkqeodc90f68_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob6c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce. We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs. Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term. Friend, help us empowers liberty activists through our Go Fellowship program. Click below to help us raise $25,000 before the end of the month. We're working toward a time in America where young people collaborate to drive change in their communities - change that equips the individual to build a free and happy life. Your support helps young professionals collaborate with like-minded individuals and apply their skills to drive change toward a freer society. AF has created a growing national network of young professionals who advocate for freedom, personal responsibility, and a bright future for all. Thank you, Cindy Cerquitella Executive Director America's Future Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5lrdscclpk6f5o578k93hprv7l5i98qcniknpmg_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob5clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf702s7p86ido55qd1j5e3v7ngk41v674492hpu8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob5clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5rbu1pvcn3ijdiu8ce1jnl87sato7t09atuckg_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie6ob5clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! body:

[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq3ktq69eunimaiqqknjud67dvb8iqjbk070j8k8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlc1qj4d5mm1ij4s3jmlob4s5jm5p38ohimprb2d3iedg66ppkelr6edpn6arbfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e6qbad37mapmccdgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66or0slie1oj6clh2bs)

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5ap4kh5kn88c137bni7dd1pn34tuuaj7h78gk38_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie1oj6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfurvs5ltiqre4c8ajtip13mb3gvrgcnqpc4pso8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slie1oj6clh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Thank you and God Bless,

**Team Lauren**
Lauren Boebert for Congress

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Schools are missing this
body:
I’m not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that o
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2u7mo52bdg1beq4roif7906c0nd6a1ocgl0um6g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg60o34cdh2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, I’m not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that objectionable books were removed from the library.

The big story behind it all was that Christian parents and Muslim parents had united to demand removal of certain books from their public school library.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeag3fi3q46407bo4u1tcn4d107tpbkc475rbhj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg60o34cdh2bs)
---
| | When I saw it, I couldn’t help but ask a slightly different question: who will speak up for which books should be _in _public school libraries?

I’m glad that parents have freedom of speech to protest this—it’s one of the best things about our country. And public school libraries matter. It’s where kids go to pick books off the shelves that influence them at an early age.

That’s why I’m concerned about _putting books into libraries_. If all we do is remove books from libraries, they’ll eventually be empty.

But I want to put books into libraries that inspire kids to love liberty, learn more about our amazing country, and learn about classical economics and how the government should work.

A few years ago, these books didn’t exist, so I wrote them!

---
| | Now, the Tuttle Twins books have sold millions of copies. But they are largely nonexistent in public school libraries, where so many kids look for their next read.

I’d like to get a set of Tuttle Twins books in every public school library in America. And my friends at Moms for Liberty have stepped up to hand deliver them. Would you like to see a set of Tuttle Twins books in a library near you?

**[_If so, go here and tell me your ZIP code so I can have our friends at Moms for Liberty get a set delivered to a public school near you. _](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za37pcakh01q3i8i8ii0rn8v3ld1phb6ft9048fg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg60o34cdh2bs)
**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhmo05nbj9h3g8odpdk9em58b4elsq05trvr5eio_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg60o34cdh2bs)
---
| | Thanks for your support of this initiative. Let’s get better books into libraries for our kids and help them learn to love liberty at a young age. Sincerely,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
| | 2183 W Main St, Lehi, UT 84043, USA
Libertas Institute
---

name: Your America
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6325%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gvI9n159%2bUCzw%2ba5%2bfvyvw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82402%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ipu9k2YCIs6nBVUz4w7T8w&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82403%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x9rbPyV6GUfJTSJN8VvrSg&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6325%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gvI9n159%2bUCzw%2ba5%2bfvyvw&sysid=1)_
