subject: New surprise disaster will ensure Biden’sdefeat
body:
Joe Biden went public recently saying we will NOT have a recession. To be exact, the President said: “I don’t think there w
Dear Reader,
Joe Biden went public recently saying we will NOT have a recession.
To be exact, the President said: “I don’t think there will be a recession. If it is, it’ll be a very slight recession. That is, we’ll move down slightly.”
Of course, Fed Chair Jerome Powell said earlier that inflation would be “transitory.”
And before that, Ben Bernanke said the mortgage crisis was “likely to be contained.”
The point is, economic forecasts from Government officials have a history of being very, very wrong.
And that’s why one of the most successful businessmen in America over the past 50 years has come forward with a prediction of his own...
Bill Bonner is a 73-year-old, anti-social entrepreneur who is ultra-wealthy, and rarely appears in public.
Instead, he retreats to one of his six massive properties around the globe... in South America, Central America, the U.S.... and Europe.
But now...
From one of his spectacular homes overlooking one of Europe’s most beautiful rivers, Bill Bonner has just gone public with a big and urgent prediction...
**He says a looming crisis in America will catch Joe Biden and all of political progressives by surprise.**
I strongly encourage you to check this out. You’re unlikely to hear this message anywhere else, and the mainstream press likely won’t report on it for months to come.
And Bonner says we already know who Biden will blame if the next crisis plays out as he predicts.
Get the facts, and don’t get caught flat-footed. Bonner says there are **[4 critical steps](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4962ffd5511974gifebpvbo9odhc824n3mf39ug_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg68o72cth2bs)** every American should take immediately[.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfvv5kstcq7vndd6d5jelfjdptdr3oicafjrs54g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg68o72cth2bs)
We are in a very strange period of time in America right now... and perhaps some of the most difficult years in recent history.
We’ve posted Bonner’s Warning (plus his 4 recommended steps) on our website. [**Click here to view it for free...**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghv0meajntdsraifjkq0ldttu7jnar96f6j8qdg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg68o72cth2bs)
Sincerely,
Mike Palmer
Founding Partner, Stansberry Research
P.S. Although you’ve probably never heard of Bill Bonner, he has a knack for making extremely accurate and important macro-economic predictions.
In fact, he’s made 3 really big such predictions in his nearly 50-year career—and each one proved to be exactly right, although he was mocked each and every time.
Already, it looks like his 4th Prediction will be right yet again**.** If so, it will send the Biden Administration reeling... it’s going to have a huge impact on you and your money. [**To learn more click here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9utivtmlmo493j41a7os3shh41f0h7od0ooqa8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg68o72cth2bs)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0028%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=R7x3D0f5Y8nurLkplyFcbg&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yzav90lTA3eB2I1Re3iNOQ&sysid=1)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HIoCUBJskLxQyz14bo%2fB6w&sysid=1)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5N1izq8oyXjOZnbQzJzfuw&sysid=1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=En2EnF%2ff0%2fmRA8jDPoHvNg&sysid=1)
---
|
---

|

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zplfvsb3livn2f2c6pa5osoglno0ro9a8ro03md0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za31jim5r79ghncmsgvthb5tribeaobculg5oaq8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6m9mc55a5kpc5vttk3aag0fj6dd8jegu2pri40_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfmle0aqv442vgf3ebk6d9gr3qoq8dvlev6d4ato_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z26dpdc55u7r83lov7cnddf242bnug92t5rqfk1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeafqdhp513enae5acqmisebt6fsliosasbfli90_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg64pr2c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Go home, Mitch.
body:
The Democratic Senate majority we could have ...
| | | | |

| | |

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bc427e6-464b-4454-b962-c38707706897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[WE CAN RETIRE MITCH MCCONNELL ON DECEMBER 6TH. YOU READ THAT RIGHT, RETIRE HIM.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1eba377-94ca-4500-81ed-351fe6134b32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _**McConnell & Peter Thiel--weirdo billionaire obsessed with living forever, spent $50 million to prop up awful candidate and human, J.D. Vance, in Ohio. But it didn't get McConnell his white whale--a Senate majority that's ****seemingly all he lives for**** (Can't the man find a hobby??).**_ **_McConnell said before this election if he didn't get a majority he'd seriously consider retirement. Well, let's give the ole fella a push. By electing Raphael Warnock, gaining that 51st seat and putting McConnell that much further away from his dream--while Trump's antics undermine it further every day--a blow like this might just convince McConnell to walk away right now, as he said he was contemplating if he lost._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help retire Mitch McConnell**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b04eae4-331e-447f-a633-0dbc10a6f729/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Imagine, with one election: A bigger Democratic majority, no Senator Herschel Walker, a full term for all-star-Senator-and-person, Raphael Warnock, and NO MITCH MCCONNELL. Talk about dreaming, that's a dream I can do every night._** **[Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to defend Warnock's seat and sending McConnell into a retirement he sorely deserves?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f25b9a9-0864-41f5-bf9c-4374221098f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you for helping us end the reign of the most destructive U.S. Senator since Joseph McCarthy_**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7570%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=keddFClGjEmfKEdJYEONtw&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AVw3wSC9QUj0BYDpPn2MwA&sysid=1)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77108%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zDFgGdzQ0EcINhzsH7hPkw&sysid=1)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77109%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Qm3SIGGZX0MIQ1Z5dlJvg&sysid=1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77100%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AajLE9gpvjg%2f4Twd2thtCA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---
PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM
---

name: Lila Rose
subject: The FBI’s coming for pro-life people
body:
There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvjrq3ehs7hikgesrilcicj907m1a3llmj611dc0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6aob5c5h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsil33i9ql42tk6s4oho3j3e0kcl3bmt3fnq7aag_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6aob5c5h2bs)
---
#
Friend of life,

There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about.

Recently, California and Vermont voters approved a constitutional amendment to make abortion legal through birth, guaranteeing the ability to kill preborn children at any time during pregnancy and potentially even after birth, for any reason.

In Michigan, voters passed Proposal 3, which repealed the state's long-standing protection for human life that banned abortion.

In the pro-life and deeply Republican state of Kentucky, voters rejected a pro-life constitutional amendment that clarified that there was no right to abortion in the state Constitution, paving the way for activist judges in the state to reject their recent pro-life laws as "unconstitutional."

This is sickening and tragic. We need your help: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z98fjfjo539l114kdfk8s68329iaafe7do4v7otg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6aob5c5h2bs)**

Even pro-life states are now worse in a post-Roe v. Wade America than a pre-Roe v. Wade America.

We are seeing that many pro-life citizens are buying the lies of Big Abortion, unsure if they can stand 100% for life in the aftermath of Roe v. Wade. We must reach them before it's too late.

Your chance to stop this pro-death agenda is quickly disappearing. If we don't get the truth out to every American, we could lose all the progress we've made in this fight. Would you please pitch in right now? Every penny helps: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh3hq2vo55rfidhrg567av9io7vpf36nr7n3fksg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6aob5c5h2bs)**

Contrary to popular belief, the overturn of Roe v. Wade did not end abortion. In pro-abortion states and now even in pro-life states, it has had the effect of expanding abortion.

We must fight back.

Now is the time to increase our efforts and push back against the pro-death agenda of the abortion lobby. No one reaches more people online with the truth about abortion than Live Action. We are the organization with the proven track record to confront this head-on and win. But only if we have your support right now: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlfesbgl5j5v2j1hapurtfkdb3v8c6j0pc7dm2e8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6aob5c5h2bs)**

We are up against a billion-dollar industry with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education.

The recent elections saw unprecedented spending by Planned Parenthood and its allies to expand abortion and make sure human life is not protected by law at the state level. And this funding worked.

But Live Action's content is proven to change hearts and minds and save lives. We have the tools to end abortion in America and build a culture of life, but we need your help to reach more young people online before they fall for big abortion's propaganda.

It's critical that life must prevail in every state and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time.

Help protect these innocent children from abortion by making a donation to Live Action today.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

clean_body: There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about. | Friend of life, There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about. Recently, California and Vermont voters approved a constitutional amendment to make abortion legal through birth, guaranteeing the ability to kill preborn children at any time during pregnancy and potentially even after birth, for any reason. In Michigan, voters passed Proposal 3, which repealed the state's long-standing protection for human life that banned abortion. In the pro-life and deeply Republican state of Kentucky, voters rejected a pro-life constitutional amendment that clarified that there was no right to abortion in the state Constitution, paving the way for activist judges in the state to reject their recent pro-life laws as "unconstitutional." This is sickening and tragic. We need your help: Even pro-life states are now worse in a post-Roe v. Wade America than a pre-Roe v. Wade America. We are seeing that many pro-life citizens are buying the lies of Big Abortion, unsure if they can stand 100% for life in the aftermath of Roe v. Wade. We must reach them before it's too late. Your chance to stop this pro-death agenda is quickly disappearing. If we don't get the truth out to every American, we could lose all the progress we've made in this fight. Would you please pitch in right now? Every penny helps: Contrary to popular belief, the overturn of Roe v. Wade did not end abortion. In pro-abortion states and now even in pro-life states, it has had the effect of expanding abortion. We must fight back. Now is the time to increase our efforts and push back against the pro-death agenda of the abortion lobby. No one reaches more people online with the truth about abortion than Live Action. We are the organization with the proven track record to confront this head-on and win. But only if we have your support right now: We are up against a billion-dollar industry with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education. The recent elections saw unprecedented spending by Planned Parenthood and its allies to expand abortion and make sure human life is not protected by law at the state level. And this funding worked. But Live Action's content is proven to change hearts and minds and save lives. We have the tools to end abortion in America and build a culture of life, but we need your help to reach more young people online before they fall for big abortion's propaganda. It's critical that life must prevail in every state and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time. Help protect these innocent children from abortion by making a donation to Live Action today. For life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: NextGen America
subject: Urgent: The Senate is about to vote on marriage equality
body:
Urge your senators to codify same-sex marriage into law.

| | Friend, **As the midterm elections come to a close, Senate Democrats are jumping right into action.** Today, the Senate is set to vote on the Democrat-led Respect for Marriage Act —**a bill that protects the right to same-sex marriage, even if the Supreme Court overturns cases like _Obergefell v. Hodges._** Earlier this year, the conservative-led Supreme Court voted to strip us of our right to abortion, and we knew they wouldn’t stop there. **It was made abundantly clear that they’re coming for our civil rights — including our right to marry.** [We have the chance to protect our rights against attacks from far-right Republicans and the Supreme Court. Urge your senators to pass the Respect for Marriage Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54670911/379266198/334881485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI2NjNmOS1iNjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9hhLgPk4YLk-pzv1wvHf1oQvKAhbbK1KW6dEVtZi_E=&emci=328ead25-0365-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=2e2663f9-b665-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6787172) Here’s how the Respect for Marriage Act plans to protect our right to same-sex marriage:
* **Codifies marriage equality under federal law** , protecting couples regardless of the state they were married in

* Repeals the antiquated Defense of Marriage Act (DOMA), which narrowly defined marriage and banned federal recognition of same-sex marriage

* Provides additional legal protections, such as allowing the Attorney General or any individual discriminated against to take legal action

Young voters showed up for Democrats this election cycle, and now they’re showing up for us in Congress. Our generation deserves a country where the LGBTQ+ community can live freely, without looming threats from the far-right. The Respect for Marriage Act gets us one step closer to that.

We all deserve to marry who we love — no matter what the Supreme Court says. Urge your senators to vote YES on the Respect for Marriage Act today. | [Write your senators](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54670912/379266199/-1231202456?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI2NjNmOS1iNjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9hhLgPk4YLk-pzv1wvHf1oQvKAhbbK1KW6dEVtZi_E=&emci=328ead25-0365-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=2e2663f9-b665-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Thank you,
NextGen America

clean_body: Urge your senators to codify same-sex marriage into law. | | Friend, As the midterm elections come to a close, Senate Democrats are jumping right into action. Today, the Senate is set to vote on the Democrat-led Respect for Marriage Act —a bill that protects the right to same-sex marriage, even if the Supreme Court overturns cases like Obergefell v. Hodges. Earlier this year, the conservative-led Supreme Court voted to strip us of our right to abortion, and we knew they wouldn’t stop there. It was made abundantly clear that they’re coming for our civil rights — including our right to marry. Here’s how the Respect for Marriage Act plans to protect our right to same-sex marriage: Codifies marriage equality under federal law , protecting couples regardless of the state they were married in Repeals the antiquated Defense of Marriage Act (DOMA), which narrowly defined marriage and banned federal recognition of same-sex marriage Provides additional legal protections, such as allowing the Attorney General or any individual discriminated against to take legal action Young voters showed up for Democrats this election cycle, and now they’re showing up for us in Congress. Our generation deserves a country where the LGBTQ+ community can live freely, without looming threats from the far-right. The Respect for Marriage Act gets us one step closer to that. We all deserve to marry who we love — no matter what the Supreme Court says. Urge your senators to vote YES on the Respect for Marriage Act today. | "CTA Button" Thank you, NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhlp0uv9mr82jovcknu9rgkr38inifholmj6rgj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdg6eoj2cdh2bs)**_

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881740:6cMzjAGNv:m:1:3373497171:80C83306983BC7961F8F552E34E71815:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881740:6cMzjAGNv:m:1:3373497171:80C83306983BC7961F8F552E34E71815:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881740:6cMzjAGNv:m:1:3373497171:80C83306983BC7961F8F552E34E71815:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide. Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began. The deadline is TODAY. Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I just want to say thank you.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: Will you split $25 between me and Serve America right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.
With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between me and Serve America to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0029%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EO%2fG8pdsv1HaCTHODdyDWw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qzhS1sszvKnJZbsmzvvIuA&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EEn1mo9544PoEx10Qo3qOA&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vc1J4joJvm1izn1w6FyeoA&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d1yH58FIar5dPjkwfg%2fU0w&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DbS0%2fHYLu8i4FWep%2biGnKA&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LOHn1ENIVXeYXIZMMIHX4w&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vFhh8XBmlNLUfmMfiBob3Q&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GhZbM%2bDduKaS2p5%2flkJgbw&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40898%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fPWO6eAJ8JV%2fSJVgM1R1XQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40899%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uN%2fTltiEveJdHel7ZXn0YA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40890%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D7aBKOwQliO%2babMLCBt6%2fg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40891%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0srbxcZ7jlKl3Z2qHFRVKA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o8FYT7ImAYU9mPz7jg6Wxg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OezOvJSMyF3O8nPamhoaOA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40894%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gqoqkeBBnsMHqHvV1scWtg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40805%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ffcyOeQdxRQmQd8DzvP1Ug&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40806%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IGBnFuw%2bPzuPlVENmo2Bxw&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40807%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGCeflCJnnRRkt9jPWwAeA&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0029%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EO%2fG8pdsv1HaCTHODdyDWw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0029%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EO%2fG8pdsv1HaCTHODdyDWw&sysid=1)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running to be the 47th President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6322%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=g47apCuTdZ1ctcr%2f1Qcpdg&sysid=1)
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82417%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aETNQk2j%2b5x61HQGIcDNnQ&sysid=1)

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82418%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pOZOileRtzCdNCd2awGQKg&sysid=1)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024\. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82419%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UzRBZ2FdCQwXDZiuhXXkug&sysid=1)**_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82410%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PH5E230fW5kOYbW18VH6Yw&sysid=1)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82411%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3bu8GsjyKAwOH0RyaMa4RQ&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82412%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S03HrQu4Zzu106B34BAGtA&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82413%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y%2fefZ7R6Et2fzDngjj8Khg&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82414%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=omMMtIgNsAgA8%2bOsDEUS1A&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82425%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I3cihXhInSIdAfWUmGt4AA&sysid=1)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82426%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J6fpRlcUl%2b72GWJY4Ft1Yw&sysid=1)**_

Thank you,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82427%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Amq0iQdjV0BbLq5a73I15Q&sysid=1)
Donald J. Trump

**[CLAIM 13X-IMPACT>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82428%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4kwiPYBC4bxpZoQZK%2fYV9w&sysid=1)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883314:JQRMsAGYN:m:1:3331421248:A4F4904E3972FC455E5C2CF30499E447:r)**

body:
The so-called “Inflation Reduction Act” has passed! What will that infamous army of 87,000 new IRS agents created by the ne
The so-called "Inflation Reduction Act" has passed!
What will that infamous army of **87,000 new IRS agents** created by the new law do?
It has been pointed out that there are only around 600 billionaires in the country. You don't need 87,000 IRS agents to audit **them**.
You **would** need that many, however, to weaponize taxation and terrorize the middle class – YOU.
It just makes sense that they would come after the middle class and try to get at their retirement savings.
**[GET YOUR FREE PRECIOUS METALS INVESTOR KIT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsfj33p3hpd26gth8ip8v11p08ac8ro7q4cuvg2o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi60o72chh2bs)**
Americans hold, collectively, some $39 trillion in assets in retirement accounts. That's a lot of money – and Washington likely has its eye on those accounts!
After all, ask the bank robber why he robs banks and what does he say? Because that's where the money is.
**Retirement savings is where the money is.**
**Are your accounts vulnerable?**
**If you 're not balanced and diversified in a proper IRA, you could be vulnerable to inflation and possible sinking of the value of the dollar.**
**[Download your FREE Precious Metals Investor Kit Today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ouokk55uc6cs4fhn5ab40lchbpqa65fafi5m2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi60o72chh2bs)**

With CBDCs (Central Bank Digital Currencies) debanking political enemies becomes streamlined. CBDCs are programmable, centrally controlled digital currencies. Central banks and governments could track and trace every dollar spent in the economy.
And they could simply **shut off** your access to your digital dollars if you misbehave. If CBDCs are not already on your radar, they should be.
Find out how to protect yourself and your savings with one of the most powerful tools for financial privacy on the planet.
**[Download your FREE Precious Metals Investor Kit Today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6963c9aea1rplr0b0ivqniul0t4n3gbbdthel2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi60o72chh2bs)**

| | | Dear Friend \--

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82439%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eZJAhfnGQYn%2fSS9lpxeCJg&sysid=1)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rINld4XOfayC1uXE%2bNSDhg&sysid=1) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zIdwH00OEaFaFcxXIof%2fUw&sysid=1). Lauren Boebert

We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend \-- My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT. The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies. We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead. Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need. Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. | "URGENT: PITCH IN $10" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $25" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $50" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $100" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $250" | Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District RED is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN. Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and . We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need to do so. We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome. I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. For Freedom, Lauren Boebert U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado | | | | | | PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS | | | | Copyright(C) 2022, All rights reserved. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: re: Rep. Jamie Raskin’s jaw-dropping Jan. 6 evidence >>

body:

If you wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo).
---
**BREAKING: Democrat Jamie Raskin Slammed by MAGA Republicans After Most Recent Public Hearing** Rep. Jamie Raskin revealed JAW-DROPPING evidence exposing Trump and his MAGA mob for premeditating the deadly January 6 attack on our Capitol.

**But now, the GOP is furiously fighting back to SILENCE Jamie Raskin and let Trump and his cronies get away with their crimes.**

[So we’re rallying MASSIVE support for Rep. Raskin and sending him an urgent letter to thank him for his hard work on the January 6 Committee. We need to gather 50,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT so we can send the letter first thing in the morning. CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34372?t=8&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo) | [DONATE $7 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34372?t=9&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo)
---
**To: Rep. Jamie Raskin**
**From: A strong Democrat** Dear Congressman Raskin,

I can’t thank you enough for your hard work over the years and on the January 6 Committee to condemn far-right extremism in our country.

Thanks to the evidence you’ve revealed, we’re one step closer to finally holding Trump and his MAGA traitors accountable for their crimes in the horrific January 6 insurrection.

**I know it isn’t easy standing up to vicious GOP attacks, but your bravery and leadership is _exactly_ what our nation needs right now.** [**So today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to thank you for your heroic efforts and to keep electing incredible leaders like you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34372?t=10&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo) | [DONATE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34372?t=11&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo)
---
Sincerely,

A strong Democrat
| | Paid for by Voter Protection Project
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=3&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=4&akid=5384%2E878179%2EqE-DPo).**

name: American Firearms Association
subject: Hunter can have a gun, but not you
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "We
desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help
us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "Even the complete seizure of the guns you
own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, whether it's $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "Save the Second Amendment
today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885233:67vzTAGMN:m:1:3369487795:DA1190378C276278B4ADB9E2C6E9D565:r "PROTECT THE 2A!")
---
The American Firearms Association is a nonprofit organization registered in the state of Ohio. While contributions are limitless, they are not tax-deductible.

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883405:J2HXTAGN8:m:1:3317145305:77E7C11DB74C08978E65988B152B4A8F:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883405:J2HXTAGN8:m:1:3317145305:77E7C11DB74C08978E65988B152B4A8F:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883405:J2HXTAGN8:m:1:3317145305:77E7C11DB74C08978E65988B152B4A8F:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

subject: Tonight’s HUGE deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885425:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885425:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885426:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885427:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885428:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885429:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885425:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885425:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tonight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885425:JKdv8AGNI:m:1:3371220873:89C20672E1DD6D2366877D5AB76F4DFC:r)**

subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87485a5f2aae4bdf9fb5071dffc6a333&_e=Cbs7jv9VFCCtjiotUYIXEWmHDGD8925D3krm78DBcguJtLGocyPFjgZlLJ9VNZGU_xAGUpkXufJ2s1Y9fyrVxNmWcPpNB8O1ZCuz36PVN__qqHRRz4b2h_DcpThADXEIBymyG2YYAJzrCenawX3gMyinp4JWWgWnXMsIuZY2KbbnUzX2DUq4Hr04xgPuk2mqIih55dPR9jSM1IkpYkTAE4SxtKHbJ4204ClVpDVDtY3pNwyrSKu-Vfg_D8LFxjocvp8EfbeV23THId61C0b-LORnen84I_RDiz8XLqRA9xsB2Kwaopz_noaiPiximrFr3LIej6Pd8I7gVfQjrZkeCzI4UtQwjTa9BMKupnBEHz0kak4ONMCMvgd12HMQSexHLaxULey4mgUUBLbK82naHLQEAbh1HpyWVEQug5xvZNg%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87485a5f2aae4bdf9fb5071dffc6a333&_e=Cbs7jv9VFCCtjiotUYIXEWmHDGD8925D3krm78DBcguJtLGocyPFjgZlLJ9VNZGU_xAGUpkXufJ2s1Y9fyrVxNmWcPpNB8O1ZCuz36PVN__qqHRRz4b2h_DcpThADXEIBymyG2YYAJzrCenawX3gMyinp4JWWgWnXMsIuZY2KbbnUzX2DUq4Hr04xgPuk2mqIih55dPR9jSM1IkpYkTAE16BYNet2wOQneKCIHMWyXtMsKwSSkBNrD3FHBZfnf_dYegjOsD8WgQ1xDsthbTViPw6MCkr7Cqnjv7yIyj-up4jtfYTinxehUtFxjLUnIF7mkQi3Sz-2XxmRjYmR0WxMb1eacqSgAKAJiHX1menAB-6RYIQNnmwVW1Wgto6XjHxMglpAC-0jPUYnDLlv0XSq0U8itZlQKJwbBuWUoesDtQ%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

It’s time to dig in, get serious, and make a plan to fight back. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54681109/379308339/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmYxM2ZiYi1jNzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZbER7-oYyaSiECJHXZ8AaVfS30OEHAzB_2OEZqNN78=&emci=562fad3e-af65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=8ff13fbb-c765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43402272) | **Peter: Last night, Donald Trump announced that he will be running for President in 2024.** I have always stated unequivocally that there is no greater threat to America today than the ongoing attacks against our democracy. And at this moment, there is no greater threat to our democracy than to allow someone like Donald Trump – a twice-impeached former president who has stomped on our democratic institutions and cast doubt on our elections – to once again become the leader of our country. The anti-democratic forces unleashed by the former President continue to define his party and make the future of democracy in America more uncertain than ever. But now is not the time to panic – _it’s time to dig in, get serious, and make a plan to fight back. _ **Right now, we have the opportunity to put a firewall in place between our rights and Donald Trump by shoring up a strong Democratic Majority in the Senate. As Senator Rev. Warnock heads to a runoff against Trump-endorsed Herschel Walker on December 6th, we’re going all-in to help him win.[Split an immediate donation between my campaign and Rev. After campaigning for nearly a year up and down the state, I can tell you that Vermonters are seriously concerned for the future of our country, our elections, and the rise in fascism here and across the globe. _And they have every right to be concerned._
Trump’s consistent admiration of authoritarian dictators (Putin), his enthusiasm for insurrectionists (January 6th), and his willingness to throw our democracy under the bus when elections do not go his way are all extremely disturbing – and it makes him unfit to serve our nation.
**We need people of integrity in Washington now more than ever. Rev. clean_body: It’s time to dig in, get serious, and make a plan to fight back. | | Peter: Last night, Donald Trump announced that he will be running for President in 2024. I have always stated unequivocally that there is no greater threat to America today than the ongoing attacks against our democracy. And at this moment, there is no greater threat to our democracy than to allow someone like Donald Trump – a twice-impeached former president who has stomped on our democratic institutions and cast doubt on our elections – to once again become the leader of our country. The anti-democratic forces unleashed by the former President continue to define his party and make the future of democracy in America more uncertain than ever. But now is not the time to panic – it’s time to dig in, get serious, and make a plan to fight back. Right now, we have the opportunity to put a firewall in place between our rights and Donald Trump by shoring up a strong Democratic Majority in the Senate. As Senator Rev. Warnock heads to a runoff against Trump-endorsed Herschel Walker on December 6th, we’re going all-in to help him win.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = After campaigning for nearly a year up and down the state, I can tell you that Vermonters are seriously concerned for the future of our country, our elections, and the rise in fascism here and across the globe. And they have every right to be concerned. Trump’s consistent admiration of authoritarian dictators (Putin), his enthusiasm for insurrectionists (January 6th), and his willingness to throw our democracy under the bus when elections do not go his way are all extremely disturbing – and it makes him unfit to serve our nation. We need people of integrity in Washington now more than ever. Rev. Warnock and I will fight tooth-and-nail to defend our democracy, stand up to hatred, and stop Trump's election fraud conspiracies from becoming policies in Washington – but Rev. Warnock needs our help to cross the finish line. = = We’ve got this. Thank you, Becca Balint Congresswoman-Elect, VT-AL Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
| |

---

I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I've set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here's the situation:

My new book - "So Help Me God" \- will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy.

It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=274cdbab19d343fd8a63b2ef486ae221&_e=9ZGTpFzWZvznMSZmOtwWv4enHwUGUZCJjahxTV2iPZTHCl9c7Am_oLehMRYxBrLi6vA7kn1UbaYpbmaLa1fAsUqhb0mHqow05ePJgTT7K0kCcIlIwaupgvzMNjNh2PPtToKmjtu93x87U8gTyzyo2z_CdeCOzCrRZkrIivBbCm4dt7ePa3nrC6GZsSdj67mu0EMDq0QUaq1aUCRX4utiZ4--SAymqbTuW9s3h0UzssubkCdFOW9IwMk7YBxbUakWw-Uw2_zAmQO0GzthBzj8Asin_k9tPjPnGkiFYEGkCSd8hDBCwHhjJvHTCq2uRCw-oHpkLz4EOmY4XA-wXSlfj75KodtDc82F_l45r2za2vIs3DqNXDeQL4OvQvs2sDqu1HvLnvdMdZJItsLQvjEOZsU5ie05tzFULzekaoZze3B01BrvDv_S7SheuWSz0wCNJGMxHXP89KzvwpRO9k2PqA%3D%3D)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!

| | |
---
|
---
Peter: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885424:JLJokAGXN:m:1:3373497171:9EC4BE6C003EBE971DFD1FCB896840E5:r)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885424:JLJokAGXN:m:1:3373497171:9EC4BE6C003EBE971DFD1FCB896840E5:r)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885424:JLJokAGXN:m:1:3373497171:9EC4BE6C003EBE971DFD1FCB896840E5:r)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885424:JLJokAGXN:m:1:3373497171:9EC4BE6C003EBE971DFD1FCB896840E5:r)

|
---

subject: Passing the Respect for Marriage Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:

#

Team, Now that the Senate is back in session, we’re getting straight to addressing our top priorities, including passing the _Respect for Marriage Act_. This is a settled issue for everyday Americans. Our bill protects the right for individuals to marry who they love by codifying marriage equality into law. [**No one should be treated differently because of who they are or who they love. Please, stand with me this week as we work to pass the _Respect for Marriage Act_. Add your name in support of marriage equality >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54682997/379315848/387396923?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221116_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJmMTFlOC1jYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMAGnoZdtOADzqqo5hfcNuy3hB67WA6SpvbmVgAN0TU=&emci=cfdc0489-0d65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7abf11e8-cb65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54683006/379315862/387396923?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221116_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJmMTFlOC1jYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMAGnoZdtOADzqqo5hfcNuy3hB67WA6SpvbmVgAN0TU=&emci=cfdc0489-0d65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7abf11e8-cb65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2415496)
