[**Add your name to let me know I have your support as we work to pass the _Respect for Marriage Act_ in the Senate >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54683009/379315868/387396923?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221116_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWJmMTFlOC1jYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMAGnoZdtOADzqqo5hfcNuy3hB67WA6SpvbmVgAN0TU=&emci=cfdc0489-0d65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=7abf11e8-cb65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2415496)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Add your name: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels
body:
Biden must act now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ac2441f-c644-4863-b568-e820a322002c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ Last month, the President of Vanuatu, an island nation in the Pacific, made history by calling on the international community to negotiate a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty at the UN General Assembly. They were swiftly followed by Timor-Leste, another Pacific Island nation gravely endangered by the climate crisis. **[Sign the petition: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7b5b356-7165-47ca-aa83-3febb9555dee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty would be a binding international agreement to phase out fossil fuels while supporting dependent economies, workers, and communities to diversify away from fossil fuels. It would ensure 100% access to renewable energy globally and promote a just transition that leaves no one behind. Negotiating and signing a treaty like this would be a critical climate mitigation step on the path to a greener economy. As the [President of Vanuatu, Nikenike Vurobaravu](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90e90a3b-7fbc-43c3-b8c3-8eb7a2de0e05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), explains, “Every day, we are experiencing the debilitating consequences of the climate crisis...we are measuring climate change not in degrees of Celsius or tons of carbon, but in human lives.”
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc69f5952-f379-4b8c-acb2-4436e0b58236/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| As a global leader, the U.S. government must join other countries to support a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty and commit to phasing out fossil fuel production and fast-tracking progress towards safer and more cost-effective alternatives. [**We are stronger together. In advance of COP27, add your name and join in solidarity with the Pacific island nations calling for a fossil free future. Sign the petition: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4526cd92-de21-4f73-b720-1a8831d6597f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for all you do, Cliff
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T866022ec-eb88-4eed-9455-3337291bd177/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

subject: Who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885474:JyyK6AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:1CE0C1C2F1DA104A636CC385FE9E2B6B:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[_**If you want Ron DeSantis in the White House, then we need your help today. Please click here to help us recruit Ron to run against Biden >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885474:JyyK6AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:1CE0C1C2F1DA104A636CC385FE9E2B6B:r)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887639:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887640:J9uh6AG2N:m:1:3331703221:AB3A4F73B22A3E37FAD192B89BADCE3B:r)

name: Madison Horn
subject: It was an honor, thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
https://www.madisonhorn.com/ [https://www.madisonhorn.com/]
When I started this campaign, I made a pledge to myself, my staff, my volunteers, and the people of Oklahoma: I was going to work harder than any candidate in this race. I was going to travel farther, show up more often and get to know more people than any of my opponents. After more than a year and thousands of miles on our vehicles, I can confidently say that my team left it all on the table. I’ve said many times throughout the campaign that I have traveled to all 77 counties in Oklahoma multiple times over the last year. I say this because I believe that it is only by connecting with actual Oklahomans, seeing where they live and work and hearing their stories that I would be able to effectively represent their needs and concerns.
We weren’t like other campaigns and I’m not like other candidates. We never allowed any party or platform to box us in and, like many Oklahomans, we still believe that independent thinkers are vital to the future of our country and its democratic foundations. I am proud to have stood in this place because I know many are standing here with me. Oklahomans are tired of the same old rhetoric and gamesmanship. We’ve seen what happens when decades of ineffective leadership rot out institutions and lead to disenfranchisement. We’ve seen what happens when the extreme voices take up all the air in the room and crowd out sensible, intelligent, and compassionate leaders who seek to unify.
No more sacrificing health, civility, wisdom, and problem-solving on the altar of fear-based politics. No more sitting on the sidelines, being afraid to speak up, when our state and country remain under attack by those who seek to divide and consolidate their power. No more giving preference to the wealthy, powerful and well connected over serving those who need leaders with integrity to represent them. No more.
Thank you for your support and believing in my message to bring logic and civilly back to politics.
See you soon,
Madison Horn
https://www.madisonhorn.com/ [https://www.madisonhorn.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/ [https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/] https://twitter.com/madisonhornok [https://twitter.com/madisonhornok] https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok [https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok] https://www.linkedin.com/in/madison-horn-a16a9567/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/madison-horn-a16a9567/]

Oklahomans for Madison
PO Box 2601
Oklahoma City, OK 73101
United States

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Recount Could Defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!

| | |
---
|
---
Peter: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885335:6h3oLAGgN:m:1:3253819041:F377FE45591D2D05252F06E7B1728089:r)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885335:6h3oLAGgN:m:1:3253819041:F377FE45591D2D05252F06E7B1728089:r)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885335:6h3oLAGgN:m:1:3253819041:F377FE45591D2D05252F06E7B1728089:r)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885335:6h3oLAGgN:m:1:3253819041:F377FE45591D2D05252F06E7B1728089:r)
---
|

300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

| | | Peter,

**Lauren Boebert is in a HUGE fight in her too-close-to-call election.**

Democrats are pouring money into Aspen Adam Frisch's coffers, even though he is losing to Lauren with 1% of the vote left to be counted.

**Team Lauren**
Lauren Boebert for Congress

body:
The Federal Election Commission’s filing deadline for the runoff is tonight ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAIS
|
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj84s8iq8h7lb6pp41u6tr4q2jubn5q4f7brjat8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)

---
Fellow American,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Fellow American.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqatbs7e9qipk6v39shhseunjj3kdop7fi7h84o8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1tnjp0309i8qfl73c810ciemg9hr1f2a454i31o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)**

[** RUSH $34 -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfsocdidbgv3skso5gn5kilcai6m1cpb6rirido_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za26kq8jvc5gold7eneckk6egjp65hi4f4bqveho_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $50 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4dbkjnk0qak8em4phbof39con4oo1l0k0h9clb8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1172ge01tvo9vm8v5ntfdd8k75dt6ii03ecep00_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tonight!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zclepdodec2mhu37oulp4pltgursldvq98v5sgo0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36cth2bs)**

subject: Critical deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Federal Election Commission’s filing deadline for the runoff is tonight ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAIS
|
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0ckq59f45ieo5imumbqectrpc4nogd8tlvtrmr0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)

---
Fellow American,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Fellow American.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9fn10qr25hhldd2auh0f3016rmvja7bssgnm9jg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1oe8k610gf1o8pvukt89c5ekf1r62p8tk4dc848_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)**

[** RUSH $5 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z59ri17dhshbhupgfckajgcofgc0g8ln60nimrkg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)
[** RUSH $15 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znhe6v3ker2jrg653s2ijft8sfujgv4nvg17tctg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)
[** RUSH $34 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0h07ku3t8e94g73afobocsnjjcfdm1r59iu8rt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsojmvcotgct3jm3v09bn02b4g8svi0a9qhnojs8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $50 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoeq41kde3cm0mh0r6hjb04oert3b05h8d86pvvg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4kld2anquutvflj9r6ukre6ln8akc4mmhbnh1io_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tonight!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkjh7pl88f0bvgu10qmi58r1mh09fddchrcu5fog_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5b5i15pmd9dt1qnmjac2v4nmgvadibcg1c8vo8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdi61o36c5h2bs)

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. name: Connor Boyack
subject: Schools are missing this
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c595e0bb7fc46dbbf6580c5b25cf940&_e=k5-NlKhK_UL-cuq5iV8FcLDhNQqgtHKd-q43IiM83UBpB0qhUCnH7AD-x0r8YwJ5NQNy9-LUOdSb0HRUwJ4ebpL4-7HDsUbT8oaAtv3n5JFNskojykrppheqXxOAJxT-eGVl5DZ-XwLokeCkxt_3mlUAzVcje3qINAUucBI5ZO-ycWSCyPQnb-2OSYYTBKIi3qvpzxl2_Lqz9YipjLJGn5Upppvzistv-1cd_Vb5Mw1nfUNz8UKRHvofgNX-aUC65pBdTNDwRrFjaoMxU1gQFd9qko8MPH3CgnncOhKSNbmb5Iu2BkfvjsDzsxuFzpjCfx0Rv4Nm06FZnu2LaStUlg2O8XV6ej3fvR2SG4T63P0%3D)
---
| | Hi Friend, I'm not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that objectionable books were removed from the library.

The big story behind it all was that Christian parents and Muslim parents had united to demand removal of certain books from their public school library.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c595e0bb7fc46dbbf6580c5b25cf940&_e=k5-NlKhK_UL-cuq5iV8FcLDhNQqgtHKd-q43IiM83UBpB0qhUCnH7AD-x0r8YwJ5NQNy9-LUOdSb0HRUwJ4ebpL4-7HDsUbT8oaAtv3n5JFNskojykrppheqXxOAJxT-eGVl5DZ-XwLokeCkxt_3mlUAzVcje3qINAUucBI5ZO-ycWSCyPQnb-2OSYYTBKIi3qvpzxl2_Lqz9YipjLJGn-tir8N8J6usKkGnD1jvO6j75qXl0d0PmSl8AATpRr46ndTjNFeQPofOwjwIovJ8sxeg4TOH4_aBsEFtzp1sNmJHJZ9MGJMNQNq7WnexOsq1PsNqzANyP52JJXjs9IL8PPOitJaCJsY1KKbwhDGMm3M%3D)
---
| | When I saw it, I couldn't help but ask a slightly different question: who will speak up for which books should be _in _public school libraries?

I'm glad that parents have freedom of speech to protest this--it's one of the best things about our country. And public school libraries matter. It's where kids go to pick books off the shelves that influence them at an early age.

That's why I'm concerned about _putting books into libraries_. If all we do is remove books from libraries, they'll eventually be empty.

But I want to put books into libraries that inspire kids to love liberty, learn more about our amazing country, and learn about classical economics and how the government should work.

A few years ago, these books didn't exist, so I wrote them!

---
| | Now, the Tuttle Twins books have sold millions of copies. But they are largely nonexistent in public school libraries, where so many kids look for their next read.

I'd like to get a set of Tuttle Twins books in every public school library in America. And my friends at Moms for Liberty have stepped up to hand deliver them. Would you like to see a set of Tuttle Twins books in a library near you?

**[_If so, go here and tell me your ZIP code so I can have our friends at Moms for Liberty get a set delivered to a public school near you. _](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c595e0bb7fc46dbbf6580c5b25cf940&_e=k5-NlKhK_UL-cuq5iV8FcLDhNQqgtHKd-q43IiM83UBpB0qhUCnH7AD-x0r8YwJ5NQNy9-LUOdSb0HRUwJ4ebpL4-7HDsUbT8oaAtv3n5JFNskojykrppheqXxOAJxT-eGVl5DZ-XwLokeCkxt_3mlUAzVcje3qINAUucBI5ZO-ycWSCyPQnb-2OSYYTBKIi3qvpzxl2_Lqz9YipjLJGnx2g1ZxajjRIPmmmjNPEp6yPg9Swb1H21-w7Zwew9Jg8xdfAKqR6KwOoipNqdE5c_qKGF58eArwFi5FA13gnpIIYS0WNG3I4KtFcwnWctClKZtEkjucGbpxNtDEX-zq2X-16pPLq83xHGbdohR8MqsE%3D)
**
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c595e0bb7fc46dbbf6580c5b25cf940&_e=k5-NlKhK_UL-cuq5iV8FcLDhNQqgtHKd-q43IiM83UBpB0qhUCnH7AD-x0r8YwJ5NQNy9-LUOdSb0HRUwJ4ebpL4-7HDsUbT8oaAtv3n5JFNskojykrppheqXxOAJxT-eGVl5DZ-XwLokeCkxt_3mlUAzVcje3qINAUucBI5ZO-ycWSCyPQnb-2OSYYTBKIi3qvpzxl2_Lqz9YipjLJGn8M0eotGLr9x4g6NRCZ1wzDmh5DY6bS7nWT8BnP6lnSS-CoHVFFeTEilyOLyuKxIuLEbT3xwPwtm0yXCx_uenPBMbTTtrt85n8vy6D9dN3Pmz-hZ1nomXEJX-6diKB3IbIJrMQ7-mKiOKk7PCTmD-Gk%3D)
---
| | Thanks for your support of this initiative. Let's get better books into libraries for our kids and help them learn to love liberty at a young age. Sincerely,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
| | 2183 W Main St, Lehi, UT 84043, USA
Libertas Institute

Fellow Conservative: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_

body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61a760ccd75485abcd35ac718d89dd7&_e=movlIVfkaEhz65Muc-83u9dlVEQEEwhJdEB6yq93jLLn_rZ-C8y6NvYLGan0s_3bsDfx8VBkuwP6jU1Nj9WTSYwYc59pQQKr3mf048Ve8y_kIRn3Arv-ieB-5B36Q4LYH3CDfH7h0I8zAPRD0DegC5MJCYUAEXKjLix0gQ3h0fmRIM0NPafrBuXGccqLQhJ7Xxltoomxu8lwvziJ-Lf7tSEmrIHfuRrhZdLvLjUZ2ysnOi-4y7Rf8eX4F8Xz6LVBPS1eVw4Z1KYhqdwAhAy3zJdANRlADJ3WUAmZsHt5mwe_Jl0iYHetiRHTwZhV2H5XgEmaQXgU9_FjD0R72qJoQ6tWJYd58kwbXpFjbCbGOR01vHHCgk63vsmaIH5Sx01oLruUgM9Ojm2dxMtlLzKfWSt6WfBwhICB9mSyIc9KAN8%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61a760ccd75485abcd35ac718d89dd7&_e=movlIVfkaEhz65Muc-83u9dlVEQEEwhJdEB6yq93jLLn_rZ-C8y6NvYLGan0s_3bsDfx8VBkuwP6jU1Nj9WTSYwYc59pQQKr3mf048Ve8y_kIRn3Arv-ieB-5B36Q4LYH3CDfH7h0I8zAPRD0DegC5MJCYUAEXKjLix0gQ3h0fmRIM0NPafrBuXGccqLQhJ7Xxltoomxu8lwvziJ-Lf7tdKTGroaeYBggvapzMN_QNqCqCpW40HBSbi5cNIxDa9OFni8YF4CA86SdmlI0xg6-aeZHXWEo3yztKCX8jXFr3RVY6OAu1tudjSNzE3cmWyeD4BATryBIaYV8fTkyjjKv7AjeEREHu_uJN8LwLbNOoIFQWGyZsNqy21b8TLBeas7yBMb6roOWmOfDwLsnSuILXCtt27f0Zt7pSublKTQDOY%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: I’m challenging Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
It’s time for new leadership in the Senate that unites Republicans to advance a bold conservative agenda.| | | Peter, I wanted you to be one of the first to know. The status quo is broken in Washington, and big change is needed. It’s time for new leadership in the Senate that unites Republicans to advance a bold conservative agenda. name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: BIG NEWS - Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA endorses Lashrecse!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
We are excited to announce that Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA (PPAV) has endorsed our campaign for Virginia Senate in District 13! This is a historic and near unprecedented step as PPAV does not get involved in primary elections. However, they agree with us that reproductive health is too important an issue to leave to politicians like my opponent who has promised to support extremist GOP abortion bans.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
PPAV Executive Director Jamie Lockhart said,
“Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia is proud to endorse Lashrecse Aird to represent the people of Virginia’s 13th Senate District. Our rights are at risk and in Lashrecse we have a proven champion who will fight for our reproductive rights. We must elect reproductive health champion Lashrecse Aird in the 13th Senate District if we want to protect our freedoms.”
We are proud to accept PPAV’s endorsement, and ask you to join us in this critical work to protect reproductive health for all people. Can we count on you to join this movement and donate to our campaign? Whether it is $1 or $1000, your support is what makes our campaign successful.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
Thank you for your continued trust in our campaign for Virginia Senate District 13. Now let’s get to work and win.
Sincerely,
Lashrecse
https://www.facebook.com/lashrecse.aird [https://www.facebook.com/lashrecse.aird] https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird [https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird] https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/ [https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/] https://www.tiktok.com/@lashrecseaird [https://www.tiktok.com/@lashrecseaird]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/VXhHiX9aqU2_G1kIp6ZGpQ2?unsubscribedata=dFM79%2BJTHXXDIossXV9ax8%2BQkhoZCfcTXm5LJcvSPfichaOJ6XL%2FCjzhWtM4CfA1k8xHXhyhQrybKi2sPiNyRc9lVpklrV2WgW2pqbSQejntu7zyaCes939Kod8WIWTT4Us8VIPfsx6fcm0CX19i1FEE0HIec3J%2FULRjGZ1VtZFYuAfJ9DXmwB%2F36NgczdwEPR0KRRPWJkbVBz7T5kGGl8JMDAfKe0MamvLDhJyKPCzyZzJnOt%2BIknINmr4nY%2F3wyYZLMKahR3%2FuaXQ9nkgBqKl1r4eoHDSbMYQk9d2umdl9s7RUqi2pQLfH2hhZnfjH2tYntDqsccWAjga0%2BL7SJf4A4q9EdGvwRVhBZs7z53k2DjKRN%2FNYvAKJFCr%2BTNrfhxb7OWYzXApS97W%2BKIhC6UwUw3lBFLFz12LfD09ZZ9yegjHYbEpIEEe4cdVj4jXs .

name: Josh Harder
subject: the results are in!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/iZ0k-M6Qjj7zpSprhOBej5C0xd30fB6XYzkVN4g_6eQ=?refcode=E19445-20221115-VictoryEmail-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25) | Peter, I'm incredibly excited to share the news: WE'VE OFFICIALLY WON CALIFORNIA'S 9th DISTRICT! A massive drop of new ballots were released last night and they broke our way. I couldn't be happier. First off, thank you for your patience as we waited for vote totals to come in. We always knew this race was going to be close, especially if control of Congress came down to California, and man were we right. We ran this race with the conviction that hard work and staying true to our values would allow us to overcome a MAGA extremist - and the voters agreed. This was my daughter Lillian's first election, and I'm really proud she'll be able to look back at 2022 and know her dad helped fight back. I'm also realistic about the challenges ahead. It looks like Democrats are going to lose the House, which means Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene will hold outsized power. I know that for the next two years my job will be being a voice for the Valley and also, frankly, fighting to protect our country from their extremism. But I go into that fight with the knowledge that this incredible team has my back. To every one of you reading this email, thank you from the bottom of my heart. Your words of encouragement, your advice, and yes, your grassroots donations, fueled me and my team through the ups and downs of the past two years. I'm so honored to be serving you in Congress, and I promise to keep making you proud. We have a lot of work to do. Lowering the cost of living, child care, capping the price of prescription drugs, codifying abortion rights, tackling climate change, getting money out of politics, addressing the root causes of homelessness, and making sure every kid has food on their plate and a roof over their heads. That's what I plan to focus on. I hope you see this victory as yours as well. We did it! \- Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/inGNKUlR8i6HgBv-UN-Z3m0rZbv-s9OFYo13sDPVONM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/htNuyB0_rLsb9iGKri4Zp6gA302oXJmrVt86jeov5jM=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-9 is one of our country's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/RoZjeonskavjaPqltITAd2oM4tMAQIrdp_P2XAl7rGs=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/LYEo2jw3PTI14swo-JxZygvni_4gl5_iHEdwX8KZVQ8=) here.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/iZ0k-M6Qjj7zpSprhOBej5C0xd30fB6XYzkVN4g_6eQ=?refcode=E19445-20221115-VictoryEmail-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)

Josh is running for re-election to deliver for working families whose voices are too often ignored in DC. [**Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gE1AgzPZrEtew868GpGvoxiPTLe0TFVm3k3ScYlwD-s=/iZ0k-M6Qjj7zpSprhOBej5C0xd30fB6XYzkVN4g_6eQ=?refcode=E19445-20221115-VictoryEmail-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)

clean_body: | | Peter, I'm incredibly excited to share the news: WE'VE OFFICIALLY WON CALIFORNIA'S 9th DISTRICT! A massive drop of new ballots were released last night and they broke our way. I couldn't be happier. First off, thank you for your patience as we waited for vote totals to come in. We always knew this race was going to be close, especially if control of Congress came down to California, and man were we right. We ran this race with the conviction that hard work and staying true to our values would allow us to overcome a MAGA extremist - and the voters agreed. This was my daughter Lillian's first election, and I'm really proud she'll be able to look back at 2022 and know her dad helped fight back. I'm also realistic about the challenges ahead. It looks like Democrats are going to lose the House, which means Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene will hold outsized power. I know that for the next two years my job will be being a voice for the Valley and also, frankly, fighting to protect our country from their extremism. But I go into that fight with the knowledge that this incredible team has my back. To every one of you reading this email, thank you from the bottom of my heart. Your words of encouragement, your advice, and yes, your grassroots donations, fueled me and my team through the ups and downs of the past two years. I'm so honored to be serving you in Congress, and I promise to keep making you proud. We have a lot of work to do. Lowering the cost of living, child care, capping the price of prescription drugs, codifying abortion rights, tackling climate change, getting money out of politics, addressing the root causes of homelessness, and making sure every kid has food on their plate and a roof over their heads. That's what I plan to focus on. I hope you see this victory as yours as well. We did it! \- Josh * = =

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d00cc74e92af4688884c3c636d1b0ee2&_e=To1dCkxghYrIXz1nNaMoPxaauWRv3rIaZT-uhnAXdIkv0L92CU9S83IGBYXMROYOHDUrOX2KwstiGRmFixcdsjR6GSdY_jPBNSdn0mwMQg_vKco4Uo-KOvTrv02aJEAcXhOFv5x8JlfEdmHYnVvhfH1TxdgynFHbj0ZgQ-z_vH06Eo4mKvu71rF08fsmnk-X90J9-NFLVg3gfJyETgKci_qAeGvkZCGCnaDL0xFW1Jf0BCUObks2KejxltVDYUiAkrRiI9eMUlrUDD0iPAypbZZeF2ozsQhQ8NmgVonnfKUgSulMS6Mf_aWfF2BbJp9QD_tzzTxgOAy3VeRE7mI9_0uHRw7wti24rJxs_Zh3lVuBVlKPUdEQeEzIAGQnpuwzbYd1VJWHJcLt5c14fMvd6w6qZ8_IAr1_bOtRVsC4uiw%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d00cc74e92af4688884c3c636d1b0ee2&_e=To1dCkxghYrIXz1nNaMoPxaauWRv3rIaZT-uhnAXdIkv0L92CU9S83IGBYXMROYOHDUrOX2KwstiGRmFixcdsjR6GSdY_jPBNSdn0mwMQg_vKco4Uo-KOvTrv02aJEAcXhOFv5x8JlfEdmHYnVvhfH1TxdgynFHbj0ZgQ-z_vH06Eo4mKvu71rF08fsmnk-X90J9-NFLVg3gfJyETgKci37lJfiH5Pt2uFmBD0NLzYtzU7BNhGyGLMi171SpxMNxB3hNQ2zmSEwSnk8udMp50CKwDIQibhmHJHQihyVKf2-eSKVmBlj9nIZtelZWzg29klbpbTkFWP4dunCmEAM28mA5o6wdpTS4dcl9AK5gs_5PNkwEHo-6TCc200f786DlO9-QXqePE1_8pl1BnTAullepD6zfsP4tyOM1yBLZ5OE%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=d00cc74e92af4688884c3c636d1b0ee2&_t=Ei1ODd2NM8MJVEKQzdLz1gqFCNleEwm3CTxnT9ZyAXxczJoBg1BJ8yVAkBKsKVInJbPgVDTiFjXMo233ojHdSI1bk695mTJc8tyPFoHS3SfKotzkoo-bwsheVy54mPuPV7GtqSKfUVmJFfVS6nz-MhBTxE74ypjVldxx6IMTLMA%3D)

**Team Lauren**
Lauren Boebert for Congress

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

name: Ready for Ron
subject: Who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61886047:J5bV1AGN7:m:1:3345639852:1B8499333B39986EC928916688FD0A4C:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: My story speaks to exactly why I'm in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: With the runoff election less than 3 weeks away, I thought I'd take a moment to reach out and tell you a little bit more about myself. My story speaks to exactly why I'm in this fight – and it's important I share that with you.

First, here's a picture of me as a kid with a few of my siblings! (I'm in the bottom-right corner.)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670261/379262766/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)
I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents taught us the meaning of hard work and always said we could do _anything_ we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670262/379262773/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)
From there, I followed in the footsteps of my mom and dad – both preachers – and eventually worked my way up to become the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670263/379262775/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)
But I've always believed my impact doesn't stop at the church doors. That's just where it begins. That's why I ran for the U.S. Senate in the first place. Last year, with unprecedented grassroots support from folks like you, we made _history_. Now, I'm humbled to serve as Georgia's first Black senator and work hard to make sure every child can achieve their American dream – just like I did.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670264/379262776/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)
Here's the thing, friend: Keeping up this fight won't be easy.

**The only way I can continue being a voice for Georgians is with your help. ****That's why I'm personally asking:****[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help fuel our on-the-ground efforts to keep Georgia and this Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670265/379262777/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)**
Thank you for being part of our people-powered movement. As always, I'm so grateful for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670266/379262778/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5155-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=QpcqPbB0lIpmTZeVEDp8SBbLx15N3%2FzinO1QdMaVE%2FukWb0sJNldn8AVPdjODJOagjWo86hG0WMOq6oUKgYgRwVVOtNuzCGw6iyIm9IeQmjdO3xRdsWvGRAhsOxnJIm7UPacuHYMpfD0Tvc%2ByAiZklnIy%2B71keXbH4NwdqRGaKuYPtwrfeBmXiN%2BpibE4sySNXjKBVroL5TRIYLv8B%2F%2BYhgMoZsM4yF2KIvw4FVlZH%2BmSX41NideVUpF5IlDajGUpT0Ufwm28gq95%2Fjpoa59zmmoktLRjQi5s0pfNCOvd6fi7WjM7vufLQrz5yKcIXoiwBO1jPldOd%2B1Gxq2%2BrDPfVqQFbl%2FnwBSj9Fd%2B1CyEW%2F3W8EbDe995uy1c15w694GgTgW4nQVLCZ8YJHDI%2BDZoZ%2FSko0SVm0ZgESbbhkL4MQ%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54670267/379262779/-1565680314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRmNjA0ZS1hZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y421fF6LendArLIvWUCAnqU-tWXqGDeYUZOi83nCrbc=&emci=af26ae88-7b60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=9fdf604e-af65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379). | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.

name: Firearm Upgrades
subject: Leaked Memo Reveals Russia's Plans to Destroy America
body:
What's even more frightening is that Putin and Russia aren't the only enemies...
---
| We get this question a lot...
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6240/6374453/e5969cab1c1c7405e120f8c090bf700d86d89da4/18f2d8358bdfc2d046049e973efa24f8d7adee08) here at any time. "Upgrade Your Gear, Not Your Budget" November 16th, 2022
* * *
|
## Leaked Memo Reveals Putin's Devastating Plans for America...

This is terrifying news... but the writing has been on the wall for quite some time. A leaked intelligence memo from the _Task Force on National and Homeland Security_ just exposed Putin's devastating plans for America's power grid... ...And the bad news is if he decides to execute these plans it will cause a multi year blackout across the country and could kill of up to 90% of the U.S. population. What's even more frightening is that Putin and Russia aren't the only enemies that have the capability to launch this attack. According to top military sources, "Russia, China and a few other countries" can decimate our power grid and destroy our way of life in a matter of minutes... ...North Korea, Iran and Iraq are all on the brink of being able to do so too... ...And..._God forbid_... if the Taliban, ISIS or Al-Qaeda get their hands on this weapon it'll surely be LIGHTS OUT for America. If you think this sounds far-fetched then you should know that President Trump was very worried about this and knew that it was the undisputed #1 threat to our very existence. Unfortunately, within days of taking over as president, Joe Biden made the decision to undo many of Trump's policies which means America is now more vulnerable than ever! _So what exactly can you do to prepare you and your family for this UNIMAGINABLE CRISIS?_ Best selling author and freelance journalist Keith Jacobs just released a new book on getting your family prepared for this coming crisis called _The Great Dark Threat._ And in response to the coming crisis, he has worked out a deal with his publisher to [give away the first 500 copies for FREE](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6240/6374453/4f138e9e50326ca5b068b146a11a4581b8d70162/18f2d8358bdfc2d046049e973efa24f8d7adee08). _In this life-saving book, you'll discover:_
* What to expect should the unthinkable worse-cast scenario blackout event unfold. You'll learn the 18 sectors of industry that will be targeted and how exactly they will impact your chances of survival.
* What to do to survive the immediate aftermath of this devastating attack. You'll learn what to do to survive the first hours, days and weeks while others are falling by the wayside.
* How to build your own backup power source. You'll get step-by-step instructions for building your own backup power generator from scratch (no matter your skill level or budget).
* The 36 specific foods to stockpile to feed your family, plans for handing hygiene and sanitation when the toilets don't run plus the ultimate home and family defense supply list.

This is just a small sample of what you'll find in this handbook to surviving and they are [giving away FREE copies today](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6240/6374453/4f138e9e50326ca5b068b146a11a4581b8d70162/18f2d8358bdfc2d046049e973efa24f8d7adee08) (while supplies last). The bad news is these will run out fast. They could be gone by later today. Don't delay - claim your free copy now. Enter your shipping details here to get your copy of _The Great Dark Threat_ shipped to your doorstep. [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6240/6374453/4f138e9e50326ca5b068b146a11a4581b8d70162/18f2d8358bdfc2d046049e973efa24f8d7adee08)
##
##

subject: Would you please share your thoughts?

body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Although there are still races to be called right here in California, we wanted to check in with you in the wake of the midterm election. Would you take a moment to complete a quick survey?
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54695753/379338516/446174290?refcode=MT_EM_SV_3MO_20221116_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ4ODE2OC1kYzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e8QmTwiFx_vJLPNtNPg3KjRMx1qyhVfw1q2MmabgjXM=&emci=6bd88168-dc65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6ed88168-dc65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2678920)**
Despite polls claiming a red wave was on the way, Democrats made history this year by defying the odds and holding the Senate. As we wait for the final vote counts, we want to get right back to work and focus on issues that matter most to you. So Peter, what do you want us to focus on over the next two years?

_**[Please take a moment to fill out our survey and share your thoughts>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54695754/379338517/446174290?refcode=MT_EM_SV_3MO_20221116_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ4ODE2OC1kYzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e8QmTwiFx_vJLPNtNPg3KjRMx1qyhVfw1q2MmabgjXM=&emci=6bd88168-dc65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6ed88168-dc65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2678920)**_

Thank you,

Team Thompson

clean_body: | | | Peter, Although there are still races to be called right here in California, we wanted to check in with you in the wake of the midterm election. Would you take a moment to complete a quick survey? Despite polls claiming a red wave was on the way, Democrats made history this year by defying the odds and holding the Senate. As we wait for the final vote counts, we want to get right back to work and focus on issues that matter most to you. So Peter, what do you want us to focus on over the next two years? Thank you, Team Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump is running for president again in 2024, as we were all warned he would. We need to help the Democratic Party fight back ASAP against what’s sure to be two full years of wall-to-wall coverage of Trump’s latest insane rant. Can you stand with the DNC to help them counter his message, so President Biden can focus more on running the country?
body:
The media can never get enough of him
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0d252b6-0de5-4e36-b783-274b613818dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump dragged his lazy, criminally-inclined husk onto a stage last night in the wake of a stunning rebuke in the midterms, and attacks from his own party, and declared...something._** **I guess it's that he's running for President, though it seemed more like his usual free-style-grievance session filled with up-is-down logic about how "strong," and "prosperous" we were while he was soiling the Oval Office with his presence there. ** **[Trump's a laughing stock, but a dangerous one. So to stop him before he even gets started, can you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to the Democratic National Committee (DNC), to keep up the fight vs. Trump?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fb30ae6-3ce2-4b76-beab-4ca64a992d43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|

---
| | **_It was a good reminder, though, that this traitor who stole national security secrets, bowed to Putin, ignored and then lied about COVID, put the religious zealots on the Supreme Court who overturned Roe, profited from his presidency and generally acted like a child-having-a tantrum 24 hours a day, exhausting all of us, isn't going away. Not by a longshot._** **[Trump's a laughing stock, but the media never seems to get tired of giving him a big megaphone and helping him spread his message. So to stop him before he even gets started, can you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to the Democratic National Committee (DNC), to keep up the fight vs. Trump?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T214091bc-a091-4767-a194-3d9f61c3b502/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you friends--we MUST fight to ensure this man never again becomes President._**
---
Cliff

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883692:61okmAGiN:m:1:3331703221:55ED8BF5D98E46473D4FA388FD7DDA0F:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883692:61okmAGiN:m:1:3331703221:55ED8BF5D98E46473D4FA388FD7DDA0F:r)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61883692:61okmAGiN:m:1:3331703221:55ED8BF5D98E46473D4FA388FD7DDA0F:r)**

body:
Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc32ho0nbhmfq3f98ahbp19j4vo4dpor790tdl2o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic “escort” verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I’ll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9ges3or23u39084jpep5sj6e729oko7cm0ldve8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs) Now, I’ll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act – a law that dates back to Bill Clinton’s pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark’s arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled “NOT GUILTY!” to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That’s why I’m asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That’s why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** “ _We can get to you. We can get to your family._ ”That’s their message. That’s the “street justice” they’re looking to inflict.And it’s that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won’t be easy. And it won’t be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrv4fre5u4g3ngn8oiot12nmvv7rshf926q5it20_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general’s office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more – say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more – it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don’t have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from “Lady Justice” then the weaponization and the attacks won’t stop, _they’ll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl3crcq2g6uleovuv9r21o56f1l9bvbldajljb2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs), before it’s too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt1ilqmp8l6hro309fkrsqf4hoq7lf43nl99t66g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs)
---
P.S. There’s one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that’s why he was targeted. He doesn’t just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That’s why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). [**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbhger4onic052p3i72hamm26u1mqg67p1mfok78_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcqensegpi92h6m3qo3k7ukjs1850qo0kur8216g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpk3ult4ata77u7ludp645175nlnk8nnpo3hbp0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeurf74vsj204i9m068r8cq5tnfsavqpp8gta0ho_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6cob2cjh2bs)
---

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.
|

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9cc5grol6rhscpnb0k1umoqi0fh8bl3as6mpqho_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh68or2chh2bs)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfdansgise8og4748aj8oej5ou3vuqqve5ei863g_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkrmbft8gu0d8ds2jt0sqd7i800i8f3eab9k19kg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh68or2chh2bs)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh85hr1eqas9vkeo2itjjspooq1qq71tpjq7vllg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh68or2chh2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6lg5nmfg1a3s0ucv44ssj796l0q2879ichp7ubo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh68or2chh2bs)**

body:
Dear Friend,
They’ve been running the printing press full speed since the massive bailouts of 2009!
Then came TARP and Quantitative Easing with mountains of newly created money.
Finally, COVID-19 lockdowns brought round after round of stimulus checks to Main Street.
All created from thin air.
Every one of those newly created dollars devalues the dollars in YOUR pocket that YOU worked so hard for.
At last, the avalanche of inflation is crashing down upon us. Jamie Dimon of JP Morgan Chase is calling it an ECONOMIC HURRICANE.
Give us a call today at **1-800-656-6091** and be sure to ask for your **_FREE WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE!_**
What else is causing this hurricane for Americans?
Central banks around the world are beginning to shun the dollar.
Powerful countries are exploring ways to de-dollarize and set up competing reserve currencies.
More cheap dollars at home and less demand abroad means there is nowhere left for all those dollars to go.
Our supply chains remain struggling and broken.
As our dollars chase fewer and fewer goods here at home, your prices could continue to SKYROCKET.
America’s inflation nightmare is here – and so far its not transitory. A potentially **devastating spike** is ahead that could greatly **damage your savings** and your standard of living.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Washington’s plans to fight inflation – will your retirement accounts survive?
body:
The so-called "Inflation Reduction Act" has passed!
What will that infamous army of **87,000 new IRS agents** created by the new law do?
It has been pointed out that there are only around 600 billionaires in the country. You don't need 87,000 IRS agents to audit **them**.
You **would** need that many, however, to weaponize taxation and terrorize the middle class - YOU.
It just makes sense that they would come after the middle class and try to get at their retirement savings.
**[GET YOUR FREE PRECIOUS METALS INVESTOR KIT TODAY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9586b7536ce84a199fff12b3748c014f&_e=ZBA9CxOGEr7QG0IGE29sJL9U2Oc6Lx5OYfa28XeqwbAdxpW5XiJZERwqtOnmZnA8jtbCbC4LlNhyZVwFJqUo468Jd9e9GwzBtMJaEXu3zQ5opjpyrZHDQ43h9B9FlGt9fqEq1ANKCMYMfJ82rLIqigSBlqPceJ8J9usieu-PR64fKdK7S1oEwH9kJA7WlWPZM01kKzXodk9gi6cyWf1xYugAetT4VI1jOiogt0fgxUK7n2QfGrDPFkOj-7kCnGB5oh2bGWdwcQVmg2wtab7Nk7HSDRncugimSQP4ta2DlQ8FdOdP3dhv3ogPyz-UaMKqChXvHSB-LSgCRbqnoo9Scw%3D%3D)**
Americans hold, collectively, some $39 trillion in assets in retirement accounts. That's a lot of money - and Washington likely has its eye on those accounts!
After all, ask the bank robber why he robs banks and what does he say? Because that's where the money is.
**Retirement savings is where the money is.**
**Are your accounts vulnerable?**
**If you 're not balanced and diversified in a proper IRA, you could be vulnerable to inflation and possible sinking of the value of the dollar.**
**[Download your FREE Precious Metals Investor Kit Today](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9586b7536ce84a199fff12b3748c014f&_e=ZBA9CxOGEr7QG0IGE29sJL9U2Oc6Lx5OYfa28XeqwbAdxpW5XiJZERwqtOnmZnA8jtbCbC4LlNhyZVwFJqUo468Jd9e9GwzBtMJaEXu3zQ5opjpyrZHDQ43h9B9FlGt9fqEq1ANKCMYMfJ82rLIqigSBlqPceJ8J9usieu-PR64fKdK7S1oEwH9kJA7WlWPZStPCGCFEkneBztquFJ1x6ADbB-urAuGliClmyX2pGwwESKARxPkBZVbQzu6lXZIWe1hOen6syyEk-3j4GRUvKA_YZdaAycgG-li6cbAVSrbVapMDzrUAyVEhVvJkZSxCrkyXyxDYnGz5417WrIKbLg%3D%3D)**
**Worse, government snoops could literally TURN OFF your money with some terrifying new financial technology central banks are talking about.**
With CBDCs (Central Bank Digital Currencies) debanking political enemies becomes streamlined. CBDCs are programmable, centrally controlled digital currencies. Central banks and governments could track and trace every dollar spent in the economy.
And they could simply **shut off** your access to your digital dollars if you misbehave. If CBDCs are not already on your radar, they should be.
Find out how to protect yourself and your savings with one of the most powerful tools for financial privacy on the planet.
**[Download your FREE Precious Metals Investor Kit Today](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9586b7536ce84a199fff12b3748c014f&_e=ZBA9CxOGEr7QG0IGE29sJL9U2Oc6Lx5OYfa28XeqwbAdxpW5XiJZERwqtOnmZnA8jtbCbC4LlNhyZVwFJqUo468Jd9e9GwzBtMJaEXu3zQ5opjpyrZHDQ43h9B9FlGt9fqEq1ANKCMYMfJ82rLIqigSBlqPceJ8J9usieu-PR64fKdK7S1oEwH9kJA7WlWPZvq0qBrUEdr9DDKfD0IiMnMWV9WPYduk_JnRB9G3mek6psiomDieZvFHuNCGj7xwWlCGtTPt1Eih89M2OBbyl3n7E3yOHc74k3Q2addvT8WrbNhwFn0YIWbeIvVthL30jKspAA1vTNKWMsxPXUlNfYw%3D%3D)**
**Download the Investor Kit to discover:**
* 2 MORE reasons you should consider adding precious metals like physical gold & silver to your portfolio, that you might not have ever thought of!

* The difference between bullion, premium, semi-premium and numismatics - and how to choose

_... and much, much more!_

Lear Capital

Peter - I know you've heard a lot from me lately.

I've sent so many requests your way, and you've already done so much.

You and I both hoped we would win the election outright last Tuesday, but now we're in OVERTIME...so I still need you, Peter.

**The Federal Election Commission requires our campaign to report periodically how much we've raised. OUR FINAL FEC DEADLINE for the runoff is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!**

[** HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BEFORE 11:59 PM -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888472:JpmzyAGNP:m:1:3372944669:D9F288B5722A96522C4C1220261E1FA9:r)
We need to raise every single dollar possible to evict Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate. Unfortunately, **the Left is dumping tens of millions into his campaign to attack me, allowing him to spend massive amounts of money to mobilize every Democrat in Georgia.**

I'm relying on you, Peter. I'm relying on the people of Georgia and patriots around the country, not billionaires from New York or the Hollywood elite.

**[Please stand with me before this critical deadline by giving a generous donation before MIDNIGHT so it can be included in our FEC report. Will you help?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888472:JpmzyAGNP:m:1:3372944669:D9F288B5722A96522C4C1220261E1FA9:r)**

**[Even if you've given recently, would you please consider giving again?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888472:JpmzyAGNP:m:1:3372944669:D9F288B5722A96522C4C1220261E1FA9:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888472:JpmzyAGNP:m:1:3372944669:D9F288B5722A96522C4C1220261E1FA9:r)

Herschel Walker

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885622:JiBUyAGN7:m:1:3359512271:6E7FE232C29056A3FC070B354F76340D:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885622:JiBUyAGN7:m:1:3359512271:6E7FE232C29056A3FC070B354F76340D:r)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885622:JiBUyAGN7:m:1:3359512271:6E7FE232C29056A3FC070B354F76340D:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885622:JiBUyAGN7:m:1:3359512271:6E7FE232C29056A3FC070B354F76340D:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887636:6DxOyAGNA:m:1:3253819041:04F073006F6161CBE3C7484F5D0C86EE:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887636:6DxOyAGNA:m:1:3253819041:04F073006F6161CBE3C7484F5D0C86EE:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887636:6DxOyAGNA:m:1:3253819041:04F073006F6161CBE3C7484F5D0C86EE:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887636:6DxOyAGNA:m:1:3253819041:04F073006F6161CBE3C7484F5D0C86EE:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887636:6DxOyAGNA:m:1:3253819041:04F073006F6161CBE3C7484F5D0C86EE:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

This can't wait: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
[**If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Mark Kelly so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221116-1-7&t=1&akid=4771%2E6688874%2EsDQuJD)
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election.
**We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through:
[**Will you split $3 between me and Mark Kelly right now so we can win this runoff and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221116-1-7&t=2&akid=4771%2E6688874%2EsDQuJD)

---

Thank you for coming through when it matters most.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.
|
