Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8u8tpps5741emf26i9m0m99gpn49kogfib409f0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6aoj1cth2bs)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9umfgu348pnc57lemkpvqhnlt6tmkv6gqg9kvq8_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqvijc16o0hgkk88f5nbmoph4g9k8omsbd5ahao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6aoj1cth2bs)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9528uk67bo2rotlm424723vqvrsm17gpocm3a38_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6aoj1cth2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zakmk3l7uaip3eaepvjm5ql72r35t3jhqjvj3un0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6aoj1cth2bs)**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: Today is a big day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
We only have 22 days until the critical GA runoff, and we can't let Herschel fight for this seat alone. |
Fellow American - This is important.

There is one LAST financial reporting deadline before the runoff in Georgia - **tonight at midnight.** The numbers will be publicly reported, so Herschel Walker has to show up big.

I told Herschel that he could count on Team Graham to help finish strong on his final report, but we don't have much time left to help. [**Can you donate $5, $10, or more in the next hour?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

Raphael Warnock is the Senate's top fundraiser, and he outraised Herschel in every filing deadline before now. [**If we want Herschel to win the runoff on December 6th, we must help him put up major numbers on his final report.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

Please, Fellow American, Herschel needs our help now - [**so chip in at least $5 immediately.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

* * *

**From:** Herschel Walker
**Date:** Wednesday, November 16, 2022 at 8:54 AM
**Subject:** Today is a big day
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
Fellow American,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Fellow American.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline at midnight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)**

[** RUSH $5 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129552:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
[** RUSH $15 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129553:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
[** RUSH $34 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129554:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129555:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TODAY. **[So, if you can chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $50 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129551:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129556:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129556:sdNLY8DyN:m:1:877327319:8D9EF0EAEF08C70D0AFE3FDC7C3E1C2B:r)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Are you with me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter,

I need to know.

Have you given up?

**Donald Trump just declared he is running for re-election.**

The fake news media, the D.C. swamp, and Never Trump RINOs like Liz Cheney claim the MAGA movement is dead.

Big Tech, the Deep State, and the political establishment mobilized to silence America First conservatives.

I'm a proud Donald Trump Republican. And I'm ready to fight back.

**_Are you with me?_**

**[Will you help me fight for Donald Trump's America First agenda by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r)?** [**-> CHIP IN AND JOIN THE FIGHT<-**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) **Winning back a majority in the House of Representatives was just step one.**

There are miles of walls to build.

Millions of dollars of payoffs to the Biden crime family to investigate.

The swamp needs draining.

**But conservative elites that hang out at D.C. cocktail parties want to sell patriots like you on the idea we are in a post-Trump era.**

The same RINOs like Paul Ryan, who tried to stomp out the America First movement, are lined up against you and me again.

Our Republican Party cannot go back to the days of the Bush/Cheney era, which saw trillion-dollar Wall Street bailouts, open borders, and endless wars in the Middle East.

_That's why President Trump's 2024 re-election campaign is so necessary_.

Just like in 2016, Donald Trump and America First conservatives will have to defeat the lying propagandists in the press, Republican and Democrat ruling elites, corporate America, Hollywood, and Big Tech.

**Trump defeated the entire power structure before.**

And I stand ready to help President Trump win a second term that Democrats and the stole from him in 2020.

But I can't do it without your help.

**[So please chip in a contribution today, so I can keep fighting for Trump 2024](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r).** [**FIGHT FOR TRUMP
CHIP IN BELOW TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $5 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $17.76 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN $250 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61129550:W5T_Y8DNL:m:1:2365227053:6D56C833A910497BD1B3407E826E68C6:r) _Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

body:

| | | **ALERT: Rev. Raphael Warnock needs YOUR endorsement right now -- _his runoff is just WEEKS AWAY!_**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887714:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887715:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887716:JEstCAGNO:m:1:3317145305:3FACCFACC8B9331B56CEF7411D414385:r)
---

From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply.So please hurry. , before it's too late.For Life, Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54704160/379347069/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzMWYxMy1lNTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vJBk_t62nXFwq6RGNMKDSEyD3QfkojHAB7jUAW-Nis=) | Team,

Last night, former President Donald Trump officially announced his 2024 presidential campaign.

From denying the results of the 2020 election and putting our democracy at risk to stacking the Supreme Court with far-right judges that overturned reproductive rights, one thing is clear: _Ohioans can't afford another four years of Trump._

Here in Ohio, voters rejected three election-denying Trump Republicans in the most hotly contested House races, and instead elected Democrats Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, and re-elected Marcy Kaptur.

While we fell short of defeating Trump's hand-picked Senate campaign, Ohio Democrats showed that we can and must compete in Ohio. National Republicans had to spend over $30 million to get JD Vance over the finish line, and their focus on holding Ohio helped Democrats hold the Senate majority.

We are ready to keep fighting back against Trumpism, but it won't be easy. That's why we're counting on your continued support.

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54704384/379348074/-840396548?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221116trump_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDhmNDliMS1lNjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ilFl_LhrIj2LMP-cXYH_yXWAOIlsPYIyfldjEwNJYbc=)
---
Friends, It’s been a week since we won this critical U.S. House race and flipped NM-02 from red to blue. I’m still on cloud 9 and so grateful for your help in achieving this victory. In the days since, I’ve been busy traveling to Washington, D.C. and getting oriented with the rest of my fellow Congressmembers-elect. But I’m sure you saw the news: **last night, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again.** This man has lied time and time again, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories, tried to overturn the 2020 presidential election results in his favor, and inspired the violent insurrection on the U.S. Capitol in 2021. Throughout his four years in office, Trump sowed division and hatred through his words and dangerous agenda against immigrants, people of color, women, the LGBTQ community, and working families. He put himself before his country too many times to count. _We cannot forget any of that or let him get anywhere near the Oval Office again._ **While we must take this threat to our democracy and our country seriously, I am confident that we the people will once again come together to stand up for our shared values and stand against hate.** We did it this November. While pundits and pollsters warned of a massive red wave, we successfully flipped this toss-up seat, protected dozens of other crucial House seats, won multiple governor races, and held the Senate majority. We stopped election-denying MAGA extremists up and down the ballot across the country. I know we can, and will, do it again. **[While I’m getting settled in Washington and ready to get to work for the people of New Mexico, the truth is we have to rebuild our resources to stop Trump and far-right extremists in 2024. Will you help us fight back by pitching in a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54704385/379348075/-840396548?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221116trump_gv_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDhmNDliMS1lNjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ilFl_LhrIj2LMP-cXYH_yXWAOIlsPYIyfldjEwNJYbc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friends, It’s been a week since we won this critical U.S. House race and flipped NM-02 from red to blue. I’m still on cloud 9 and so grateful for your help in achieving this victory. In the days since, I’ve been busy traveling to Washington, D.C. and getting oriented with the rest of my fellow Congressmembers-elect. But I’m sure you saw the news: last night, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again. This man has lied time and time again, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories, tried to overturn the 2020 presidential election results in his favor, and inspired the violent insurrection on the U.S. Capitol in 2021. Throughout his four years in office, Trump sowed division and hatred through his words and dangerous agenda against immigrants, people of color, women, the LGBTQ community, and working families. He put himself before his country too many times to count. We cannot forget any of that or let him get anywhere near the Oval Office again. While we must take this threat to our democracy and our country seriously, I am confident that we the people will once again come together to stand up for our shared values and stand against hate. We did it this November. While pundits and pollsters warned of a massive red wave, we successfully flipped this toss-up seat, protected dozens of other crucial House seats, won multiple governor races, and held the Senate majority. We stopped election-denying MAGA extremists up and down the ballot across the country. I know we can, and will, do it again. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With Trump throwing his hat in the ring, we know things are about to get ugly with more name-calling, attacks, and conspiracy theories. But together, we can overcome the hatred and division and continue to move our country forward. Si se puede , Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb5ls8cto4c596pfqdg9is3rvqse6cutljd4vg80_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zftnsj6ntf3o7oocfm0336ii0ttklgfm67nnca28_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhq38f8kcd4vnhrtiseoac51661u6k3tvmdnld00_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zioi16km7vtijk4pk69fbrgh4drshg5s4ndse3kg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z488l1negbm69keelvtdrdnpmg7r67f9gopadsro_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo6tsgm2vu1efgur52koku05gav44o7ef7thcth8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdh6eo32chh2bs)

Lauren Boebert

body:

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61882416:JJrNbAGNg:m:1:3369487795:C04BF3B8CE4826EF181790CE9E559C2B:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61882416:JJrNbAGNg:m:1:3369487795:C04BF3B8CE4826EF181790CE9E559C2B:r)

name: Team Veronica
subject: Democracy won, friend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Team,

On November 8th, voters went to the polls, and their message could not have been more clear.

Americans rejected Republican fear-mongering and lies. All across the country, candidates who supported Trump's plot to steal the election came up short.

Instead, voters elected candidates with a vision for our country. They voted for affordable healthcare, climate action, and a fair economy for working people — and they delivered a strong mandate for President Biden's agenda. Democracy won.

But, the path ahead doesn't get easier, friend.

Republicans used their gerrymandered maps to win control of the House, and Trump's 2024 presidential run proves that right-wing extremism still appeals to many Americans.

Now more than ever, we must invest in our communities, mobilize working people, and build a broad coalition of voters to fight for our future.

That's why Team Veronica is going to continue organizing El Pasoans, registering new voters, and fighting for policies that strengthen the borderlands — whether it's an election year or not.

We're grateful to have you with us in that fight, friend.

— Team Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887702:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887703:JDvhbAGN5:m:1:3360412034:8CF2D1A6CFB564C56B5F48B25C38345F:r)

| Peter,
---
| The job that President Trump started is not finished...
There is still much of the Swamp to be drained at every level of our government.
And that's why Trump 2024 is so necessary - I'm ready to support him and once again be President Trump's #1 DEFENDER IN CONGRESS!

Peter, It’s official: Donald Trump is running for President in 2024. Trump’s hand-picked, pro-insurrection, election-denier candidates went down in flames across the country–including Blake Masters and Kari Lake right here in Arizona. In electing Katie Hobbs, re-electing Mark Kelly, and choosing Adrian Fontes as the next Secretary of State, Arizonans made it _very_ clear: there’s no place for election deniers in political office, in Arizona and elsewhere. We beat Trump before, and we’ll beat him again. And this time, while we’re at it, we’ll replace Kyrsten Sinema with a REAL Democrat. We shouldn’t have to worry which side Arizona’s Senator will be on when it comes to restoring abortion rights, defending voting rights, and confirming judges – but that’s where we are. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705584/379355767/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.16_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2I1OTRhOS1lYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khiEik8qvGBk9x69UcNMo-nBjQ6UGt0U4sgEsnDsbI8=)
Peter,

It’s only been one week since Election Day, but we’ve hit the ground running!

After celebrating our historic win together in Northeast Ohio, I flew to Washington, DC for New Member Orientation in preparation to be sworn in as the representative of Ohio’s 13th Congressional District.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705585/379355768/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.16_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2I1OTRhOS1lYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khiEik8qvGBk9x69UcNMo-nBjQ6UGt0U4sgEsnDsbI8=)**
I couldn’t be more excited to have the opportunity to meet the other incoming members and learn the ins-and-outs of serving in Congress.

Whether it’s learning about constituent services at home or the legislative process here in DC, my fellow new members and I are hard at work learning how to best serve the American people.

Peter, I’m eager to learn as much as I possibly can this week to ensure that, come January, I can immediately get to work fighting for you and your family. **Because fighting for Northeast Ohio has been – and always will be – my top priority.**

It will be the honor of my life to serve you in Congress. Thank you so much! Now, let’s get to work.

_Emilia_

_P.S._ If you are able, [**will you pitch in $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705586/379355769/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.16_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2I1OTRhOS1lYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khiEik8qvGBk9x69UcNMo-nBjQ6UGt0U4sgEsnDsbI8=) to ensure that Northeast Ohio can continue to have the best possible representation?
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705587/379355770/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.16_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2I1OTRhOS1lYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khiEik8qvGBk9x69UcNMo-nBjQ6UGt0U4sgEsnDsbI8=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705588/379355771/-1743402759?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.16_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2I1OTRhOS1lYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khiEik8qvGBk9x69UcNMo-nBjQ6UGt0U4sgEsnDsbI8=)

This road will not be easy, but if every red-blooded Patriot does their job, freedom WILL prevail. The Democrats want to distract you from EVERY problem they have created, but the American People will never fall for their tactics.

Your unwavering support is the backbone of my SAVE AMERICA movement, so I have **ACTIVATED** a **_1300%-IMPACT offer_** on ALL GIFTS made towards our _**Official Trump 2024 Victory Fund.**_

I'm counting on you, Peter.

subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887651:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887652:JeZVuAGhN:m:1:3331703221:33700A65CFDE97A06B4F86163D81A94C:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friend.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Reaching out on behalf of Sen. Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
#
Friends -
While we didn’t get the outcome we wanted in Wisconsin, the fight for our future is not over. Now is not the time to tune out — it’s the time to double down. **My friend Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock is facing a highly competitive race against Herschel Walker, and he needs our help.**
[**Sen. Warnock urgently needs us to win his Senate runoff. If you’re able, please rush a $3 to his campaign immediately.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221116-1-t1&t=1&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221116-1-t1&t=2&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
Sen. Warnock is no stranger to tough elections. In 2020, he defeated Kelly Loeffler in the Georgia Senate runoff, and in last week’s general election, he finished with a narrow lead of less than 1% of the statewide vote.
So he knows that what will determine who wins this runoff election on December 6 is this: having the resources to reach and turn out the most voters.
GOP super PACs and Mitch McConnnel’s dark money groups have already gotten a head start, announcing plans to invest millions into securing voters ahead of the runoff.
**We can deliver a win again for Georgia and our Democratic Senate majority, but only if Sen. Warnock can count on supporters like you when it matters most. And frankly, right now is one of those times.**
[**Will you chip in $3 to Sen. Warnock before his ultra-competitive runoff race so we can keep Georgia blue and expand the Senate majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221116-1-t1&t=3&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
We cannot afford to lose Sen. Warnock’s voice in the Senate — not when guaranteeing abortion access, and protecting democracy are on the line.
Thank you for joining me in this incredibly important fight.
– Mandela Barnes

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
Mandela is counting on people like you to fund this campaign. [**Make a contribution to stand with Mandela today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandela-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4087_196590_X04en8&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8)
Be sure to [**visit our campaign store**](https://store.mandelabarnes.com/?t=8&akid=4087%2E196590%2EX04en8) to check out all of the latest Mandela merchandise.
To receive important updates from our campaign, text JOIN to 99749 or [**if you're on a mobile device, follow this link to opt in to text updates.**](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
[](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive recurring text message updates from Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin, including by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Message and data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy](https://mandelabarnes.com/privacy-policy) and [Terms of Service](https://mandelabarnes.com/terms-of-service).
Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

In 2020, he defeated Kelly Loeffler in the Georgia Senate runoff, and in last week’s general election, he finished with a narrow lead of less than 1% of the statewide vote. So he knows that what will determine who wins this runoff election on December 6 is this: having the resources to reach and turn out the most voters. GOP super PACs and Mitch McConnnel’s dark money groups have already gotten a head start, announcing plans to invest millions into securing voters ahead of the runoff. We can deliver a win again for Georgia and our Democratic Senate majority, but only if Sen. Warnock can count on supporters like you when it matters most. And frankly, right now is one of those times. We cannot afford to lose Sen. Warnock’s voice in the Senate — not when guaranteeing abortion access, and protecting democracy are on the line. Thank you for joining me in this incredibly important fight. – Mandela Barnes

name: =?utf-8?Q?Aaron=20Rice?=
subject: MJI Fights to Protect the Right to Life in Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132680?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The Mississippi Justice Institute (MJI) filed a lawsuit on Monday that seeks to establish that the Mississippi Constitution does not protect the right to abortion.** That question has come into sharp focus since July 7, 2022, when the state enacted a ban on elective abortions.

Here’s what you need to know about the suit, filed against state medical officials on behalf of the American Association of Pro-Life Physicians (AAPLOG), which is represented by MJI:
---
|
---
| **1. Whether Abortion is a Constitutional Right Has Not Been Fully Settled.**

On June 24, 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court handed down its opinion in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization, overruling Roe v. Wade, which held that the U.S. Constitution protected a right to seek an abortion, and returned control of abortion policy from federal courts back to the states. But a similar opinion by the Mississippi Supreme Court, named Pro-Choice Mississippi v. Fordice, still holds that abortion is a right protected by the Mississippi Constitution.

Every state has its own constitution. While state constitutions cannot restrict rights secured by the federal Constitution, they can offer greater protection of rights than that afforded under the U.S. Constitution.

Because the Fordice opinion relied heavily on Roe and Casey – cases which the U.S. Supreme Court has now said were “egregiously wrong” – the rationale for the supposed state constitutional right to abortion appears now to be invalid. But the Mississippi Supreme Court has not yet had the opportunity to overrule its opinion in Fordice. So, as of today, elective abortions in Mississippi seem to be both statutorily illegal and constitutionally protected at the same time.

The lawsuit filed by MJI seeks to clarify this legal uncertainty and establish that abortion is not protected by the Mississippi Constitution and that the state’s elective abortion ban is valid.

**2\. The Validity of Mississippi’s Elective Abortion Ban is Uncertain.**

Mississippi’s elective abortion ban conflicts with the Mississippi Supreme Court’s opinion in Fordice and has already been subject to a state constitutional challenge by an abortion clinic. After failing to secure the right to continue performing abortions while that lawsuit was pending, the abortion clinic abandoned its suit and moved to another state. However, until the Fordice opinion is overruled or recognized as no longer good law, Mississippi’s elective abortion ban will remain vulnerable to legal challenges.

**3. Pro-Life Physicians Are Being Pressured to Violate their Conscience.**

AAPLOG is the largest organization of pro-life obstetrician-gynecologists in the world. AAPLOG includes obstetrician-gynecologists and other physicians, with over 6,000 medical professionals nationwide. AAPLOG members oppose elective abortion and are committed to the care and well-being of their patients including both pregnant women and their unborn children.

AAPLOG filed suit to defend the conscience rights of its members in Mississippi. Many professional medical associations have sought for years to advocate for pro-abortion political positions, rather than focusing on their missions of upholding medical standards. Even worse, those medical organizations have continuously sought to violate the conscience rights of pro-life physicians by forcing them to provide or refer patients for elective abortions. Several of those organizations have issued guidelines suggesting that it is unethical, and potentially punishable by the government, for physicians who oppose elective abortion to refuse to provide or refer patients to other providers for lawful, elective abortions.

By establishing that Mississippi’s elective abortion ban is constitutional, AAPLOG hopes to finally put an end to those intimidation tactics and to defend the right to life in Mississippi.

**4\. If Successful, the Lawsuit Would End Court-Imposed, Elective Abortion Policy in Mississippi.**

The people of Mississippi have long sought to protect the lives of unborn children. However, in 1973, those efforts came to a near halt following the U.S. Supreme Court’s infamous opinion in Roe v. Wade.

For 49 years, abortion policy was removed from the democratic process and decided by federal courts. Now, the U.S. Supreme Court has returned control over abortion policy back to the states, where it rightly belongs. But Mississippi’s own courts have not yet had the chance to similarly relinquish control over abortion policy. If the lawsuit is successful, Mississippi’s courts will now recognize that abortion policy is for the people of Mississippi to decide, not the state’s judges.

Mississippi has led the charge to protect life, and with this lawsuit, Mississippi will continue to lead the way.

A copy of the lawsuit can be found [here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a9cb44b143&e=5703353baa)
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a5971b3b5a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
In Liberty,

Aaron Rice
Mississippi Justice Institute Director

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6f8fb948aa) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6f8fb948aa).

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61882614:JJfalAGNj:m:1:3368395361:D3DB8FEF2CACA3FBB04FAB356CEB4A56:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

---
Peter,
---
Herschel Walker is on the 1-yard line and he's counting on us to help him punch the ball into the endzone with just weeks to go until his runoff election.
---
_An overtime victory for Herschel is our last line of defense to STOP Kamala from gaining a 51-seat majority in the Senate._
---
**But there 's one major problem: _Herschel was just OUTRAISED 2:1 by radical liberal Raphael Warnock in the final stretch!_ **
---
And now, with the runoff drawing MILLIONS in dark money from far-left Super PACs to attack Herschel, he needs our help to ensure these FINAL WEEKS of his campaign are fully funded.
---
[**Please make an urgent contribution to our RUNOFF VICTORY FUND to help ensure Herschel Walker has every last dollar he needs to FLIP this Senate seat.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887980:679glAG9N:m:1:3361486117:1F12856043D998DA07FD46C0A06006D0:r)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61887980:679glAG9N:m:1:3361486117:1F12856043D998DA07FD46C0A06006D0:r)
---

It's crystal clear what's at stake here in Georgia, Peter.
---
**_There 's no denying that this 1 FINAL SEAT in the Senate will decide the fate of Congress for years to come. _**
---
Herschel Walker isn't _just_ fighting to flip this seat; he's fighting to stop Kamala from turning the Senate into one of the most radical and extreme majorities our country has ever seen.

This is urgent, friend: **Donald Trump just announced he's running for President in 2024.**
We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump's handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker. **[So please, at this critical moment, will you rush a donation to help Rev. Warnock keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54707027/379362217/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3812-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE3M2JhOC1mMjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqqMyUEisK2lRy7umpywXkvI5mu0mkuGPFJ2Sj_3EA8=)** Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat.
**Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.**
**We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short.**
**[So please, will you rush $5 or more split between Kirsten Gillibrand and Rev. name: Warnock Campaign Team
subject: Friend, will you help power our on-the-ground voter outreach efforts?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Big news, friend: There are only a few weeks left to power our on-the-ground organizing efforts, reach undecided voters, and win this runoff election!
We’re launching strong voter outreach in all corners of our state. But as we're getting closer to Dec. 6th, that also means more expenses to:
**📋 Hire the best field organizers to get out the vote**
**🚪 Pass out yard signs and flyers to all our supporters**
**🍕 Keep our volunteers fueled with pizza and snacks**
And this new effort couldn't have come at a better time: Experts are predicting this race will be incredibly close. The general election results show me with a narrow lead over my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker – which means we can't cede any ground in this runoff!

**I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I mean it when I say your grassroots support is essential to powering our movement forward.[So please, friend, will you give $5 or more right now to fund the critical investments that will help us win in Georgia and keep this Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54681867/379310914/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5092-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYxYzE2YS1jODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixny25eT-gmHC3MCT2hIXYwclkcmqC_Ob-h2C8heOCM=)**
Every bit of your support goes a long way. Thank you so much.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me, _[ **please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54681868/379310915/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5092-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYxYzE2YS1jODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixny25eT-gmHC3MCT2hIXYwclkcmqC_Ob-h2C8heOCM=)_ If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **text “GEORGIA” to 52005.**

Thank you!

– Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54681869/379310916/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5092-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYxYzE2YS1jODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixny25eT-gmHC3MCT2hIXYwclkcmqC_Ob-h2C8heOCM=) **Text GEORGIA to 52005 •[Visit our Team Warnock Store](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54681870/379310917/-1115795912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTYxYzE2YS1jODY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixny25eT-gmHC3MCT2hIXYwclkcmqC_Ob-h2C8heOCM=&emci=45dbe957-1365-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=8a61c16a-c865-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379) **

clean_body: | | | Big news, friend: There are only a few weeks left to power our on-the-ground organizing efforts, reach undecided voters, and win this runoff election! We’re launching strong voter outreach in all corners of our state. But as we're getting closer to Dec. 6th, that also means more expenses to: 📋 Hire the best field organizers to get out the vote 🚪 Pass out yard signs and flyers to all our supporters 🍕 Keep our volunteers fueled with pizza and snacks And this new effort couldn't have come at a better time: Experts are predicting this race will be incredibly close. The general election results show me with a narrow lead over my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker – which means we can't cede any ground in this runoff! I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I mean it when I say your grassroots support is essential to powering our movement forward.= Every bit of your support goes a long way. Thank you so much. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win. Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. If you’re with me, = If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text “GEORGIA” to 52005. Thank you! – Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock = Text GEORGIA to 52005 • | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! The outcome of this Senate race in Georgia will have an astronomical impact on the lives of not just Georgians, but all of us.

Herschel Walker’s views are downright dangerous. Instead of fighting for the expansion of our voting rights, he’d rather limit who has access to the ballot box. Instead of lowering prescription drug costs and capping the price of insulin, he’d rather tell Americans to just “eat right.” And instead of striving for an economy that works for all, Herschel Walker would rather hand out tax breaks to his millionaire buddies.

Herschel Walker is not the leader we need, in Georgia or anywhere for that matter. That’s why we must help my friend, Raphael Warnock, come out on top in this critical runoff election.
[**The best way to ensure that happens is to make sure Team Warnock has the resources they need to refund their field program and reorganize their efforts. It’s going to take all of us coming together to come out on top in this race, so I need you with me. Will you join me in fighting to keep Georgia blue by splitting a contribution of $10 between myself and Sen. name: Raphael Warnock

body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34718?t=6&akid=5389%2E878179%2EZHR5uS) Hi, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. **In a race this _neck and neck,_ every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $7 or more now – split between me and Voter Protection Project – to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34718?t=7&akid=5389%2E878179%2EZHR5uS)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34719?t=8&akid=5389%2E878179%2EZHR5uS)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5389%2E878179%2EZHR5uS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5389%2E878179%2EZHR5uS).**

clean_body: | Hi, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue. But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this neck and neck, every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Social Security has provided seniors with help paying for bills, groceries, and other expenses for over 87 years. But Republicans have historically opposed pro-Social Security legislation – they’d rather give handouts to their conservative billionaire buddies than help seniors in need. That’s why our polling division has launched a new research poll to gauge support for Social Security. | | \-- Team Ruiz Polling Division | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

name: Indivisible (via Left Action)
subject: Trump is officially running in 2024. Here's our plan to defeat him (again)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Folks, **It’s official: Donald Trump is running for president...again. ** Last night’s deplorable announcement comes after voters across the country issued a resounding rejection of MAGA through last week's midterm elections, but we know Trump and his cronies are not backing down. January 6th was a preview of their intentions for our democracy -- and if they can amass enough support and resources over the next two years, they could once again seize power. This nightmare scenario does not have to be our reality. Thanks to Indivisibles and grassroots activists across the country, we held the Senate and staved off the red wave in a historic over-performance for Democrats. But the forces supporting Trump, from election deniers to self-proclaimed moderates, will not go quietly. Everything we care about -- from controlling our own bodies, to accessing quality health care, to loving who we love, to keeping our families safe from gun violence, to voting and having our vote count -- remains at risk. **Indivisible was built by thousands of volunteers and activists specifically for this fight, for this moment.** **In 2020, we defeated Trump.** **In 2022, we defeated MAGA candidates up and down the ballot.** **In 2024, we'll do it again.** **First:[Sign up to tell us that you’re all in to join our Defeat Trump Save Democracy campaign to stop MAGA mayhem for good.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68e8e161-1fa4-48e6-a5b1-6d8ff19ae36d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Two years ago, Trump incited and encouraged his hateful followers to lead a violent insurrection. We’re marking the anniversary of the January 6th attack on our country by kicking off our campaign to beat him, hosting rallies and public-facing events to show MAGA and the country that we are fighters. And we are ready to beat him one more time, right where it counts: at the ballot box. Sign up now to get everything you need to organize or attend an event in your community, and we’ll be in touch with event ideas, messaging guidance, and more. **Then:[Make sure you’re registered for our national call TODAY, November 16 at 8pm Eastern Time/5pm Pacific Time.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T852f38d2-97b1-4f84-a643-6d5fa901951f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Trump's candidacy impacts our plans for the year ahead, but Indivisible is ready to respond. Join us tomorrow to discuss our response to Trump's announcement, our work in Georgia for the runoff elections next month, and how we're making the most of these final weeks of the current Congress to pass as many of our priorities as we can. **Finally: It’s going to take a massive investment to fund our work over the next two years to ensure Trump remains a one-term president.** Our campaign to win in 2020 required tens of millions of dollars to mobilize and train tens of thousands of volunteers; recruit new people to their local Indivisible groups; provide voter contact resources, tools, and technology to our entire network; and make sure we were running radio, TV, and digital ads throughout the cycle to persuade and turn out key voters. **[We can’t wait -- the work to defeat Trump begins now. Click here to donate $40, or whatever you can, to make sure we have all the resources we need to organize and win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T706a9f45-1186-4f1d-b234-c5ee0111f2ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express Lane, your donation to Indivisible Action will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $40>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cc9d504-d136-4bbc-8fd2-ce56a40fa511/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Donate $60>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2df0361d-984a-4b81-9700-9fef540505db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Donate $80>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3fa5c79-aae4-42f1-96ef-3faaddb4bb89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Donate another amount>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T048a6c49-a60b-4c14-8f66-049356d453ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We'll share more updates in the coming weeks on our campaign. Together, we'll do what Indivisible does best: Organize and beat Donald Trump. Thanks for staying in the fight with us. In solidarity, Indivisible Team _Not authorized by any candidate, candidate’s agent, or campaign committee. Paid for with regulated funds by Indivisible Action, PO Box 43135, Washington, DC 20010._

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Folks, It’s official: Donald Trump is running for president...again. Last night’s deplorable announcement comes after voters across the country issued a resounding rejection of MAGA through last week's midterm elections, but we know Trump and his cronies are not backing down. January 6th was a preview of their intentions for our democracy -- and if they can amass enough support and resources over the next two years, they could once again seize power. This nightmare scenario does not have to be our reality. Thanks to Indivisibles and grassroots activists across the country, we held the Senate and staved off the red wave in a historic over-performance for Democrats. But the forces supporting Trump, from election deniers to self-proclaimed moderates, will not go quietly. Everything we care about -- from controlling our own bodies, to accessing quality health care, to loving who we love, to keeping our families safe from gun violence, to voting and having our vote count -- remains at risk. Indivisible was built by thousands of volunteers and activists specifically for this fight, for this moment. In 2020, we defeated Trump. In 2022, we defeated MAGA candidates up and down the ballot. In 2024, we'll do it again. First: Two years ago, Trump incited and encouraged his hateful followers to lead a violent insurrection. We’re marking the anniversary of the January 6th attack on our country by kicking off our campaign to beat him, hosting rallies and public-facing events to show MAGA and the country that we are fighters. And we are ready to beat him one more time, right where it counts: at the ballot box. Sign up now to get everything you need to organize or attend an event in your community, and we’ll be in touch with event ideas, messaging guidance, and more. Then: Trump's candidacy impacts our plans for the year ahead, but Indivisible is ready to respond. Join us tomorrow to discuss our response to Trump's announcement, our work in Georgia for the runoff elections next month, and how we're making the most of these final weeks of the current Congress to pass as many of our priorities as we can. Finally: It’s going to take a massive investment to fund our work over the next two years to ensure Trump remains a one-term president. Our campaign to win in 2020 required tens of millions of dollars to mobilize and train tens of thousands of volunteers; recruit new people to their local Indivisible groups; provide voter contact resources, tools, and technology to our entire network; and make sure we were running radio, TV, and digital ads throughout the cycle to persuade and turn out key voters. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express Lane, your donation to Indivisible Action will go through immediately: We'll share more updates in the coming weeks on our campaign. Together, we'll do what Indivisible does best: Organize and beat Donald Trump. Thanks for staying in the fight with us. In solidarity, Indivisible Team Not authorized by any candidate, candidate’s agent, or campaign committee. Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.

The 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat in Georgia simply isn't an option. The good news is, we can still help Herschel Walker flip Georgia but he needs you on his team.

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. _**[We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890447:JSa8EAGNJ:m:1:3369487795:0D7190B79959A660ED046EA1FDFF600A:r "We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.")**_

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.
