We succeeded beyond all expectations in Pennsylvania’s elections this year.

We defended our democracy, elected a crucial progressive U.S. Senator, and even flipped Pennsylvania’s House for the first time in over a decade.

So with the news that Georgia’s election for a 51st Democratic voice in the Senate depends on an extremely competitive runoff election, our choice is clear — we’re going to back up our allies in Georgia.

**[Please make a donation to help New Pennsylvania Project staff members add capacity to the on the ground efforts and get out the vote for the Warnock/Walker runoff election in Georgia. Kadida Kenner

_The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54707457/379364556/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221116GeorgiaRe_N_KK_FL_4_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3NTU4ZjFlLWY2NjUtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y4SRnx7GyCojYGLg2ML4eK1bnIuhEODZs9K6iFojHic=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. clean_body: Will you help us get out the vote for Warnock vs. Walker? = | Fellow activist, can you help send NPP to Georgia this month? We succeeded beyond all expectations in Pennsylvania’s elections this year. We defended our democracy, elected a crucial progressive U.S. Senator, and even flipped Pennsylvania’s House for the first time in over a decade. So with the news that Georgia’s election for a 51st Democratic voice in the Senate depends on an extremely competitive runoff election, our choice is clear — we’re going to back up our allies in Georgia. = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Tonight’s critical deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter - I know you've heard a lot from me lately.

I've sent so many requests your way, and you've already done so much.

You and I both hoped we would win the election outright last Tuesday, but now we're in OVERTIME...so I still need you, Peter.

**The Federal Election Commission requires our campaign to report periodically how much we've raised. OUR FINAL FEC DEADLINE for the runoff is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!**

[** HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BEFORE 11:59 PM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888369:6VcAEAGNh:m:1:3331703221:36E38501919B51D781D2647A29E66396:r)
We need to raise every single dollar possible to evict Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate. Unfortunately, **the Left is dumping tens of millions into his campaign to attack me, allowing him to spend massive amounts of money to mobilize every Democrat in Georgia.**

I'm relying on you, Peter. I'm relying on the people of Georgia and patriots around the country, not billionaires from New York or the Hollywood elite.

**[Please stand with me before this critical deadline by giving a generous donation before MIDNIGHT so it can be included in our FEC report. Will you help?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888369:6VcAEAGNh:m:1:3331703221:36E38501919B51D781D2647A29E66396:r)**

**[Even if you've given recently, would you please consider giving again?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888369:6VcAEAGNh:m:1:3331703221:36E38501919B51D781D2647A29E66396:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888369:6VcAEAGNh:m:1:3331703221:36E38501919B51D781D2647A29E66396:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888369:6VcAEAGNh:m:1:3331703221:36E38501919B51D781D2647A29E66396:r)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm24m3v48mefkmmv0gai1not0vv9hfa6jtejh2e8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcghdb52jveghhe05rotk2iieqk9kgkpi42icrf0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0sopo3og2atldjpl4lej09mulk8rlfhpist67m8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4o9eofl3tbq3fr4n8rmeircn0dtdh4ggpppnod0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4rbbfeef9a9b0k2ofna7so6qjpdc8qgp2liqpi8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkv63f9f07s9gf7onmjpcv1b4st98cpn92ebjcmo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4ccbitbkls32u2052qahrjk9ao453plplnjft0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd1ij9p0l1hjg1070i13cacre24v0o16kg9ngi1g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3kljrubani050likdn4chtdfo1vmvdsva4hn7do_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmoidlv1aceem8arbvtd53g9pqunuc97u90e2vt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**_

Thank you,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z35ivgpijv5dag93dtvipsntci46r3fn8al4uhc0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)
Donald J. Trump

**[CLAIM 13X-IMPACT>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z48u3huqkq49142tueh0l6q7o8bf56bcq5j970pg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6cpj6clh2bs)**

name: American Firearms Association
subject: Only Hunter Biden will be a gunowner
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "We
desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help
us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "Even the complete seizure of the guns you
own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, whether it's $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "Save the Second Amendment
today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885461:Jm2aEAGNW:m:1:3371220873:EF7D6602723510CA01C8753C0BC20E7F:r "PROTECT THE 2A!")
---
The American Firearms Association is a nonprofit organization registered in the state of Ohio. While contributions are limitless, they are not tax-deductible.
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 12, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJm2aEAGNW). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJm2aEAGNW)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJm2aEAGNW) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-51920046619-echo7-3A3EF5B1255720B0E4B10FCEBBBC992B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeffbkgad6gmgj9qpj3tr5cqdukfhpln50n88318_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znk1l93irfhg1sc1s1549r3efm97i04ph552s8rg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1rgk7fv0sb5cek98sir02rqco4vd92n5tr36k60_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8ua9aqhfe2luvijg1r99joucll2dv47j2obm4k0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1eduvfl9oa8f9703i6jubba42g4f8u4horf233g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjkpfadpag8akjr92m259hfc0qjps7v5rsqopkfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zog80nc5hvg4fao74n3ai7v8lu2llnd9gl3trta0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk2imjka5poci76cjkgal28cgh8f80ua4lj2pci8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv7ennp0eugnacn15f6sv14r6rkls5b79mkucbdo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk0ih7v7ac5rkg2geqs51255lrcq5o2tt4vqe0bo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)**_

Thank you,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkeub8rnvtfksgjv8qe3re197g9bf9rll4rnia88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6ao30c5h2bs)

body:

Dear Hoosier Democrats, Well, it happened – Donald Trump announced he’s running for president in 2024. Even after his extremist candidates failed almost everywhere nationwide this year (including some here in Indiana), his MAGA money machine is gearing up for another election cycle of fear mongering and bigoted lies. That means starting now, they’re raking in big donations so they can ramp up their operations before we have a chance to catch our breath after our big wins across the country. We won’t pretend we have an easy road ahead of us: this is going to be a long, hard-fought election cycle. But if we want to keep Donald Trump and his MAGA lackeys out of the White House, we need to start laying the groundwork now. The Indiana Democratic Party is the only committee dedicated to electing Democrats in Indiana year-round, every year. But we’re looking at our budget going into next year, and we don’t have the resources we need to build the strong voter protection, persuasion, and turnout programs it’s going to take to beat Trump and his MAGA Republicans. [**Peter, will you start a monthly donation of $15 (or whatever makes sense to you) to the Indiana Democratic Party right now to help us plan and execute the long-term programs it’s going to take to win every election at every level – including the presidency – in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54683755/379318396/1643342139?recurring=true&refcode=221116-trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWEwZDVjNC1jZTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvnX1F6er1AYK-hKaMzV-XXIK1sBWs1ghfQT3SwTIC8=) | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54683756/379318397/405560545?refcode=221116-trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWEwZDVjNC1jZTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvnX1F6er1AYK-hKaMzV-XXIK1sBWs1ghfQT3SwTIC8=)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:

Peter - I know you've heard a lot from me lately.

I've sent so many requests your way, and you've already done so much.

You and I both hoped we would win the election outright last Tuesday, but now we're in OVERTIME...so I still need you, Peter.

**The Federal Election Commission requires our campaign to report periodically how much we've raised. OUR FINAL FEC DEADLINE for the runoff is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!**

[** HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BEFORE 11:59 PM -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888410:Jc89oAGEN:m:1:3369487795:0D8496492AEF12FC421386D7C6DD175A:r)
We need to raise every single dollar possible to evict Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate. Unfortunately, **the Left is dumping tens of millions into his campaign to attack me, allowing him to spend massive amounts of money to mobilize every Democrat in Georgia.**

I'm relying on you, Peter. I'm relying on the people of Georgia and patriots around the country, not billionaires from New York or the Hollywood elite.

**[Please stand with me before this critical deadline by giving a generous donation before MIDNIGHT so it can be included in our FEC report. Will you help?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888410:Jc89oAGEN:m:1:3369487795:0D8496492AEF12FC421386D7C6DD175A:r)**

**[Even if you've given recently, would you please consider giving again?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888410:Jc89oAGEN:m:1:3369487795:0D8496492AEF12FC421386D7C6DD175A:r)**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: FEC filing deadline is tonight at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter - I know you've heard a lot from me lately.

I've sent so many requests your way, and you've already done so much.

You and I both hoped we would win the election outright last Tuesday, but now we're in OVERTIME...so I still need you, Peter.

**The Federal Election Commission requires our campaign to report periodically how much we've raised. OUR FINAL FEC DEADLINE for the runoff is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!**

[** HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BEFORE 11:59 PM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889995:JKBOoAGHN:m:1:3331421248:2F5AED9D785DA923C0416A344FABC8BF:r)
We need to raise every single dollar possible to evict Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate. Unfortunately, **the Left is dumping tens of millions into his campaign to attack me, allowing him to spend massive amounts of money to mobilize every Democrat in Georgia.**

I'm relying on you, Peter. I'm relying on the people of Georgia and patriots around the country, not billionaires from New York or the Hollywood elite.

**[Please stand with me before this critical deadline by giving a generous donation before MIDNIGHT so it can be included in our FEC report. Will you help?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889995:JKBOoAGHN:m:1:3331421248:2F5AED9D785DA923C0416A344FABC8BF:r)**

**[Even if you've given recently, would you please consider giving again?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889995:JKBOoAGHN:m:1:3331421248:2F5AED9D785DA923C0416A344FABC8BF:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889995:JKBOoAGHN:m:1:3331421248:2F5AED9D785DA923C0416A344FABC8BF:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Team United We Dream (via Blue Amp Action)
subject: Dreamers protected from deportation under Obama’s DACA program are at risk from a recent federal court ruling. You can help by asking President Biden and Congress to deliver a path to citizenship by the end of the year.
body:
Sign the petition
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc37cf4c2-c676-41ea-a7c7-8c347bd6ee9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ Anti-immigrant Republicans aren’t shy about their goals. They’re trying to divide us by vilifying and demonizing immigrant communities. Their dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric leads to bad policies and even worse outcomes for our communities.

A conservative court recently ruled against DACA after a years-long court battle after Trump attacked DACA in 2017. DACA is now headed back to a lower court where right-wing Judge Hanen, who has already ruled that DACA was unlawful, will now decide its fate. Because Donald Trump stacked the courts with right-wing extremist justices, we must prepare for the worst possible outcome.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT DACA →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc837c734-2eac-43d1-b30a-d0ad88d21fa0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **Therefore, it's crucial that Democrats deliver a pathway to citizenship before the end of the year. ** Democrats and President Biden have campaigned on the promise to protect immigrant communities and we must hold them accountable to it! _They cannot wait for the courts to kill DACA for good before they act. Biden and Congress must act NOW to permanently protect all immigrant youth, our families and communities._ They have the power to deliver permanent protections; not just for DACA recipients but for all immigrant communities! Join our movement and sign on to demand that President Biden and Congress take action. Thanks for all you do, United We Dream PAC
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
13X 13X 13X | Recently, I was in MAR-A-LAGO and announced that I am running for PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IN 2024. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0039%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wNMTypkkPULzwD5lh9qBzw&sysid=1)

Friend,

**Recently, I was in MAR-A-LAGO and announced that I am running for PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IN 2024.**

In two years, the American People can make their voices heard - **LOUDER, STRONGER, and MORE PASSIONATE than ever before.**

This road will not be easy, but if every red-blooded Patriot does their job, freedom WILL prevail. The Democrats want to distract you from EVERY problem they have created, but the American People will never fall for their tactics.

Your unwavering support is the backbone of my SAVE AMERICA movement, so I have **ACTIVATED** a **_1300%-IMPACT offer_** on ALL GIFTS made towards our _**Official Trump 2024 Victory Fund.**_

I'm counting on you, Friend.
** **

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._v3H-Q__p-J0TQ)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Help fight back against Donald Trump's threats to our Democracy

**Friend,**

**As a Black American, it’s really hard for me to shake what I saw on TV last night.**
**It is an epic failure of our criminal legal system that Donald Trump, having committed so many crimes in plain sight for years, was able to freely stand on that stage and announce his third run for President.**
**When I first took office in 2021, I stood alongside my colleagues in the U.S. Capitol building as insurrectionists attacked us and tried to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election at the orders of Donald Trump. I feared for my life that day, as the mob chanted their desire to assassinate members of our government.**
**As Donald Trump seeks to unravel the progress made under the Biden presidency and our Democratic Congress, and further divide our nation, I promise to continue leading the fight to protect our democracy. **
**Friend****, we can continue to fight back against Donald Trump and his allies, but not without your support. Can I count on you to rush a donation to my Policy is Personal PAC today?**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Declaring War on the Cartels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| Peter- It's time we hit the cartels where it hurts the most: their bank accounts. Right now, Mexican cartels have complete control of our southern border. They are trafficking drugs and people into the U.S. every day. And yet the Biden administration has done absolutely nothing to reign in their abuse. So today I introduce the Declaring War on the Cartels Act. This bill would significantly increase federal penalties for Mexican cartels & their enormous financial power. My bill would also sanction those who aid cartels and freeze aid to countries that enable cartel activity. From Fox News: The bill would make it punishable by up to 20 years for members of such organizations who are involved in crimes related to drugs, violence, fraud, human smuggling, immigration crimes and sex trafficking. It would also make cartel members and their family inadmissible to the U.S. and allow for the revocation of naturalized citizenship and green cards for those convicted of such activity. Additionally, it would use existing federal powers to block cartel organizations from using U.S. financial institutions and allow for the seizure of assets -- that would then be deposited into a "CARTEL fund" that would increase funding for law enforcement to go after cartels. Of that funding, 75% would go to DHS agencies including Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), while the remainder would go to the Drug Enforcement Administration. The legislation would also allow for sanctions on those who aid cartels and to freeze foreign aid to countries who aid or do not prevent cartel activity. [Click here to read the full article about my bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Of0N5TFbA5lhkaHEtXpzK2AuEOiKL7_jydFzZPwppwL4Byn8WI2cz0UEqyaT2C_s6I70JHclo8XdzOyqSDN8UzbaX0dgUUByI6fkvqwh_9_GWO2oir9raSihtBabTWwu0aaCegJCAyVkCBTh2t0Mw_b-s7O-F-_I6KWrfuYw6QJUqEpHO7eGJgcgjT21WT0cwjzEoMJjtkrTggyZrfz1TfpZZMVHfFFixT6IAp4d5fvmvRgPNas_Kpmf47S0wY0G8QGXfhXLDTM=&c=cZ4JYCYVNIZSaJw4wt0H-i60asvVWsTRA-t44S7S-qrYVOfnkB1s7w==&ch=iVem0ex0hVT0gORLRS9bco5jXyQjAB3i2tiocCLdNsc806_4k9iA8w==) It's long overdue that we take the cartels seriously. It's time that we deter & target them the same way we do terrorists. That's the only way we win.
---
| In service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---

body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1j5oap09a9om9uv7tq50m86goee2m56ulr8fkgg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zumvvf8dg44u5tgvg7bne6phlq20occj0ekf8mag_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhhklpt0pq56madaa1tlqubvo4f5n98a54h5ffto_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)

Friend,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Friend, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt7ra0ab5vipr37732pgos2975af0us0qhpeenao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqvvkeo9amfbjsbahrl7rn8lqs7lo0ci3bch2gig_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)

I need your support now more than ever, Friend. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfvlrpdqvt981o6kst1cuqoam8ej2a9in4dfud5o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7me4mjhcoptmnra9dnff197kcv50s61ibgvp1e0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlcu6kinfh2j302kh2ldse05jsg48b5b3or0a9d8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8j0e9sdoflg4eduksbqv05fiiulnobjfn4dhdjg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj6eo72cth2bs)

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iddR66xZZlwjt56kZsolHr0iebtr-DiGm1gSveTivxAzEJ70-Bh75f24STTxs_RnGQv8nsFfM6NiKthu00IifWD1LnYbON3Swcw-0aykdavWstHZtO7_YP2A-zEIyhWTbSXNU-BE2OLyWR0kS6fxsIG00F4X__B6k27QnQraaxD9HBHbFL79Peh0FmoMNbj1JP6LffDTkfKvik26E77m_mrjxBGY9UwBU8FX7SGELpqWWaeYLz1rIJvysuoU31Na4e6EyDoYoKMuYbGY1Hv9xYrFYNd9aEhEt9Rlx8XY6zIL/3r7/f2m4bm0oRb-ogM4vL_tUPg/h8/l-A12a1D9rxr4IPKQ0ZYPCs6Yh3pUgwR9_qvEVgTNVk) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’m going to be your next President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlook5kgcaji24bkub73rqo7kttr4fnqb47asi70_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkmoom8o5lmlim2sb0e3gj2tjhmlor4crj6crr6sb7mdhn2cbhc9gm4sbmemojeduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kpm0slhcpq69d9icuobapbi4no)
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkq6md2jl2k954dm5arsev7ifcmtn9o8g2ue37o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zickuseog8ug7jl5170mb37a2ijgnj4aj49mg7a8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)**

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztmk0f21gmbnnhqcuf088gtg1aq1copc5h12nmj8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)

Friend,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Friend, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ji1mal5ojr39q690itsa0tb0d76c8svilmgm00_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)**

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmnfpkuloa2ura3j9n4i0u7lh8mp3bgfaujq4h38_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)

I need your support now more than ever, Friend. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmogqkd1qkt1d3t6h5i3b19i5mpqt6coitnlo4g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z786me72ptd71sjm4q8k1va696cc23tpqktfqbhg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2hvb8g03nit824qv3epq40g0ibn6gietkvt7gn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8p7q54r6eu1m2op20tsoo97fmq2mst6lnfb1co_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69o34s5h2bs)

| | We’re asking for your help to finish the job in Georgia.

We were **_so close_** to re-electing Rev. Warnock on Election Day, beating Herschel Walker by 40,000 votes.

name: Raphael Warnock via Team Jayapal
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Pramila to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22792?refcode=em20221116-1848&t=1&akid=1848%2E420207%2EEXifhf)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22792?refcode=em20221116-1848&t=20&akid=1848%2E420207%2EEXifhf)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. **
[**Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or more right now between me and Pramila so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22792?refcode=em20221116-1848&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1848%2E420207%2EEXifhf)
Thank you for all that you do.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221116-1848-footer&t=22&refcode2=1848_420207_EXifhf&akid=1848%2E420207%2EEXifhf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92d008107a7b4830998c137f72f6a469&_e=tPR1nrKoZL52mZ8hAyqh30KdpLYpeKu6erNqN30hdHWqHQQdIoRD_LqtVdHXVwDAJ1yQ5EIp_-thu--QyqkBvx2O7_IE40b8eB9FizGiy-jgSjX7fhMCYRDDTG88reaetGsYjNxKRMXkQZf4_Esrqtez3pOb5t5EDTiDQhZeYS1BWWd-3Y7nEc19Cco720H_mXPfz8rqdtnFsJy9U1HTWs_TzMUetEsq955SXRGLVR_-dfOjf0kLHtPLKFiie1CZ)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92d008107a7b4830998c137f72f6a469&_e=tPR1nrKoZL52mZ8hAyqh30KdpLYpeKu6erNqN30hdHWqHQQdIoRD_LqtVdHXVwDAJ1yQ5EIp_-thu--QyqkBvx2O7_IE40b8eB9FizGiy-h4tW--2ap8Kdag6fF9JLdXnl_2--9fALJddtcgJAP1VqGPZii2nR-W4ydGx9CWBqrYBAz6N9LoeQhd86jQ4qS1QAUxztVI55uQ_hIM2PYm106hKTA_vqvdENUZr5ffpd3YWgekx3s51W4H31gYQBR2)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92d008107a7b4830998c137f72f6a469&_e=tPR1nrKoZL52mZ8hAyqh30KdpLYpeKu6erNqN30hdHWqHQQdIoRD_LqtVdHXVwDAJ1yQ5EIp_-thu--QyqkBvx2O7_IE40b8eB9FizGiy-jSRYAwPJvYZzTF1ihj0o0mRQ-cjmmFr0Q_IszCf8x4G2jtcHkwyJ_heZgPuh2WU7u2unRTR9DrwNa0ph4uKfFq14PPj469vll97Q5AbKAqfbSC2voBeH09nxbdXfsd7jVs1nj0drz25FTOFwvommQI)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---

body:
| | | We hope you’ll join Amanda to share your experience. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBif3qYeTOrPZVFNbgrZmSjWtiUrq-5vTHxz67WwONDcn5qIcMoX8DaRYRuCBySvJH852uDOUAeH3y1chS3cPcqVWuL9i_yAIzZE5R0c1GS_Hj-q8I107b8haZbuzozYqr6sHrqm6pp-fy67Ximjrovxd9ckfQomQa0jL7Gl6APvY7h8xVvewbBSZq7zex7PczYljkSdb8sHvKkjVlMmfhtFQNoJXZcb_IwiIHGhZRF7lRdgqJoRIsetX1SnSwhLPuyf95WF5Nd6p1wahI8ocQI79mlX9-HjcVVkbWZAdUHZyfa74jqoAfPObt3jx6MQYMxu3TTmdZg-KhK1fgHTTbTjadMO7oZ3goSrEh63Z64gJRlF_9fGULDtQgE9pGxTiUqQ/3r7/s6u2-NmgT0-Pu9-nlqriMw/h0/hu-Nz1DVbtaCHuoBIaj-0xvc-qAMbK4Ikfjr9WcyZsI) | | Illegal dumping and housing have been problematic for many Houstonians, team.

Access to clean, safe housing and neighborhoods is what every Houstonian deserves. We must ensure that our residents are not exposed to the dangers of poor health that can result from illegal dumping and unsafe housing. As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will ensure that every Houstonian has an opportunity to thrive, no matter their zip code.

Amanda knows how vital it is to keep our neighborhoods safe, clean, and healthy. Input from the community will help fuel our people-powered campaign and ensure our neighbors have a say in the city’s pressing needs. **_[_That’s why this Saturday, November 19, at 9:30 a.m., Amanda is hosting a Housing & Illegal Dumping Community Block Walk as part of her listening tour._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFfBv5msbdUX0DvLOq2nEwz1WqKDwuqgPDUf3W-CIeprMHAGa_q5aGwMn1QJ6-GLV6kco4YuqEJbFOQm6YQqQ920jijU5u08-_dyvhjQcdENQdjrE0UX61qKYSgeZKHJSe5beMrKw-FPiz5eRyvUNcHOg0WLJZ0JBrSQtXX-hJdgP9MqWX1cziwvqQqp0O-wb4fC9xU1AIVukcWvnzI6xJ831HGAkx37ZMrinU3UrFNx9CtM1iQNmQEAxgFZouHr2TQNR_JIGRgNG5n4sS7YRjokNaR-78cz0PzSVIHE1XGy5K08flGjwDN2hNJhOU_uaw/3r7/s6u2-NmgT0-Pu9-nlqriMw/h1/AJ2_DgTmWl_IM0HKfykuWhLohS0vXy_UJI_gyMDcYU8)_** clean_body: | | | We hope you’ll join Amanda to share your experience. | | Illegal dumping and housing have been problematic for many Houstonians, team. Access to clean, safe housing and neighborhoods is what every Houstonian deserves. We must ensure that our residents are not exposed to the dangers of poor health that can result from illegal dumping and unsafe housing. As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will ensure that every Houstonian has an opportunity to thrive, no matter their zip code. Amanda knows how vital it is to keep our neighborhoods safe, clean, and healthy. Input from the community will help fuel our people-powered campaign and ensure our neighbors have a say in the city’s pressing needs. We’ll be out talking to neighbors about their experience with illegal dumping and housing issues and how we can address these challenges. What: Housing & Illegal Dumping Community Block Walk & Listening Tour Where: Acres Homes Library, 8501 W Montgomery Rd, Houston, TX 77088 When: Saturday, November 19, at 9:30 a.m. Only by working together can we solve Houston’s most pressing problems and ensure every Houstonian has the opportunity to thrive in our city. Onward, Team Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, Political Advertising paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer Amanda Edwards Campaign PO Box 88228 Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent via . name: Herschel Walker
subject: DEADLINE: FEC financial cutoff is tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885211:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885212:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885213:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885214:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tonight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61885210:JiXMGAGNG:m:1:3368395361:4AAB40480DE0E3369B779FEBEE7C196E:r)**

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, it’s
official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I
can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your
immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1915?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221116_1_2&t=1001&akid=6111%2E1827488%2E_LSQGo ]Will you split
$10 or more right now between me and Tony Evers to keep
Georgia blue?

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and Mitch
McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.
Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win — but with national
Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a
second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight
back against GOP attacks — but we're falling short, and I need your help.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1915?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221116_1_2&t=1002&akid=6111%2E1827488%2E_LSQGo ]Please, Derek,
will you split a donation of
$10 or more now between me and Tony Evers so we can win in
Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will be split between Raphael Warnock and Tony Evers and processed immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1916?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221116_1_2&t=1003&akid=6111%2E1827488%2E_LSQGo ]Donate $10 Now

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (D-GA)
subject: please, don't scroll away, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With only 20 days left to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**
That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.
**I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**
**[So please, friend, will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54709502/379373093/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2246-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIzNGI2OS0wMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FaYryGnbvaIkDg0EMn_fFsJ-REZOd4oolHeQcoJTN0=)**

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

With only 20 days left to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me. That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads. I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again. = Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6bba3mmbkg7csb3iqbc44tn7kq46tfeahia0de8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onn6op3epdjehjratdncpr6cplhmcoe1p74ssom8tj2ejgm6tbh6cp34pjjelh7fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kpm0slhcpojed9icuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z32cqub6suja0cgmvoska9jiosvo0urnaue0slg8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1do6k11k6vgpungg9dnom9lm7r4h89itiojovbo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhbm9f3md09mo67gvn82h5atuvghapu56b38o270_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9hiorbffa1akncig30vhrotafv895p6vo0epqsg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8fpfgdenknl5qlfm9d13f78jg5vjlsmllicf6co_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn71i4q431ai5dqm4b4nb3kn5ap9nnils8f5lcso_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk356hqsgr6n6d7chkbltif89k3ar7341h7rg9go_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcjkb3i09s05mod7frbt8bkceq6la5p4e3qdb8v0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6ft4k6grod7lb6tb4stqie7qj6afffpljq64bfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdj69or0s5h2bs)**_

WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. subject: Today is a big day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888198:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888199:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888200:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888201:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tonight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888197:6-x5GAGN1:m:1:3370555685:9A494A6152A6276DC9244E9FFFF4072D:r)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s a big night for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter - I know you've heard a lot from me lately.

I've sent so many requests your way, and you've already done so much.

You and I both hoped we would win the election outright last Tuesday, but now we're in OVERTIME...so I still need you, Peter.

**The Federal Election Commission requires our campaign to report periodically how much we've raised. OUR FINAL FEC DEADLINE for the runoff is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!**

[** HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BEFORE 11:59 PM -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888364:6hdLIAGyN:m:1:3317145305:365F2FDC9863881695BEDF7ADCFB8457:r)
We need to raise every single dollar possible to evict Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate. Unfortunately, **the Left is dumping tens of millions into his campaign to attack me, allowing him to spend massive amounts of money to mobilize every Democrat in Georgia.**

I'm relying on you, Peter. I'm relying on the people of Georgia and patriots around the country, not billionaires from New York or the Hollywood elite.

**[Please stand with me before this critical deadline by giving a generous donation before MIDNIGHT so it can be included in our FEC report. Will you help?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888364:6hdLIAGyN:m:1:3317145305:365F2FDC9863881695BEDF7ADCFB8457:r)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Troy=20Carter?=
subject: Join me Saturday for Thanksgiving Dinner
body:
Preparations are being made for The 30th Annual Congressman Troy Carter Friends & Family “Drive-Thru” Thanksgiving Dinner. |
---
| | [ ](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=8b3932e022&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | Friend,

Preparations are currently being made for **The 30th Annual Congressman Troy Carter Friends & Family “Drive-Thru” Thanksgiving Dinner. **This auspicious event is being held on**Saturday, November 19, 2022, at Alice Harte Charter School at 5300 Berkley Drive in Algiers from 11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.**

**This event aims to provide a complete holiday meal for those who might spend the holidays alone or be food insecure.**

_The event is free to the public, and food will be served on a first-come, first-served basis._
---
| [ ](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=3c69dc6e42&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | _**The 30th Annual Congressman Troy Carter Friends & Family “Drive-Thru” Thanksgiving Dinner**_ Saturday, Nov. 19, 2022
11 am-2 pm
Alice Harte Charter School
5300 Berkley Drive in Algiers
---
| Over the past twenty-nine years, I have hosted this community event while I was in the Louisiana State House of Representatives, the Councilmember of District C, a private citizen, and now as United States Representative for Louisiana’s Second Congressional District.

**This Thanksgiving Dinner has been a much looked forward to occasion where senior citizens and families alike can come and enjoy a Thanksgiving meal with no questions asked. The only requirement is that you come hungry!**

Over the years, more than 10,000 citizens have been served.

_**To volunteer or for more information, please contact (504) 510-9000. **_
---
| Learn more at [CongressmanTroyCarter.com](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=54d64a4eb1&e=dd5c2df611).
---
| With Gratitude,
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/congressmantroycarter.com/thanksgiving-dinner?e=dd5c2df611)
---
| _Copyright © 2022 , All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Troy Carter For CongressPO Box 50730New Orleans, LA 70150
[Add us to your address book](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f)

You can [update your preferences](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=75c7ea01f8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=75c7ea01f8).

body:
The Federal Election Commission’s filing deadline for the runoff is tonight ... we have LESS THAN 6 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISI
|

---
Fellow American,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Fellow American.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7775v423d8s9994lmi2ace5aas2d2p92guf5nbg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdgm0ob7chh2bs)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tonight at midnight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk3fff2q82jasoeha04i6e3d971t4ef3def5j010_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdgm0ob7chh2bs)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TONIGHT. **[So, if you can chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $50 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0n4lael21imfekvhja1vmk2o478e4iljko3rj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdgm0ob7chh2bs)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: John Fetterman
subject: TV celebrity + known seditionist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our democracy is on the line.
#
Wow, Derek, did you see the news? 🙄
**Donald Trump is officially running for President in 2024.**
That’s right. The TV celebrity + known seditionist + dude who’s *actively* under investigation by the January 6th committee is launching his third (and hopefully last) campaign for president more than 700 days before the 2024 election.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221116-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221116-8136&refcode2=8136_434096_nR31f6&akid=8136%2E434096%2EnR31f6)**
**Look, I’ve always said Donald Trump could endorse a ham sandwich and GOP Super PACs would dump loads of money behind it.**
But now that Trump *himself* is running for president, we can expect this next cycle will be nastier + more expensive than ever. _He even already said he’d challenge the results of the election if he doesn’t win._
The movement we’ve built over the last two years is *so* special that we can’t let it stop on Election Day 2022. We need to carry this grassroots energy forward so that we can defeat Trump + save our democracy in 2024. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Can you chip in $5 or more today? If we’re going to stand up to the GOP’s dirty, icky dark money + Trump’s self-funded million$, we need the support of grassroots supporters like you starting NOW.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221116-1?refcode=em20221116-8136&refcode2=8136_434096_nR31f6&akid=8136%2E434096%2EnR31f6)**
**[DONATE NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221116-1?refcode=em20221116-8136&refcode2=8136_434096_nR31f6&akid=8136%2E434096%2EnR31f6)**
I’ve fought back against the insurrectionists + seditionists inspired by Donald Trump every chance I got. In the PA legislature, I stood up when Republicans refused to swear in a legitimately elected Democratic State Senator the day before the insurrection. The GOP *literally* voted to eject me from the chamber.
Then, when Donald Trump aimed his bogus demands for a “full election audit” at our Commonwealth, I was a leading voice as lieutenant governor calling out his BS.
Now, I’ll continue the fight against his Big Lie + the powerful special interests behind it in the U.S. Senate. But we can’t stop there.
**With so much on the line (like our entire DEMOCRACY!!), we need to stay prepared through this cycle + beyond.****[So Derek, will you chip in $5 or more today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221116-1?refcode=em20221116-8136&refcode2=8136_434096_nR31f6&akid=8136%2E434096%2EnR31f6)**
Thanks for always standing with me.
– John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
U.S. Senator-Elect from Pennsylvania

---
| | **Matt Jacobs Statement on Election Results** **Thousand Oaks, CA** – Matt Jacobs, candidate for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th District, issued the following statement: Yesterday, I called Julia Brownley to congratulate her on her victory after a hard-fought campaign. The election was fair, the result is legitimate, and I sincerely wish Congresswoman Brownley and her family all the best, both personally and as our representative in Congress. As a Federal Prosecutor, I had the privilege of introducing myself to juries by saying, “Ladies and gentleman, my name is Matt Jacobs, and I represent the United States of America.” That statement always filled me with tremendous pride, and I felt the same sense of pride campaigning over the past 22 months. Simply put, running for this Office was the honor of my lifetime. Words cannot adequately express my gratitude for our incredible supporters, volunteers, staff and everyone else who believed in our campaign. Thank you for your tireless efforts and your devotion to our community and country. I’m especially grateful for the support of my family and friends, particularly my superwoman wife Julie, whose many sacrifices over the past two years made it possible for me to pour my heart and soul into this campaign. My mission in running for Congress was simple: to make sure everyone in our community, and across the country, has the freedom and opportunity to make their American Dream a reality. We stood – and still stand – for safer neighborhoods, an economy that rewards hard work, and the very best schools for every child. I couldn’t be prouder of the positive, issues-based campaign we ran. Although we came up short, I’m humbled by the tremendous support we received – including from so many Independents and Democrats who put country before party and embraced our commonsense agenda. Nearly two years of campaigning has only served to reinforce my belief that the bonds that unite us as Americans are infinitely stronger than the differences that divide us. Don’t listen to the peddlers of anger and division who claim that Americans with different political views are somehow fascists, communists or extremists. Their voices may be loud, but they’re wrong. The overwhelming majority of Americans believe in the goodness of our country and the greatness of our people. They know that the American Dream is alive and well, and that America remains the one indispensable nation on Earth. So, as we move past this midterm season, I encourage everyone not to focus on our differences. Instead, let’s unite behind our shared pride in America and our commitment to the principles and freedoms that this exceptional country has always stood for. Thank you all, and God bless America.
---
| |
---
Matt Jacobs
---
|
---
