name: =?utf-8?Q?Solidarity=20Strategies?=
subject: Midterms: We protected the Senate!
body:
Although stressful, it's been an inspiring midterm election with historic wins. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/unidosusaf/midterms-we-protected-the-senate?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Although stressful, it's been an inspiring midterm election with historic wins. Next year, there will be more progressive Latinos in Congress than at any time in American history. We were honored to help elect candidates such as Greg Casar, Rebecca Bland, Robert Garcia, and the first Gen Z member of Congress, Maxwell Frost. We are proud of our work this election season and want to highlight a few campaigns we had the pleasure of collaborating with this cycle.
**Juntos Por El Valle ** A highlight of our work this cycle was joining Equis and groups on the ground in NM and CA to run a historic program focused on turning out Latino voters. Our mail, digital, TV and radio ran in Tulare/Kings, CA and Doña Ana, NM in Spanish and English- proving that early investments in our communities are worthwhile and necessary!
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=e23cffd014&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| **Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for NY-14** The clients we work for represent our values and Congresswoman Ocasio-Cortez is a perfect example. Our work included designing and producing culturally competent, bilingual digital advertisements and radio ads to engage with Latino voters in NY-14!
**Way to Win** We are beyond proud to work with Way to Win to expand the electorate through voter registration, issue advocacy, and organizing to include new and low- to mid-propensity voters. We are elated to have played a part by producing various video ads with messaging to motivate voting for Democrats.
**Democratic National Committee** Through working with the Democratic National Committee we mobilized voters across the country and built on our historic 2020 victories. We produced and placed culturally competent Spanish radio and newspaper ads in many states throughout the country. We are thrilled we were able to be part of this project. **Building Back Together** It was an honor to assist Building Back Together in advancing the policy agenda of the Biden administration and communicate these successes of policy to the American people. Our work consisted of the production and placement of English and Spanish digital and radio ads to inform Latinos in various states about the progress this administration achieved in such a short period of time.
**Dream Corps Green For All and Dream Corps Justice ** Solidarity Strategies identified organizations and community leaders working in climate and criminal justice reform in Arizona, Nevada, Iowa, Missouri, Mississippi, and Texas. Our team hosted convenings for Dream Corps Justice and Green for All to meet with the organizations and leaders in each of these states to foster and strengthen relationships and coalitions within Black and Latino communities. **The Latino Vote** We are very excited to share our President and Founder Chuck Rocha’s new podcast and Latino voter-centered website. [Latinos.vote](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=be2f370e52&e=b8f90417f9) brings the country’s newspapers covering Latino politics, thoughtful op-ed pieces from opinion leaders in the Latino community, and the latest polling data covering our community and offering analysis, commentary, advice, and criticism where we think it’s needed Additionally, we established the largest Latino political podcast that features Chuck Rocha–Democrat Strategist and Bernie Sanders Latino strategist for 2016 and 2020–and Mike Madrid, a Republican Strategist, and Lincoln Project Founder. Rocha and Madrid analyze the Latino vote and current political events on both sides of the aisle – trying to prepare their respective political parties for what is happening now. We look forward to the new Congress and continuing the fight for progress and representation.

To a new year of progress, Team Solidarity
---
| | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=6cfe27c8dc&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=36aeec1aa8&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=4ecf175072&e=b8f90417f9)
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/about?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=a2973f1a0e) [unsubscribe from this list](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=a2973f1a0e) [update subscription preferences](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=a2973f1a0e)
Solidarity Strategies * P.O. Box 15260 * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7cbf3190eda45fb837a907eb3a842b7&_e=vVKyDVEXrrhNxz6s_iuuINIyecp6sbtok6BNZPhQXaAgB92vKacXhwi6FLPI4wRKOabtI1mYB02ApuGI6F4EJCriitl-_wqB3tyEfAwS8ktEvKWy1p9gSebiAddW-jMyPdcXFRYktjOuxjiSXZSfVczUxf_6mP-PSqG6LkSIpTHBRvEydfHaFrj4M4fR3bvgifKcfkkxoVG7HP6jx0FOHJA0u689sjcQJbs9H8co4eCZ0ZgYqZ0zeReUQ51Fc2Ix)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7cbf3190eda45fb837a907eb3a842b7&_e=vVKyDVEXrrhNxz6s_iuuINIyecp6sbtok6BNZPhQXaAgB92vKacXhwi6FLPI4wRKOabtI1mYB02ApuGI6F4EJCriitl-_wqB3tyEfAwS8kvmD8sl2QtGkN1XByHw24OJ3i6sEHt6cHoK9Wddit6YxoIknBh140i8_rBwdp1twpduXYvMjdQuxuYJzBauQPp2VVvgL1nrCgnaU0wVq8u0qweruzrARjEP42FeQbMinx3Gccs481qredaGtmnOShzv)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7cbf3190eda45fb837a907eb3a842b7&_e=vVKyDVEXrrhNxz6s_iuuINIyecp6sbtok6BNZPhQXaAgB92vKacXhwi6FLPI4wRKOabtI1mYB02ApuGI6F4EJCriitl-_wqB3tyEfAwS8ktgFgHtbWtUdhUybQZwTt9vLvM2WvLBowiunROH4hPKScdk4KP3iMLOKlJXT8XW23ZV-H67jfUPEYz39_jji6Hn8aZGxvHF8RwgP3vvnNGCY2k4MlMmoU-F3rARaqowmzahsnwiffklQYNRkayTle37)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---

---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**

---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: This is a Nail-Biter 😬 and I need your help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce551bd6e8894937a60a7fdf529de867&_e=lrNlL8HzfUyqfxFn0lvZtE4_sj0TXcjF-qY_0z_druCglx3mjgbn17WNvoeu4BIqaTo2IbPZtCUPl4Lm4cJD6kaU2BZ2ramJoUAjeec6m6oqAe9dWz-7m3m10AXol48fDI5D94HJj1lR1usl9DczSymJ4o5gN3BAsfIBPBex3ZASCKETbryRB-TswRx4KsRBgHI1czXsv97Jjft1qajUVYqpsds8Kj-JU-I0I5kAmH2wxQqNUAJjf008G99kL2qbplrAF0KmPRJSghYJ-PXwRZMS2BbR2IbMowNM1v0mTXo%3D)
---
| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce551bd6e8894937a60a7fdf529de867&_e=lrNlL8HzfUyqfxFn0lvZtE4_sj0TXcjF-qY_0z_druCglx3mjgbn17WNvoeu4BIqaTo2IbPZtCUPl4Lm4cJD6kaU2BZ2ramJoUAjeec6m6oqAe9dWz-7m3m10AXol48fDI5D94HJj1lR1usl9DczS_NJ6mVt4NH14YiHDAT_PxQ-_VDvrNc6yq-UxkKl1fHyj2grBJ02TDGyOif_rIZPgMYLTSE1Ek5gurEm74zxU9lyH68HhSFNtQXcba9GG5h7R3wbZkO4HuI7ljIpI8tpAICxg-k_Jpy8KnxTURoUe4g%3D)
---
|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce551bd6e8894937a60a7fdf529de867&_e=lrNlL8HzfUyqfxFn0lvZtE4_sj0TXcjF-qY_0z_druCglx3mjgbn17WNvoeu4BIqaTo2IbPZtCUPl4Lm4cJD6kaU2BZ2ramJoUAjeec6m6oqAe9dWz-7m3m10AXol48fDI5D94HJj1lR1usl9DczS1vmF1_Dkbltli52OnsrXBd54y_TIRiODc6DLvuGVz7vXsHd7u9U-9ryzG6-BlBUWqOQuu_6hSE0m-waevyILqWs9EahTRox_1bu0j8xikCu8VLimbJvzMBoPoho4QQA3q1S1oajCT_rkfD_wZo2Hxg%3D)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881696:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881697:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881698:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881699:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TODAY. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61881695:6Z3owAGN7:m:1:3374012347:2FC345F7B0A817CB69E1B58BD464F2D1:r)

subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30b54562b0c2419f9ee8cb68814b02ee&_e=TW_PQ2oE8duNXJFpTWAV_0gLeCLP777dO2iuaQN7H1iaPe25ZUhJDre4hEbIgHQ5py3Nis6Vls9cgnQiFo4Q7fC7QhsHmDa7i58xTCku9jsU_BE3z3_oRvn-8YLCJ0mzsR1qWsiuCR-R19Wn-SGgljET1VKowKgrPXeOBnC63hAU0k0IF9AT7YlAZup1GHoZrHm4HESWr82OqMpovZK388Jkw_JPDqZatHyxRSc8oHZlh7gcvkFLVZ7I9AZHIQLP0yT7orYlBU0Rj6g-s9wqjg%3D%3D)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30b54562b0c2419f9ee8cb68814b02ee&_e=TW_PQ2oE8duNXJFpTWAV_0gLeCLP777dO2iuaQN7H1iaPe25ZUhJDre4hEbIgHQ5py3Nis6Vls9cgnQiFo4Q7fC7QhsHmDa7i58xTCku9jsU_BE3z3_oRvn-8YLCJ0mzcGXDgSt59hoGM3_DKR8pbNE2cXnyGXTwch3owGJ0quUHRhcd9NzY7MCCmI3HKhvkdHwm5aAk7Cy-EFsOl75zPjH0iBEQQXw2BrasuM4f0S52PWVYKnusLY6VLtqWboRg_vBnYdT9L-tG5fFIn6XS8Q%3D%3D)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30b54562b0c2419f9ee8cb68814b02ee&_e=TW_PQ2oE8duNXJFpTWAV_0gLeCLP777dO2iuaQN7H1iaPe25ZUhJDre4hEbIgHQ5py3Nis6Vls9cgnQiFo4Q7fC7QhsHmDa7i58xTCku9jsU_BE3z3_oRvn-8YLCJ0mzpEBLC1Zl-49BLXebjDp7J5x4Sp4iT0hvgI0ncVMmlGsu_DCB7GCdaWFqKhYk1ZsKudVbMZKQxwxvkeWdJcNUzHmY6KtKmEhpb6GhWnz_LxWZST3EfifsCY75rToeEkQGVclEkrCUV_YRuDMXxPazJw%3D%3D)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30b54562b0c2419f9ee8cb68814b02ee&_e=TW_PQ2oE8duNXJFpTWAV_0gLeCLP777dO2iuaQN7H1iaPe25ZUhJDre4hEbIgHQ5py3Nis6Vls9cgnQiFo4Q7fC7QhsHmDa7i58xTCku9jsU_BE3z3_oRvn-8YLCJ0mz58R1LxfHkNpAyXKUUg-MKaOIeBpLA3L6T3p2HSjW9Ji2W71RTUCD0jgJty-UUrR649oP3dXKMR5ts2PaxMXwgs-arINxcz6D-809I_cCsl8Wsq3UKGng3C_H4lhPmPR7MXpogubfu_P78X0x1mdZGQ%3D%3D)

subject: that’s how much

body:
$32 – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friends.

Your $32 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and
expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker.
With less than 30 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on
deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $32
could mean the difference between winning and losing this race.
Please: Will
you split $32 now between me and Tim Ryan to fuel our people-powered
movement to victory here in Georgia?

Here's a special link just for you:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31625?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6456%2E3611125%2EJHHCY9 ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rya_runoffsplit_nov22?dpwillis67@gmail.com

Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your
support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:

| [ GOP Officially Reclaims U.S. House ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40918%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I8EhtJFmYQ4QR5pEaL40Uw&sysid=1)
---
[ On Tuesday, one full week after the 2022 midterm elections, Republicans were projected to officially retake the U.S. House of Representatives after the win of Kevin Kiley in California. The move now puts the lower chamber of Congress in the GOP’s control and rips the gavel out of Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi of California’s hand. The races this election included many heated contests, with some significant GOP gains, including the defeat of U.S. Rep. Sean Patrick Maloney in New York, who served as the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee chairman. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40919%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WE4%2bqSMwJqGxCvqhx6g%2bVA&sysid=1)

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6GJR5SK%2f544%2b3j4TZQosEQ&sysid=1)

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZcyhaEz00NTqz58VU4bLIg&sysid=1) | #### [ BREAKING: Trump Makes 2024 Announcement On Tuesday, 45th President Donald J. name: Nikki Fried
subject: We Won’t Back Down
body:
Peter,
Last weeks election results were tough for Florida.
While we saw historic gains for democrats across the country, we had major losses in Florida. It’s exactly why we started Won’t Back Down in September, because we knew that transforming Florida into the pro-choice state Floridians actually want will take hard work. We started immediately and saw some victories, but we must continue into future election cycles.

Because we don’t have a one election cycle problem. We have a future of Florida problem.

So we started doing what I did to win in 2018. We went to red areas and talked to Republican and Independent women.
And we also started doing what it takes to win the future. We supported pro-choice candidates, who understand freedom of choice. And we’re going to be aggressively calling out radical, anti-freedom politicians.
Whether you’re one of the over four million Floridians who voted me into the Florida Cabinet, the more than 25,000 people who’ve contributed, or one of our followers on social...I need you.

The women of Florida need you. Make a stand with us. https://secure.ngpvan.com/zI5U2O8xQkC3_MICYhX72A2
We won’t back down from this fight!
— Nikki
PD. POL. AD. BY WON’T BACK DOWN POLITICAL COMMITTEE
6619 S. DIXIE HWY #148 MIAMI FL 33143

subject: One of the congressional races outstanding is California's 13th District. The Democratic candidate’s lead is about 800 votes, with 30,000 left to count. We need this seat and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff & lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California.

| | | | | Peter, **_At this point: EVERY VOTE COUNTS_** **_217 House votes have been called for Republicans, 218 gives either party a majority in the House of Representatives. But, there are still a half dozen races or so outstanding, and every seat matters. _** **[We need CA-13 and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T233f7709-3bda-4f0c-b7a9-ca2541b4bbec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Democrats still have a chance to hold the House if we win all remaining races, and even if we're unable, denying Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority will lead to chaos on the GOP side._One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats.__** **_THIS WOULD BE HUGE. We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. _**

His lead is about 800 votes, with 30,000 left to count. In the areas left to count, there is very good reason to believe we'll pull this off over a Republican in Duarte who has said he won't work with Democrats in Washington whom he sees as "socialists"_** **[We need this seat and can win it! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Democrats still have a chance to hold the House if we win all remaining races, and even if we're unable, denying Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority will lead to chaos on the GOP side.One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats. THIS WOULD BE HUGE. I’d like to begin with a huge thank you for everything each of you did to make our campaign a huge success. Because of you, we were able to keep Delaware blue and fend off Republican attacks on Lisa’s seat.

I am also extremely proud that your hard work was incredibly instrumental in the success of down-ballot Democrats. Democrats flipped 2 seats in the General Assembly and picked up another victory in our state Senate, expanding Democrats' majority and giving them even more opportunities to continue their hard work for Delaware families.

We can also be proud of our all-women statewide ticket. With your help, women swept the state auditor, state treasurer, and attorney general races.

Everything that we accomplished this year is because of you, and we could not be more grateful to have you on our team. The past few months have been a hell of a fight for our democracy, and I am so proud of everything we’ve been able to achieve. **[With that said, team, our hard work is far from over. With razor-thin margins in the Senate and a Republican House majority, Lisa and her colleagues are still depending on your help to make sure every ballot is counted around the country! Will you pitch in $5 now to help us maintain our progress and prepare for the fight ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54710827/379393713/1183797106?refcode=EM_FR_221116MM__FR_NF_90DO_7_NG_TESTAL1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzU0YjAxMi0xMTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIAc-rW76ROBO02pkPkcgRzp7eCFTQvoZk66KSjIw_A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[$3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54710828/379393714/1183797106?refcode=EM_FR_221116MM__FR_NF_90DO_7_NG_TESTA_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode2=EL3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzU0YjAxMi0xMTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIAc-rW76ROBO02pkPkcgRzp7eCFTQvoZk66KSjIw_A=)******

clean_body: And it’s all because of you = = Now that the midterms are mostly over, I wanted to check in with each of you to regroup. I’d like to begin with a huge thank you for everything each of you did to make our campaign a huge success. Because of you, we were able to keep Delaware blue and fend off Republican attacks on Lisa’s seat. I am also extremely proud that your hard work was incredibly instrumental in the success of down-ballot Democrats. Democrats flipped 2 seats in the General Assembly and picked up another victory in our state Senate, expanding Democrats' majority and giving them even more opportunities to continue their hard work for Delaware families. We can also be proud of our all-women statewide ticket. With your help, women swept the state auditor, state treasurer, and attorney general races. Everything that we accomplished this year is because of you, and we could not be more grateful to have you on our team. name: Karen Bass
subject: Thank you, Los Angeles. Now, we get to work.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
You put your faith in me, and I thank you for that.

Team,

The results are in, and it is the honor of my life to be elected as your mayor.

**To everyone who helped deliver this victory for our campaign and for Los Angeles — THANK YOU!**

Let me be clear: none of this would have been possible without you. Angelenos came together, across every neighborhood and all walks of life, to be heard — and I hear you.

Now, it’s time to get to work and move our city in a new direction. It’s time to house people immediately, increase safety and opportunity in every neighborhood, and create a new standard of ethics and accountability at City Hall.

As your mayor, I will work for you, and I will work with you by making sure our agenda and our administration truly reflects the full diversity of the people of Los Angeles.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you to everyone who volunteered, donated, worked and voted for this campaign. You didn’t sit back, but stepped up for the future of Los Angeles.

Now, it’s time to build that future.

With gratitude,

Karen Bass

PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 - General
777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017
United States

Additional information is available at [ethics.lacity.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54710850/379394091/2050295714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI5ZjczMi0xMTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQyzKsdv3kwxwLuoknKMZkeCNJ2tExJnm7BLdxNGK-w=&emci=9950c329-0966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=98b9f732-1166-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2429742).

secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other&refcode=111622 [secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other&refcode=111622]
Friend,Last night, Donald Trump announced he is running for president in 2024. Even bipartisan impeachment and an insurrection weren't enough to deter him. We knew this was coming, but it is a sobering reminder that extreme Republicans haven't stopped.
Our House DFL majority is going to be working hard to enact legislation that makes life better for all Minnesotans, but we can't forget that extreme and reckless Republicans are already looking towards future elections. We need to be ready, and you are a key part of that. Will you make a commitment to the Minnesota House DFL by becoming a recurring donor today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Recurring $5 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane=true&recurring=true&amount=5&refcode=111622] Recurring $10 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane=true&recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=111622] Recurring $15 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane=true&recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=111622] Recurring $20 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane=true&recurring=true&amount=20&refcode=111622] Recurring $25 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?express_lane=true&recurring=true&amount=25&refcode=111622] Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=111622]Recurring donations are a crucial building block of our long-term campaign, allowing us to plan for expenses that don't stop just because the election is over. I appreciate all the support you've shown us, and I'm excited to see the work that we will get done together. Thank you, friend.
Sincerely,
Jamie Long
Majority Leader
Minnesota House of Representatives

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: ACTION ALERT: Defend State Forests in Western OR!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54710897/379397251/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYTVkNDc2LTEyNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sClWu6qN61vp_trOc27PDOHn5c2QCVBVG2MuIENENFA=&emci=46e47d2b-e965-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6fa5d476-1266-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, I just got done testifying before the Oregon Board of Forestry (ODF) this morning. My message: **pass a strong Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) to conserve Western Oregon’s State Forests.** A strong HCP will help protect fish, wildlife, our climate, and the drinking water of rural Oregon communities. This is why we need ODF to pass the strongest HCP possible. [_**Will you join us and ask the Oregon Board of Forestry to pass the strongest possible HCP to defend our publicly-owned forests?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54710898/379397252/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYTVkNDc2LTEyNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sClWu6qN61vp_trOc27PDOHn5c2QCVBVG2MuIENENFA=&emci=46e47d2b-e965-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6fa5d476-1266-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) The Board of Forestry is accepting public comment for the next two weeks before they make a final decision. It is crucial that ODF pass a strong HCP. The health of forest ecosystems and the invaluable climate benefits they offer by storing large amounts of carbon depends on it. If passed, the HCP would limit harmful clear-cutting on public state forest lands in Western Oregon.**Many critical and endangered species, such as spotted owls, would gain better protections under a strong HCP.** Industrial logging doesn’t just hurt trees and the animals who need them – **it pollutes rivers and waterways too.** This pollution damages the habitats of threatened fish like salmon and pollutes vital drinking water resources. _Our state needs to prioritize wildlife, water, and public forest lands over clear-cutting and timber profits._ [_**Send the Board of Forestry a message urging them to pass the HCP using our easy, pre-written template!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54710899/379397253/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYTVkNDc2LTEyNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sClWu6qN61vp_trOc27PDOHn5c2QCVBVG2MuIENENFA=&emci=46e47d2b-e965-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6fa5d476-1266-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) Everyone’s first experience witnessing the marvels of Oregon’s Western State Forests is unforgettable. The early-morning mist shrouding vibrant corridors of greenery. The rich aroma of old-growth Spruce trees. The squelching of mud beneath your feet as you follow a winding trail across roots and moss-covered rocks, tilting your head to the trees occasionally to identify the source of a musical birdsong echoing through silence. **State forests aren’t only invaluable to the species who dwell within, but as recreation areas for people like us.** Unfortunately, Big Timber is doing everything they can to stop the Habitat Conservation Plan. That means we need a **HUGE** outpouring of public support for a strong HCP. It’s time to send a message to the Board of Forestry making it clear that Oregonians care about our publicly owned forests and won’t tolerate excessive clear-cutting on public lands. So, [_**will you join me in asking them to pass a strong HCP and help preserve our forests for future generations?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54710900/379397254/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYTVkNDc2LTEyNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sClWu6qN61vp_trOc27PDOHn5c2QCVBVG2MuIENENFA=&emci=46e47d2b-e965-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=6fa5d476-1266-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) Thank you for your commitment to protecting our public lands, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: I’m so proud of this movement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Friend,

I’m so proud of this movement.

**Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed decisively that we’re not willing to let it go.**

Many votes are still being counted. But here’s some of what the NDRC achieved thanks to your support:
* We helped elect eight Democracy Defenders to gubernatorial offices.
* We helped win three secretary of state races.
* We helped flip at least three state legislative chambers, including two in Michigan – giving Michigan a Democratic trifecta for the first time in decades.
* We protected Democratic majorities in six more chambers.
* We protected the veto power of Democratic governors in two states.

It’s not perfect. But it’s a powerful statement. **Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation.**

I've believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win. The election results underscore that. It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for last week's outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave.

However, too many Americans in too many states – including Florida, Georgia, and Wisconsin – continue to be impacted by partisan and racial gerrymandering. Two redistricting cases are before the U.S. Supreme Court and nine other lawsuits against Republican gerrymandered maps are making their way through state and federal courts.

**The work must continue. And I hope you’ll stick with us as we keep pushing it forward.

clean_body: | Friend, I’m so proud of this movement. Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed decisively that we’re not willing to let it go. Many votes are still being counted. But here’s some of what the NDRC achieved thanks to your support: We helped elect eight Democracy Defenders to gubernatorial offices. We helped win three secretary of state races. We helped flip at least three state legislative chambers, including two in Michigan – giving Michigan a Democratic trifecta for the first time in decades. We protected Democratic majorities in six more chambers. We protected the veto power of Democratic governors in two states. It’s not perfect. But it’s a powerful statement. Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation. I've believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win. The election results underscore that. It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for last week's outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave. However, too many Americans in too many states – including Florida, Georgia, and Wisconsin – continue to be impacted by partisan and racial gerrymandering. Two redistricting cases are before the U.S. Supreme Court and nine other lawsuits against Republican gerrymandered maps are making their way through state and federal courts. The work must continue. And I hope you’ll stick with us as we keep pushing it forward. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = That’s a lot of work left to do. subject: The case against Trump is heating up
body:
With Trump just announcing his 2024 presidential campaign, it is critical that he is held accountable for his actions. | | |

Additionally, the Trump business is being investigated by New York’s Attorney General. But Trump still has not been prosecuted. **Public pressure is mounting for Attorney General Merrick Garland to further investigate Trump’s crimes, we want to know what local Democrats think:** | **Do you support Attorney General Garland’s investigation into Trump?**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Unity overcame division.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705653/379356097/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221116unity_wm_od30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjIwYzc4My1lYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5iSxx3lsV5miy8NT9iEIln7b_X7TI6prEr4TFK6h6s=)
---
Team, In light of last night’s news, I wanted to take a minute to make something clear. This November, Marylanders from all walks of life came together to participate in our democracy and vote for leaders committed to moving our state forward, not backward, and leaving no one behind. **Here in Maryland, extremism was on the ballot, but reason prevailed. Unity overcame division.** On the heels of a historic election year, the last thing our state needs is a hateful, dangerous demagogue to divide us. We’re better than that, and we deserve better than that. As your Governor-Elect, I’m focused on one thing: delivering for you, the people of Maryland. Let’s continue to come together, regardless of party or background, and work to lift each other up. That’s what this movement is all about. Elevate, Wes | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54705654/379356098/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221116unity_wm_od30da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjIwYzc4My1lYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5iSxx3lsV5miy8NT9iEIln7b_X7TI6prEr4TFK6h6s=)

Friend, The Republican Party is taking a good & long look in the mirror after disappointing midterm election results. Derek - I wanted you to hear a story about what your money is going to when you donate to us. Because of the support of our grassroots donors, we were able to send more funds to our chartered units to help with their campaign efforts in the 2022 elections. **The Young Democrats of North Carolina** were one of the recipients of the YDA stipend funds that we sent out to help with our chapters organize for the 2022 midterm elections. The Young Dems from the Tar Heel State ran themselves ragged trying to elect Dems up and down the ballot, but especially for the State House. There is no better example of this than the **Young Democrats of Rowan-Cabarrus** who worked incredibly hard to elect Diamond Staton-Williams to the North Carolina House of Representatives by only 425 votes.

_**425 Votes. That's honestly 1 field shift that could have easily been missed if they didn't have support from us and supporters like you.**_ This was one of only 2 seats to flip from red to blue in the entire state and effectively protected Governor Roy Cooper's veto, managed by **Mackenzie Reedybacon** from the Young Dems of Rowan-Cabbarus. This will be incredibly crucial when the North Carolina GOP attempts to pass abortion bans in the state next year. They effectively protected Our Young Dems in North Carolina told us that this could not have been possible if it had not been for the generous donations from supporters like you. You all helped us tremendously in this past election and we would be grateful to have that continued support to help us in the Georgia Runoff.

clean_body: You're gonna want to read this | | Derek - I wanted you to hear a story about what your money is going to when you donate to us. Because of the support of our grassroots donors, we were able to send more funds to our chartered units to help with their campaign efforts in the 2022 elections. The Young Democrats of North Carolina were one of the recipients of the YDA stipend funds that we sent out to help with our chapters organize for the 2022 midterm elections. The Young Dems from the Tar Heel State ran themselves ragged trying to elect Dems up and down the ballot, but especially for the State House. There is no better example of this than the Young Democrats of Rowan-Cabarrus who worked incredibly hard to elect Diamond Staton-Williams to the North Carolina House of Representatives by only 425 votes. | 425 Votes. That's honestly 1 field shift that could have easily been missed if they didn't have support from us and supporters like you. This was one of only 2 seats to flip from red to blue in the entire state and effectively protected Governor Roy Cooper's veto, managed by Mackenzie Reedybacon from the Young Dems of Rowan-Cabbarus. This will be incredibly crucial when the North Carolina GOP attempts to pass abortion bans in the state next year. They effectively protected Our Young Dems in North Carolina told us that this could not have been possible if it had not been for the generous donations from supporters like you. You all helped us tremendously in this past election and we would be grateful to have that continued support to help us in the Georgia Runoff. Congratulations to the Young Dems of Rowan-Cabarrus, NC State Rep-Elect Diamond Staton-Williams, and the Young Dems of NC at large for winning the race and protecting reproductive rights in their home state. We shocked the nation once. We're going to do it again. \- YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890518:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890519:6MGpKAGN6:m:1:3331703221:C8EC7325AE581DA7F298D358C30184B2:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: That’s how much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221116-3621-header&t=1&akid=3621%2E2526796%2EHZrlIO)
**$6** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.
Your $6 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With just 20 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $6 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please: will you split $6 now between me and Alexandria to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221116-1?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221116-1.XU03La&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20221116-3621-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=2&akid=3621%2E2526796%2EHZrlIO)
Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your support.
— Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
We sued the Trump administration when he gave influence over the Department of Veterans Affairs to a “shadow cabinet” comprised of three of his Mar-a-Lago buddies.
#
Derek -
Last night, Donald Trump announced he was running for president again.
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets, but first, we want you to know what that financial support helped us do against Trump last time:
VoteVets was the first organization to run ads attacking Trump after he won. We set the tone with an ad directed at him on his favorite show at the time, Morning Joe. We did it before anyone else.
We sued his administration when he gave influence over the Department of Veterans Affairs to a “shadow cabinet” comprised of three of his Mar-a-Lago buddies.
We led the fight to stop Trump from using military pay and pensions to fund his border wall.
We elevated the voices of Veterans and Military Families against his pursuit of war with Iran and when he called members of the military “suckers” and “losers.”
He even blocked VoteVets on Twitter.
We ran some of the most effective independent expenditure ads reaching veterans, independents and other voters most progressive organizations can’t reach when we beat Trump in 2020.
And so much more...
As long as Trump is a public figure, we will be IN. HIS. FACE. in a way that is effective and gets results. But we can’t do any of that without you. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets? We will use your support to actually run programs that help stop Trump and increase Democrats’ Senate majority.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221116-2-15&t=1&akid=7162%2E3013755%2EoJrMTr)

name: Doug Mastriano for Governor
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO PO Box 138, Fayetteville PA 17222
body:
You helped build a movement.
| |
---
Peter, I couldn’t close out this campaign without extending my sincerest gratitude for everything you helped us do.
You helped power this campaign, even when no one in the Establishment would. You helped us win the support of 2.2 million Pennsylvanians... and helped us build a movement that defied the odds again and again and again.
We fell short this time, but I’m so grateful that I was able to count on your fighting spirit.
Our state and our nation faces a tough road ahead... and our fight to secure freedom must continue. This movement you helped us build is only just getting started.
Thanks again, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve helped make possible this year... and I look forward to the fights to come.
Stay tuned for updates and hearing more about our next steps forward.
Sincerely,
Doug

clean_body: You helped build a movement. | | Peter, I couldn’t close out this campaign without extending my sincerest gratitude for everything you helped us do. You helped power this campaign, even when no one in the Establishment would. You helped us win the support of 2.2 million Pennsylvanians... and helped us build a movement that defied the odds again and again and again. We fell short this time, but I’m so grateful that I was able to count on your fighting spirit. Our state and our nation faces a tough road ahead... and our fight to secure freedom must continue. This movement you helped us build is only just getting started. Thanks again, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve helped make possible this year... and I look forward to the fights to come. Stay tuned for updates and hearing more about our next steps forward. Sincerely, Doug | | | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO PO Box 138, Fayetteville PA 17222

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Our fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54706387/379359279/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzUwODYzNy1mMTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBLzW0-NwU3RBc0qU_5G0naXuUmK4DrGsL_y9eKRHXY=&emci=eafcef30-3d65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=1c508637-f165-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $25 between my team and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54706388/379359280/1583625711?refcode=20221116.4_RW_A26&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzUwODYzNy1mMTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBLzW0-NwU3RBc0qU_5G0naXuUmK4DrGsL_y9eKRHXY=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54706389/379359281/1583625711?refcode=20221116.4_RW_A26&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzUwODYzNy1mMTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBLzW0-NwU3RBc0qU_5G0naXuUmK4DrGsL_y9eKRHXY=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
---

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Donald Trump is officially running for president again. But we don’t need to wait until 2024 to see Trump’s divisiveness on the ballot: My opponent, Herschel Walker, is endorsed by the failed former president -- and the runoff election is in 20 days. Republicans are determined to defeat me in the runoff. So that’s why: I'm counting on your support to win here in Georgia. | | | | | | | Republicans like Trump and Walker don’t put the American people first. They seek power to benefit themselves and their far-right buddies who fund their campaigns. They've already spent millions of dollars to defeat me -- and you can bet Trump, McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment will keep up their attacks in the next 20 days until the runoff and these next 20 days until the runoff and this next critical phase of the election. But listen, they'll be no match for this team if everyone pitches in. We've got strength in numbers, so I am asking you once again: I'm so grateful for all that you do. Thank you. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . ---
| | Peter,

I just got an urgent email from Herschel Walker and I need you to read it right away.

The 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat in Georgia simply isn't an option. The good news is, we can still help Herschel Walker flip Georgia but he needs you on his team.

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. _**[We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890437:6szDdAGNJ:m:1:3331421248:D6FC0E79F4C520BF12CF504C0F34EE6D:r "We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.")**_

Millions more will be spent to hold this seat for Raphael Warnock on top of the $101 million he's already raised from liberal donors all over the country.

_**[Please see Herschel's email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890437:6szDdAGNJ:m:1:3331421248:D6FC0E79F4C520BF12CF504C0F34EE6D:r "Please see Herschel’s email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.")**_

My very best,

| | | Nikki Haley

* * *

**From:** Herschel Walker
**Date:** Wednesday, November 9, 2022
**Subject:** OVERTIME

_The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME._

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890437:6szDdAGNJ:m:1:3331421248:D6FC0E79F4C520BF12CF504C0F34EE6D:r)**

clean_body: Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... Friend, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. Trump Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. clean_body: Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... Friend, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. Trump Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889508:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889508:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889508:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889508:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889509:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889510:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889511:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889512:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889513:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889514:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889515:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889516:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61889508:JNBAHAGN7:m:1:3317145305:061F53644A88604243E4BAEC3E8B8A6B:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: A Republican sweep in Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
I want to give you an exciting update on some candidates you helped us elect. Leading up to this election, Iowa was filled with tough races. In 2020, Ashley Hinson flipped her district by just 2.6 points. Mariannette Miller-Meeks won her race by just 6 votes. And Republicans almost flipped Iowa’s 3rd District, coming up short by less than 2 points. This year was just as tough. But thanks to people like you, we not only helped Reps. Ashley Hinson and Mariannette Miller-Meeks win reelection, **we swept the entire state! ** We flipped IA-03 with Zach Nunn, reelected Rep. Randy Feenstra in IA-04, and, at the state level, reelected Gov. Kim Reynolds. We also helped Brenna Bird flip the state’s attorney general seat held by Democrats for nearly 45 years. Here’s a brief highlight of the great Iowans we helped get over the finish line.
---
| |
---
| **Gov. Kim Reynolds** grew up in a small Iowa town where she learned the values of faith, family, and hard work. After serving as lieutenant governor, she became the first woman elected governor of Iowa. She’s a tough, courageous, and conservative governor who has helped Iowans keep more of their hard-earned money.
---
| | **Brenna Bird** is a conservative warrior who spent her career fighting big-government control and oppressive regulations. She successfully defeated the longest-serving attorney general in Iowa and is going to make a fantastic leader.
---
|
---
| |
---
| **Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks** is a fighter. She enrolled in the United States Army at 18 and served for 24 years as a private, nurse, and doctor before making her way to Congress where she continues to serve the great people of her state.
---
| | **Rep. Ashley Hinson** always stands for what’s right. Since day one, she’s been taking on the Left’s failed agenda, standing up to Biden’s trillion-dollar tax hikes and Pelosi’s trillion-dollar spending sprees.
---
|
---
| |
---
| **Zach Nunn** is a proud combat veteran, husband, and father of six. As a combat aviator with the US Air Force, Zach deployed three times to the Middle East, flying over 700 combat hours. He’s an American patriot and staunch conservative, and I’m eager to see everything he accomplishes in Congress.
---
| | **Rep. Randy Feenstra** is a strong fiscal conservative who’s fighting back against the Biden administration's socialist spending schemes and pushing back against Communist China. He’s done a fantastic job representing the people of IA-04 and will continue doing great things in his next term.
---
|
---
| | It was an honor to travel to Iowa and rally behind these bold Republican leaders. Thanks to people like you, we had a full sweep of Republican victories in Iowa. My very best,
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd9a7b1259dd40af92eccef10e7635aa&_e=OBXX2dVbyVy_6mmWj14zYQQFpxU3uSskOJ2fdOrXZR0PPa_v6T54rjSvwSqo_mxo8bqQ8nIFIPE6p6c3uRYuRwXY7W77QYDB3laIBRE_xkScE1HkYgm1_2e0OBJOy3GX5wkSs0TYZkbm7anX5tRaRwMJiEL4kj92PhDQrNWTWtpbRd1yykU_KsYQz3uyR48J2WQD6r-OzFZJ5AgzMYyHPmCj5oZuFxZhcqVB_nDIvkR0YVsGlgAnoNooye0S7mEr2vwIP3T-4kTG2nWKa2ikwNQ3S44GQPybkX420ZiirKG_FPd-fu7-DrgcOTT9DNyJtV9EqRIOxyfXl7o4M7yAoJAF9XuBvPOf0FuzbhtveUM%3D)
---
Nikki Haley

clean_body: | | | Friend, I want to give you an exciting update on some candidates you helped us elect. Leading up to this election, Iowa was filled with tough races. In 2020, Ashley Hinson flipped her district by just 2.6 points. Mariannette Miller-Meeks won her race by just 6 votes. And Republicans almost flipped Iowa’s 3rd District, coming up short by less than 2 points. This year was just as tough. But thanks to people like you, we not only helped Reps. Ashley Hinson and Mariannette Miller-Meeks win reelection, we swept the entire state! We flipped IA-03 with Zach Nunn, reelected Rep. Randy Feenstra in IA-04, and, at the state level, reelected Gov. Kim Reynolds. We also helped Brenna Bird flip the state’s attorney general seat held by Democrats for nearly 45 years. Here’s a brief highlight of the great Iowans we helped get over the finish line. | | | Gov. Kim Reynolds grew up in a small Iowa town where she learned the values of faith, family, and hard work. After serving as lieutenant governor, she became the first woman elected governor of Iowa. She’s a tough, courageous, and conservative governor who has helped Iowans keep more of their hard-earned money. | | Brenna Bird is a conservative warrior who spent her career fighting big-government control and oppressive regulations. She successfully defeated the longest-serving attorney general in Iowa and is going to make a fantastic leader. | | | | Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a fighter. She enrolled in the United States Army at 18 and served for 24 years as a private, nurse, and doctor before making her way to Congress where she continues to serve the great people of her state. | | Rep. Ashley Hinson always stands for what’s right. Since day one, she’s been taking on the Left’s failed agenda, standing up to Biden’s trillion-dollar tax hikes and Pelosi’s trillion-dollar spending sprees. | | | | Zach Nunn is a proud combat veteran, husband, and father of six. As a combat aviator with the US Air Force, Zach deployed three times to the Middle East, flying over 700 combat hours. He’s an American patriot and staunch conservative, and I’m eager to see everything he accomplishes in Congress. | | Rep. Randy Feenstra is a strong fiscal conservative who’s fighting back against the Biden administration's socialist spending schemes and pushing back against Communist China. He’s done a fantastic job representing the people of IA-04 and will continue doing great things in his next term. | | | It was an honor to travel to Iowa and rally behind these bold Republican leaders. Thanks to people like you, we had a full sweep of Republican victories in Iowa. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. - | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. | | |
Are you ready to join our team to flip Georgia RED?! Herschel Walker needs you!

There's no time to waste. For the next _10 minutes_ , we're opening up our _10X-MATCH_ for any conservative patriot ready to get involved in the contentious Georgia Runoff. We're not quite through the darkness Joe Biden's administration has brought to our country, but electing Herschel Walker is our best chance at getting to the light at the end of the tunnel.

TEAM TO FLIP GA RED")
---

Democrats have already secured 50 Senate seats! If we want to maintain our crucial deadlock, the GOP must be all hands on deck in Georgia to keep the Dems from getting to a 51 - 49 advantage.

clean_body: Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... Friend, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: | | I need your immediate attention. = = | = = = = = Let me make this perfectly clear: – We watched Trump rally insurrectionists in our Capitol. – We watched Trump trash our democracy and spread lies, hate, and division. – We watched Trump embarrass our country on the world stage. And now, he has the gall to announce another run for the Presidency? I don’t think so. I will do everything I possibly can to stop him from waltzing back into the White House. = = | = = = = = Thank you for all you do, Nancy Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
