name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker’s big campaign problem is that he’s a weak candidate who got 210,000 votes less than Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp. With Walker at the top of the ticket, he’s going to struggle to beat Sen. Raphael Warnock even if Mitch McConnell dumps yet another $52 million into the Georgia race. But we can’t take anything for granted now. We have to help.
body:
A big problem for Herschel Walker
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74eb9fe9-f16f-476c-bca1-13da824bcf04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[HERSCHEL WALKER HAS A SERIOUS PROBLEM](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15b4449e-75b1-4518-a496-e50e72bf08c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_No, as sick as it is, we're not talking about the multiple womens' lives he's threatened--including holding a gun to his ex-wife's head and telling her he'd "blow her brains out." Nor are we referencing Walker's serial dishonesty, from denying he took two women to get abortions (he did, and still believes in a ban, no exceptions) to claiming he served in the miliary (nope), police (nope), FBI (nope) and graduated from the U. of Georgia in the top 1% (he didn't graduate). _** _These are only some of Walker's many lies. The scary thing is there are so many, it makes me wonder if he actually believes them--if he even understands reality._ _**The problem we refer to is Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp won't be on the ballot this time helping****to turn**** out voters who only voted for Walker when they thought it meant a**** **_ _**Senate majority. Kemp received an astonishing 210,000 more votes than Walker, betraying the weakness of Walker's candidacy.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf868b7d7-cd90-40ce-8ee4-686b51821938/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

So can you join Blue Amp Action in rushing $5, $10 or $25 to Raphael Warnock right now for the three weeks left in this runoff?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25547906-ea49-4ff8-a3bc-002ecfe1f5de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks for standing up yet again, Blue Amp Action community.**
---
Cliff

body:
Help protect my Senate seat, fight back against Herschel Walker and Trump's divisiveness, and support Democrats across the nation. | |
---
Derek, Donald Trump is officially running for president again. But we don’t need to wait until 2024 to see Trump’s divisiveness on the ballot: My opponent, Herschel Walker, is endorsed by the failed former president -- and the runoff election is in just 20 days. This grassroots team has spent the year supporting Democrats nationwide. clean_body: Help protect my Senate seat, fight back against Herschel Walker and Trump's divisiveness, and support Democrats across the nation. | | Derek, Donald Trump is officially running for president again. But we don’t need to wait until 2024 to see Trump’s divisiveness on the ballot: My opponent, Herschel Walker, is endorsed by the failed former president -- and the runoff election is in just 20 days. This grassroots team has spent the year supporting Democrats nationwide. Now, I'm counting on your support to bring this home. Split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help protect my Senate seat, fight back against Herschel Walker and Trumpism, and support Democrats across the nation. Republicans like Trump and Walker don’t put the American people first. They seek power to benefit themselves and their far-right buddies who fund their campaigns. They've already spent millions of dollars to defeat me -- and you can bet Trump, McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment will keep up their attacks in the next 20 days until the runoff and this next critical phase of the election. But Derek, they'll be no match for this team if everyone pitches in. We've got strength in numbers, so I am asking you once again: I'm so grateful for all that you do. Thank you. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5396%2E878179%2EUrSbH2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5396%2E878179%2EUrSbH2).**

| | Peter,

I just got an urgent email from Herschel Walker and I need you to read it right away.

The 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat in Georgia simply isn't an option. The good news is, we can still help Herschel Walker flip Georgia but he needs you on his team.

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. _**[We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888777:6ycxhAGN6:m:1:3253819041:D94E7D5BFFCF73531CBAA8024EC8592C:r "We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.")**_

Millions more will be spent to hold this seat for Raphael Warnock on top of the $101 million he's already raised from liberal donors all over the country.

_**[Please see Herschel's email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888777:6ycxhAGN6:m:1:3253819041:D94E7D5BFFCF73531CBAA8024EC8592C:r "Please see Herschel’s email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.")**_

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61888777:6ycxhAGN6:m:1:3253819041:D94E7D5BFFCF73531CBAA8024EC8592C:r)**

name: Leah Donahey, LCV
subject: Tell President Biden to REJECT a massive Alaska drilling project -- equivalent to 76 coal plants.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-R30zMG/Z2YzbU1UVzNwM29HbTlyTWx0bmhPUTF5Tm92MzFQTUFSRGVyN0wyYW8zRmtXd09ESVhqci8xbDhhSmtGSkx0S2pyNkRVcnU0SUUzMnBIajBVQzBreFVscEluTm9zM1lYKzczcFJPaTlPMFk9S0/TDUxaEJYZmJwUm5IaldVc0V1N29FSkFxR1VqbFF3MWpuVEdqMUswMHpvOW53UVYxRTlMNjZYYnJsMTNLd2MxZ2VSUHliN3V0eml4SW5ucDNRUFB3M3lBTnRBSG9uMmVKS0 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8d-eKT_/Z2YzbU1UVzNwM29HbTlyTWx0bmhPUTF5Tm92MzFQTUFSRGVyN0wyYW8zRmtXd09ESVhqci8xbDhhSmtGSkx0S2pyNkRVcnU0SUUzMnBIajBVQzBreFVscEluTm9zM1lYKzczcFJPaTlPMFk9S0/TDUxaEJYZmJwUm5IaldVc0V1N29FSkFxR1VqbFF3MWpuVEdqMUswMHpvOW53UVYxRTlMNjZYYnJsMTNLd2MxZ2VSUHliN3V0eml4SW5ucDNRUFB3M3lBTnRBSG9uMmVKS0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMrDZL6T~/Z2YzbU1UVzNwM29HbTlyTWx0bmhPUTF5Tm92MzFQTUFSRGVyN0wyYW8zRmtXd09ESVhqci8xbDhhSmtGSkx0S2pyNkRVcnU0SUUzMnBIajBVQzBreFVscEluTm9zM1lYKzczcFJPaTlPMFk9S0/TDUxaEJYZmJwUm5IaldVc0V1N29FSkFxR1VqbFF3MWpuVEdqMUswMHpvOW53UVYxRTlMNjZYYnJsMTNLd2MxZ2VSUHliN3V0eml4SW5ucDNRUFB3M3lBTnRBSG9uMmVKS0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8921574&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDM2MDAzNwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDM2MDAzNwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8921574&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDM2MDAzNwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDM2MDAzNwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXGbvZcN/Z2YzbU1UVzNwM29HbTlyTWx0bmhPUTF5Tm92MzFQTUFSRGVyN0wyYW8zRmtXd09ESVhqci8xbDhhSmtGSkx0S2pyNkRVcnU0SUUzMnBIajBVQzBreFVscEluTm9zM1lYKzczcFJPaTlPMFk9S0/

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: before 8 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFrgzAYhn-N3hTzRZP04GGtVGjZGOy00_g0saYYY1OtdL9-UdoeBiGQ93nyhbwqJ4wJlpKMi1DmyLBRMtQ5JACEEAaUJjSNay4AWCU3pBLY8CxIE2VQdzGSGZ2z1sS1NWGbp1SIFAitEUSWbdIqhabBKuFJwxQmNOzydhyHa0DfAtj71TilpDUzjnUbO3W7-UE-Nuh0r6IbRtYEdD-N5udqJ1ergBYvFgBbgFFST94qvArspc3uwWs0A-pT_zTQ2Kkf_Qmyp2H7Ua1RX3dRuXvvM3E-4KfHP32npQf_wlZL_4fiAPyrPJJt6HI5zLrr9JVxX85pLWepxL_d6eaeB3wbAKzXANbfw-V7Nm46m2MZlb9FdGEfJlsg7Pw-3gf1Mh9D4rXzJeXFH7VNiLA)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**[FirstName,Fallback=Patriot], that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkDFvgzAQhX-N2UD4jG0YGJqipGqkLpkyRRdsgiuMiQNB6a-vQWmGSidL9753Z93TJRUiFxnlMo9UiQIbrSJTQgpAKRXAWMqypJY5gDirgp5zbCQnWaotmi5BOqP3ztmkdjZqy6IIE7XmZ51RmRXsjFxIbDClFFmTNlFXtuM43Ah7I7AN1XitlbMzjnWbeH2_h0VBtuhNr-M7xs4Stp1Ge7q5ydeasOrFCIgFWK3MFFxVsIJ42Wb_5DXaAc2l_3OgdVM_hg74n8P1o16lvu5ifmxn_rE_zHPAp74zKoB_YmtUuKH6BHnY7ekm8qUaZtN15iZkCOeyhrNEEv7uTPMoidwQgHUMYL0ersfZ-unb7nfx7qeKr-LL8gXCe3jHx6BfzueSZM18UWX1C6g8ic4)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Friend, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMtugzAQRb_G7EB4jA1dsCilidRI3XTTrCLHj-AKY2JeSr--hjZZVLIszbl3RjNXlZixgmWY5kUkS864VjIyJaQAGGMGhKQkS0ReALCzfMLnguucoixVlps24Xjh3jtnE-Fs1JQ8EyrTIAVJw0iqz5yfC8ZTranQitKoLZtx7AdEnhHswtNeKenswkfRJF7NcxgUsOXedCqeeewsIrtptKfBTV4oROqHhoCtglXSTMFVB-svEdz23Fy6O3u0Lj5U3LqpG0MF9O533ag21Ik2rqq5OH5K8joE-dS1RgbhH2yMDDfUb5B_7A-4inwp-8W0rRlYHsK5bOGskYRNWqNvJcorBLC1AWzXw_W4WD992cM-3n_X8ZW9W7qK8BL-8darh_NvSLJlvtK8_gGmJ4o2)

body:
| Derek,

Last week, voters across the country rejected radical Trump-backed politicians.

We stood together and fought hard to defend our democracy and ensure fair elections in Wisconsin. But our fight is far from over -- and last night, we were reminded of that when **Donald Trump announced he is running for president again.**

The next two years will be critical to the future of American democracy as we know it, and Wisconsin will undoubtedly be ground zero once again. That means we’ve got to keep standing together and fight any attempts to break our democracy.

[Can I count on you to stand with me against Donald Trump? I need to know you’re with me in the fight to protect free, fair, and secure elections.](https://go.tonyevers.com/survey/defend_democracy_2211/?&source=TE_EM_EN_3MU_20221116_1_1&t=5&akid=6112%2E1827488%2E0MdQB5)

| ****[DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://go.tonyevers.com/survey/defend_democracy_2211/?&source=TE_EM_EN_3MU_20221116_1_1&t=6&akid=6112%2E1827488%2E0MdQB5)****
---

This grassroots team stood by my side throughout our campaign, and we won. That is why I’m asking you to join me in the work ahead — because I know, together, we can save our democracy and keep moving forward.

Thank you,

Tony

****[DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://go.tonyevers.com/survey/defend_democracy_2211/?&source=TE_EM_EN_3MU_20221116_1_1&t=7&akid=6112%2E1827488%2E0MdQB5)****
